Name: Construtora Sudoeste
Description:
Somos uma construtora capaz de enxergar o mundo com um olhar diferente. Desenhamos projetos com um design que valoriza a vida e contamos com acabamentos que combinam sofisticação e bem-estar em cada detalhe.

Trabalhamos para você viver o novo todos os dias. Para superar as expectativas, abrir caminhos e apresentar um futuro. O seu futuro.

Name: Construtora Fonseca & Mercadante (CFM)
Description:
Com 31 anos de história, a Construtora Fonseca & Mercadante é uma referência nacional em engenharia e construção civil no setor privado, reconhecida pela entrega de obras com alto desempenho técnico, excelência em gestão e compromisso com resultados.

Desde sua fundação em 1994, a empresa já construiu mais de 3 milhões de metros quadrados, atuando nos mais diversos segmentos: Shopping Centers, Data Centers, Indústria, Logística, Saúde, Edifícios Corporativos e Comerciais. A solidez de sua trajetória é sustentada por uma cultura organizacional ética, humana e transparente — valores que orientam as relações com clientes, parceiros e colaboradores.

Mais do que construir grandes empreendimentos, a CFM se dedica a construir relações de confiança, oferecendo soluções personalizadas, com alto nível de governança, inovação e respeito aos prazos e orçamentos. A atuação da empresa é pautada por rigor técnico, qualidade na execução, segurança nas operações e foco constante no resultado final para o cliente, da Pré-Construção à execução de obras.



Focada em clientes das áreas corporativa, indústria/logística, comércio/saúde e shopping centers, a empresa possui extensa experiência na gestão e execução de obras com projetos arquitetônicos ousados e demandas específicas. 

Sua experiência se traduz em eficiência nas várias etapas da construção, da elaboração de projetos e gerenciamento de custos à execução, aprovação e entrega da obra. 

A Fonseca & Mercadante, reafirma sua posição no mercado e aponta, nos próximos anos, para um crescimento estratégico que continua priorizando justamente o seu maior diferencial: a dedicação e a atenção personalizada a cada obra e a cada cliente.

Name: Kumar Corp
Description:
Kumar Corp, celebrating 59 years of excellence, is a well-diversified and value-driven enterprise.
With over 140 projects successfully completed, we take pride in having more than 42,000 happy families who stand as our true brand ambassadors and greatest strength.

From diverse socio-economic and cultural backgrounds, these 42,000+ families — along with over 1,000 satisfied businesses, ranging from large enterprises to small ventures — enjoy the comfort and convenience of environment-friendly, well-designed, and fully-equipped residential complexes, as well as modern, premium commercial spaces.

Name: Unità Engenharia
Description:
Somos a união de valores e experiências em mais de 25 anos no
mercado de empreendimentos residenciais, sempre prezando pela qualidade e tecnologia.

Somos unidos por um propósito maior: transformar a construção civil residencial brasileira.

Somos únicos. Somos Unità!

@unitaengenharia

Name: Veev, By Lennar
Description: Veev is leading the way in the transformation of the construction industry with an innovative approach to home construction. Veev’s proprietary Closed Panel System allows homes to be assembled efficiently on the home site, while delivering a more sustainable and higher quality final product than traditional construction. As a new subsidiary of Lennar, Veev is leveraging the strength and scale of its parent company, while maintaining its speed and disruptive approach as a Silicon Valley based company. Veev has developed a vertically integrated process that involves multi-disciplinary collaboration across real estate, design, development, engineering, manufacturing, and construction.

Name: Veev, By Lennar
Description: Veev is leading the way in the transformation of the construction industry with an innovative approach to home construction. Name: Dandelion Energy
Description:
Dandelion Energy is the nation’s leading residential geothermal provider, on a mission to make the world’s most efficient heating and cooling technology accessible to everyone. Since 2017, we have installed thousands of geothermal heat pumps and over 1 million linear feet of ground loops across the country.

We specialize in partnering with production home builders to integrate geothermal at scale. By combining our end-to-end partnership in design, drilling, and distribution, with our policy expertise, we’ve made ground-source energy a cost-effective standard for modern developments.

By harnessing the Earth’s constant underground temperature, our systems deliver 2x–4x greater efficiency than traditional HVAC. Dandelion empowers builders to deliver premium, emissions-free homes that significantly lower energy bills for homeowners, providing maximum comfort and long-term savings without the premium price tag.

Name: Telford Living
Description: At Telford Living, our expertise is developing best-in-class homes and sustainable communities on premier sites in major cities across the UK. We are focused on building a robust pipeline of consistently profitable deals in the UK living sector through a targeted, data-driven approach to geographic markets and product types, including build-to-rent, and purpose-built student accommodation (PBSA) and co-living.

Name: VELUX Commercial
Description:
VELUX Commercial is a division in the VELUX Group, offering daylight and ventilation solutions for industrial, commercial, and public buildings. 
We offer to support building professionals throughout the entire process from specification to delivery and maintenance of daylight and ventilation solutions. 

Our product program ranges from high-end bespoke glazing solutions for prestigious architectural buildings to domes and continuous roof lights for industrial and agricultural buildings and warehouses. 

VELUX Commercial has 1,100 employees working in Sales, Production and support functions in 14 countries.

Name: APCHQ
Description: Fondée en 1961, l’Association des professionnels de la construction et de l’habitation du Québec (APCHQ) est un organisme privé à but non lucratif qui, à travers son réseau et ses associations régionales, représente et soutient plus de 28 000 entreprises de l’industrie de la construction résidentielle et de la rénovation. Elle est, depuis 1995, la représentante patronale ayant le mandat de négocier la convention collective au nom des employeurs du secteur de la construction résidentielle. L’APCHQ a pour mission d’être un acteur de changement rassembleur au bénéfice de la société québécoise et agit comme un moteur de développement social et économique par la promotion de la durabilité et de la qualité en habitation.

Name: CTS Group
Description:
Leading design and build contractor for data center solutions in Europe and the largest in the Nordics.

CTS Group is a business with traditional values, diligence and integrity being paramount. Our genuine aim is to provide Total Client Satisfaction by consistently delivering quality design and build solutions whilst maintaining motivated, happy and dedicated work force. 

CTS Group focuses on sustainability and delivery of first class projects in an environmentally friendly way. A commitment to innovation and excellence helps CTS Group remain at the forefront of technology, giving us the ability to provide our clients with the best service on the market today.

«With passion for the business!»

Name: Nahar Group
Description:
Established in 1973, Nahar Group is a premier real estate developer headquartered in Mumbai. The Group has developed 20 million sq. ft. of prime real estate projects, making it one of the names to reckon with in Mumbai. The group having proved its proficiency in developing Integrated Townships, Lifestyle Residences and Industrial space, Nahar Group has also marked its footprint in the field of education by launching Nahar International School which is affiliated to Cambridge School Network, in Healthcare by establishing Nahar Medical Centre where latest diagnostic facilities are available and Wellness apart from its core business as a real estate developer. The Group is now expanding exponentially by constructing approx. one million sq. ft. annually.

Guided by the visionary leadership of Mr. Sukhraj Nahar, Chairman & Managing Director and Ms. Manju Yagnik, Vice Chairperson, Nahar Group is today recognized for its quality, reliability and professional approach. Under their able leadership, the Group has earned prestigious awards for its domain expertise, management practices and corporate social responsibilities. These include the Township Award at Pan-India level instituted by Times Glory, Award for the Best Garden and greenery by Municipal Corporation of Greater Mumbai, ‘Corporate Governance and Business Excellence’ Award by Star Report, Excellence in Innovative Marketing Award from MCHI, Project of the Year Award, the coveted ‘Woman Entrepreneur of the Year’ award, ‘Female Real Estate Professional’ of the year, Women Super Achiever’s Award in Real Estate Sector by ABP News and the Best Developer in Residential Infrastructure by Construction Source India. Nahar Group has been honoured with “Economic Times Best Realty Brand 2015” award and has been recognized by HDFC for building a better future.

Name: B&T Steel Construction
Description:
B&T Steel specialises in design, detailing, fabrication, painting, erection and cladding of steel structures throughout Africa. With over 30 years of experience, our dedicated team deliver cost-effective, customised building solutions from concept to completion.

We specialise in providing all our clients a full turnkey approach to structural steel services. We start at the beginning of each project with your vision, starting with design, moving onto detailing and fabrication and then finally the erection of your steel structure.

We are situated in Delmas, Mpumalanga, South Africa. Between Witbank and Springs – 50km east of Johannesburg and 70km south-east of Pretoria and complete large and complex projects throughout Africa.

Name: Kontakt Al
Description:
Themeluar në 1999 me bazë në Tiranë, KONTAKT ka një traditë të gjatë e të shkëlqyer pune dhe sjellje pro zhvillimit. Ne jemi lider në ndërtesa, infrastruktura civile dhe markete të industrisë së rëndë. Ne aspirojmë të jemi ndërtuesit e zgjedhjes tuaj. Kemi përmbushur ndërtimin e thuajse 90.000 m2 apartamente rezidenciale dhe 31.000 m2 ndërtime me beton të përforcuar. Qëllimi i aktiviteteve të KONTAKT janë veprat inxhinierike, të cilat kanë cilësi të lartë në përputhje me normat e BE; Performancë të shpejtë, duke siguruar zgjidhje logjistike në ndërtim; Përdorim të teknologjisë në ndërtim. Objektivat e aktivitetit tonë janë: Ndërtimi me çelik dhe beton; Hidroizolim i mureve nëntokësore të prekur nga uji; Termo/hidroizolim i tarracave të sheshta e ndërtimi i ndërtesave me struktura metalike. Kontakt menaxhon punën e mbi 300 specialistëve të punësuar dhe ka një staf inxhinierësh, teknicienësh dhe specialistësh organizimi prej 40 personash. 

Established in 1999 with headquarters in Tirana, KONTAKT has a long tradition of excellence, hard work and a can-do attitude. We are construction leaders in buildings, civil infrastructure, and heavy industrial markets. We aspire to be your builders of choice. During this period, we have completed the construction of approximately 90.000 m2 residential apartments, and 31.000 m2 of reinforced concrete constructions. The purpose of KONTAKT’s activity is engineering works, which have: High quality, in compliance with the Euro code norms. Quick performance, by means of logistics solutions in construction yards. Use of technology in construction. The object of our activity is as follows: Steel and concrete constructions; Hydro isolation of underground walls affected by waters; Thermo / hydro isolation of flat terraces; Construction of buildings with metallic structures. KONTAKT manages the work of 200 specialists and employees, and it has a staff of engineers, technicians, and organizational specialists of 40 persons.

Name: Greencore Homes
Description:
Greencore is a sustainable housebuilder with a real difference.
We build homes that are Better Than Net Zero and create climate positive places.

We combine innovative building techniques with a deep respect for nature, designing each home and community to support biodiversity, wellbeing and a genuinely sustainable lifestyle.

We are driven by values that inspire us, sustainability, integrity and a commitment to doing things differently and for the better.

With significant investment from majority shareholder M&G, strong relationships with partners and an experienced senior leadership team; Greencore Homes has ambitious targets to build 10,000 homes that are Better Than Net Zero by 2035.

Name: Building Performance Institute, Inc.
Description:
The Building Performance Institute, Inc., (BPI) is the nation's premier building performance credentialing, quality assurance and standards setting organization. BPI develops technical standards using an open, transparent, consensus-based process built on sound building science. BPI is approved by the American National Standards Institute, Inc. (ANSI) as an accredited developer of American National Standards.

BPI offers the following:

• National standards to ensure top quality, consistent protocols are being followed throughout the home performance and weatherization workforce
• Certification of individuals in building analyst, heating, AC/heat pump, shell/envelope and multi-family designations 
• Accreditation of contracting companies committed to delivering quality home performance improvements 
• Quality assurance to verify conformance with BPI Standards and provide feedback for continuing improvement 
• Partnerships with testing organizations that deliver BPI services in their market

Name: SEEMO Promoteur d'un Nouvel Art de Ville
Description:
Imaginer la ville autrement, c’est bâtir des lieux qui résonnent avec l’âme d’un territoire. Chaque projet devient une passerelle entre passé et futur, entre ce qui constitue l’identité profonde d’un lieu et ce qui le projette vers demain. C’est transformer chaque projet en un dialogue respectueux entre modernité et patrimoine, où l’innovation rencontre la tradition.

Depuis 2016, nous avons fait de cette philosophie notre fil rouge, en façonnant des projets immobiliers qui s’intègrent naturellement dans les paysages et s’enrichissent de la vie des communautés locales.

Nous croyons que l’immobilier ne se limite pas à la construction de bâtiments, mais qu’il doit contribuer à renforcer le lien entre les usagers et leur environnement. À chaque étape, nous veillons à ce que nos projets reflètent l’identité unique de leur territoire, tout en répondant aux exigences contemporaines en termes de confort, de durabilité et d’usage.

Notre engagement dépasse les murs que nous bâtissons. Nous soutenons activement les initiatives culturelles et artistiques qui insufflent de la vie et de l’inspiration aux territoires. Qu’il s’agisse d’encourager des événements locaux ou de collaborer avec des artistes, nous cherchons à nourrir le dialogue entre les communautés et leur environnement.

Être promoteur, pour nous, c’est contribuer à façonner un nouvel art de vi[ll]e : un urbanisme ancré dans la réalité des territoires, pensé pour les personnes qui y vivent, et tourné vers un avenir plus respectueux et harmonieux.

Name: KEU Mobile Home

It emerged in 2019 with the aim of revolutionizing the traditional concept of mobile homes. Our KEU are made with high-quality materials, unique and exclusive designs and cutting-edge technology, all with maximum efficiency and a strong commitment to preserving the environment, since all of our materials are 100% ecological.

We do it all.

Name: PFR Nieruchomości S.A.
Description:
PFR Nieruchomości S.A. jest spółką zależną Polskiego Funduszu Rozwoju. Zarządzamy aktywami funduszy: Funduszu Sektora Mieszkań na Wynajem i Funduszu Sektora Mieszkań dla Rozwoju. 

Dane osobowe
Administratorem danych osób odwiedzających profil jest PFR Nieruchomości S.A. („PFRN”), ul. Przeskok 2, 00-032 Warszawa. PFRN wyznaczył Inspektora Ochrony Danych, z którym można kontaktować pod adresem e-mail: iod@npfr.pl. Dane są przetwarzane w związku z prowadzeniem profilu, w tym w celu informowania i promowania aktywności PFRN, komunikacji z osobami odwiedzającymi profil oraz celach statystycznych i analitycznych oraz w celu dochodzenia roszczeń i obrony przed roszczeniami. Podstawą prawną przetwarzania danych jest jego uzasadniony interes (art. 6 ust. 1 lit. f) RODO), polegający na promowaniu działalność oraz dochodzenia roszczeń i obrony przed roszczeniami. Podanie danych jest dobrowolne. Dane będą przetwarzane przez czas istnienia profilu PFRN lub do momentu zgłoszenia sprzeciw wobec przetwarzania czy żądania usunięcia danych. Dane mogą być przekazywane podmiotom zewnętrznym wspierającym naszą organizację w świadczeniu usług, m.in. takie, które zapewniają usługi wsparcia technicznego i IT, konsultingowe lub analityczne. Przysługuje Ci prawo do dostępu, sprostowania, usunięcia, ograniczenia przetwarzania, przenoszenia danych, wniesienia sprzeciwu wobec przetwarzania danych, wniesienia skargi do organu nadzorczego, tj. Prezesa Urzędu Ochrony Danych Osobowych, cofnięcia zgody na przetwarzanie danych w dowolnym momencie bez wpływu na zgodność z prawem przetwarzania, którego dokonano na podstawie zgody przed jej cofnięciem. Powyższa informacja nie dotyczy przetwarzania danych przez administratora serwisu LinkedIn, informacje te odnajdą Państwo w polityce prywatności serwisu.

Name: BUILDOFFSITE
Description:
Unlock the Future of Construction with Buildoffsite! 

At Buildoffsite, we’re on a mission to transform the construction industry by championing offsite methods that deliver innovation, efficiency, and sustainability. Our vibrant community spans UK and international clients, suppliers, professional services, and academic leaders – all united by a passion for redefining how we build.

Why Buildoffsite?
 Advance Innovation: Drive cutting-edge solutions in offsite construction.
 Empower Business Success: Help clients and suppliers unlock the full potential of offsite benefits.
 Shape the Industry: Join debates, knowledge-sharing events, and networking opportunities.
 Boost Skills: Foster education and expertise in offsite methods.
 Streamline Procurement: Engage with pre-market and procurement events tailored to buyers.

 Spotlight on BOPAS (Buildoffsite Property Assurance Scheme):
This game-changing accreditation gives funders, lenders, and buyers 60 years of confidence in homes built with modern methods. BOPAS ensures risk-free valuations, mortgage approval for developers, and reduced lifecycle costs for homeowners.

Be part of the revolution in construction – where innovation meets opportunity. Let’s build smarter, faster, and better, together!

Name: Property Soar

Name: Schoenfelder Renovations, Inc.
Description:
Schoenfelder Renovations provides interior and exterior remodeling and general contracting services for commercial properties across the United States. Our team specializes in renovations for hotels & resorts, senior living communities, multi-housing complexes, retail buildings, restaurants, and other commercial facilities.

Founded in 1991, our core values remain the same: quality craftsmanship and “renovations done right.” Schoenfelder Renovations is the answer if you need premier nationwide renovation or contracting services. Contact us or request a bid online!

Name: Landmark Homes
Description:
Landmark Homes is an innovative home builder that has been building homes in Alberta for over 46 years. We take pride in producing a wide range of home types including single family homes, duplexes, townhomes and condos in both Edmonton and Calgary.

We have a state of the art building facility in Edmonton called ACQBUILT. This  climate controlled facility is the first of its kind in North America, and it allows us to build homes that may look similar to the rest of the market on the outside—but are built stronger and exceptionally efficient on the inside. Sign up for a free tour of ACQBUILT  www.acqbuilt.com/tour.php and learn what a difference our building process makes. Regardless of the builder you choose, touring ACQBUILT will help you make a more educated decision on the next place you call home. 

Interested in joining our team? We are a passionate and dynamic group of professionals who continually strive to improve the quality of the houses we build while ensuring the best value for the customer and the community. We pursue this goal through research and development of innovative products and processes, integration of state of the art information technology, ongoing education for our entire staff, and a culture of continuous improvement.
View available career opportunities at www.landmarkgroup.ca/careers.php.

Corporate Vision: “To be a major North American housing solutions provider recognized for sustainability and for leading a revolution in the industrialization of housing construction.”

Name: Les Pins Promoteur d'Immobilier
Description:
Avec plus de 30 ans expériences dans la Promotion Immobilière locale, Les Pins Promoteur d’Immobilier est le fruit de la réunion de compétences pour créer une société de Promotion Immobilière, comme nous l’avons toujours souhaité et porteuse de nos valeurs fondatrices :

- Respect des Engagements : car la confiance est le maître mot de la relation avec nos clients
- Rigueur et Sens du Détail : pour vous garantir la Pérennité et la Valeur de votre patrimoine 
- Exigence et Professionnalisme : nous supervisons avec soin chaque étape-clé de la construction
- Ecoute, Bienveillance, et Accompagnement personnalisé : Une priorité la Satisfaction de nos clients
- Respect de l’Environnement : Une démarche globale de développement durable et une mise à l’honneur du transport vert (Ex :Prise de recharge électrique individuelle pour tous les stationnements, espace vélos lumineux et décoré avec station de gonflage et rack de rangement dans chacune de nos résidences)

Chacun de nos logements a été spécifiquement étudié pour apporter une réelle qualité de vie à ses occupants : la luminosité, la technicité et l’innovation des matériaux, le confort acoustique et thermique sont mis en avant pour la pérennité de votre futur bien et donc, pour vous, pour des décennies.
 
Chez LPPI, nous ne vous parlerons pas de lots ou de produits mais de Logements, nous ne vous parlerons pas de rentabilité mais de Pérennité, et nous ne vous parlerons pas non plus de prestations de standing mais de produits et matériaux de qualité, innovants et mis en oeuvre par des professionnels locaux.

Name: Avcılar İnşaat
Description:
Avcılar’ın ilk temelleri, 1989’da atıldı. Kurulduğu günden bu yana sürekli gelişimi ve istikrarlı büyümeyi hedefleyen firma, her geçen yıl gücüne güç kattı. 35 yıldır İzmir’deki büyük projelerin altına gururla imzasını atan Avcılar, bugün faaliyet gösterdiği inşaat sektöründe, sadece İzmir’in değil, tüm Türkiye’nin yapısal güçleri arasında yer alıyor. Sağlam ve sözünün eri bir firma olmanın ötesinde “modernizmin mimarı” vizyonuyla, öncelikle İzmir için faydalı, özgün ve marka projelere imza atarak içinde bulunduğu sektöre yol veriyor, yön gösteriyor. Bugüne kadar, 3250 konut ve 455 işyeriyle toplamda 415.000 m² alana sahip inşaat projesini başarıyla tamamlayıp teslim eden Avcılar; tüm çalışmalarında teknolojinin geldiği son sistemleri kullanarak iş güvenliği ve ekolojik dengelere de ayrı bir önem veriyor, hassas davranıyor. 

Müşterilerinin beklentilerini ve isteklerini her projesinde duyarlılıkla dinleyen, projeler tamamlandıktan sonra da aldığı geri bildirimler ile yeni projelerde daha fazlasını vermeye ve daha iyisini yapmaya özen gösteren Avcılar; sürekli gelişim ışığında, üst düzeyde müşteri memnuniyeti ve kalite ile çevresel standartlara katkıda bulunup dünyanın hızla değişen beklentilerini karşılamayı ve en iyi çözümleri sunmayı hedefliyor. Avcılar’ın “modern yaşam alanları”ndan oluşan gurur dolu projeleri ve yatırımları artarak devam edecek.

La qualité de ses chantiers, son sérieux et son professionnalisme, lui confèrent une excellente réputation auprès des donneurs d’ordre et décideurs. 

Son atelier de production est doté de matériels de fabrication numériques et ses salariés se déplacent avec des véhicules équipés pour la pose. 

Avant-gardiste ARCITA a mis en place la semaine de 4 jours depuis longtemps déjà, le vendredi étant réservé aux heures supplémentaires en cas de surcharge d’activité.

ARCITA aime relever des défis et être précurseur, notamment : Lean management en 2011, qualité ISO en 2013, dépôt de brevet en 2015, labellisation ENVOL en 2021, industrie du futur en 2022, RSE, Marque employeur, QVT en 2023, etc...

Name: STRAND Forensic Engineering
Description:
Strand Forensic Engineering Pty Ltd is a leading provider of structural and geotechnical engineering services, specializing in forensic investigations for residential properties. With over 50 years of combined experience, our expert team is dedicated to identifying and addressing the root causes of structural damage, including issues such as foundation problems, water damage, settlement, and construction defects.

Our expertise extends to identifying design flaws, construction issues, maintenance issues and the impact of natural events like earthquakes or soil instability. We offer independent, unbiased evaluations and detailed reports, providing tailored recommendations for remedial measures to ensure the safety, integrity, and longevity of homes and buildings.

With offices in Hawthorn, Werribee, and Ferntree Gully, we proudly serve clients across Victoria, Australia, delivering expert assessments, solutions, and specialized research backed by decades of industry experience.

Services
We provide a full range of forensic engineering services for residential building owners, builders, and legal professionals:
•	Forensic Site Inspections
•	Foundation & Structural Damage Investigation
•	Expansive Soil  Testing for Site Characterization
•	Expert Advice
•	Structural Integrity Assessment
•	Expert Review Reports
•	Independent Opinions
•	Court Assistance & Expert Witness Services

Research & Development (R&D)
Strand Forensic Engineering is at the forefront of cutting-edge research in structural engineering and geotechnical design, with a particular focus on residential buildings. In partnership with Swinburne University of Technology, we are engaged in multiple research projects aimed at improving residential structure designs, particularly on expansive soils, to enhance safety and reduce the risk of damage.

VISION: Building Anchorage. Building Families.

Name: Atamate Building Intelligence
Description:
Our vision is to make buildings better! Atamate reduces energy consumption, reduces maintenance and reduces building management, while keeping occupants in a healthy, safe, secure and comfortable environment. On top of that we make buildings easier to build and use, as well as cheaper to build (or retrofit) and run. 

To do this we have built atBOS, a wireless monitoring and control system, from the ground up. Our sensors and meters measure and monitor your building. Software analyses the data generated, and uses actuators and gateways to control the devices in a building, while also sharing data via the Atamate cloud.

Our team comprises specialists in energy, health, engineering, and technology, with significant experience in construction and property. All our software is written in-house and all of our products are manufactured in the UK.

Name: RevoSteel Building
Description:
RevoSteel Building S.p.A. nasce nel 2022 con l’obiettivo di contribuire alla transizione verso un modello di edilizia sostenibile che assicuri, allo stesso tempo, il massimo benessere e comfort. 
Progettiamo e realizziamo edifici sostenibili e ad alta efficienza energetica per facilitare il passaggio ad un nuovo modo di abitare e vivere la propria casa offrendo il massimo vantaggio ambientale possibile. 

Per riuscire ad assicurare la qualità e la precisione che vogliamo distingua il nostro prodotto abbiamo deciso di organizzarci per accompagnarvi in tutte le fasi del progetto per una esperienza ed un prodotto finale unico nel suo genere. 
Non solo, abbiamo anche deciso di puntare sulla produzione delle strutture in acciaio che costituiscono l’ossatura dei nostri edifici per essere in prima linea nello studio e nell’introduzione delle innovazioni che si proporranno. 

A fianco al nostro Ufficio Tecnico e alla Gestione Cantieri abbiamo anche investito in due linee di produzioni con profilatrici specificamente progettate - da una delle aziende leader mondiali nel settore - per la realizzazione di strutture in CFS . 

L’utilizzo del Cold Formed Steel (Acciaio Profilato a Freddo) per le nostre case non è un’alternativa a cemento e mattoni ma, più semplicemente, il superamento di questi materiali per arrivare con più agilità al raggiungimento di edifici ad alte prestazioni e in linea con le sempre più specifiche richieste di legge.

Name: Aire+
Description:
VOTRE PROBLÉMATIQUE 

Vous êtes dirigeant d'entreprise, vous n'êtes ni économiste du bâtiment, ni conducteur de travaux ! Votre rôle de dirigeant est de développer l'activité de votre entreprise, et cela commence par faire des choix stratégiques qui soutiennent cette mission.

Construire ou rénover un bâtiment professionnel implique plusieurs défis :

 Naviguer dans les réglementations,
 Obtenir les autorisations, 
 Gérer les coûts,
 Résoudre les difficultés de financement, 
 Choisir des entrepreneurs fiables,
 Faire face aux délais. 
 Gérer les problèmes environnementaux, 
 Répondre aux défis de conception,
 Assurer la gestion de projet


LA SOLUTION AIRE+ 

Confier son projet à un contractant général du bâtiment offre une gestion centralisée et efficace. Cela vous garantit :

 Une coordination optimale des différents métier, 
 Un respect des délais et du budget, 
 Une qualité constante,
 De l’expertise et de l’expérience, 
 La réduction des risques,
 Moins de soucis !

NOS RÉSULTATS 

 Réduction des Coûts :
Les contractants généraux peuvent réduire les coûts globaux d’un projet de 10 à 20 % grâce à une meilleure gestion des ressources et à la négociation avec les sous-traitants.

 Respect des Délais :
L'efficacité de la gestion de projet peut améliorer le respect des délais de 30 à 40 %, évitant ainsi de coûteux retards.

 Qualité et Conformité :
Une supervision professionnelle assure une qualité de construction plus élevée et une meilleure conformité aux normes, réduisant les risques futures.

 Gestion des Risques :
La centralisation de la gestion des risques peut diminuer les incidents et les complications de 15 à 25 %.


NOTRE PARCOURS 

Depuis 17 ans, aire+ accompagne les dirigeants d'entreprises dans la conception et la réalisation des travaux de constructions ou de rénovations de leurs bâtiments. Fort de cette expertise, nous sommes aujourd'hui un acteur incontournable sur le sud-ouest.

Contamos con una planta propia ubicada en Spegazzini, equipada con tecnología de punta y un equipo técnico altamente capacitado. Esto nos permite producir internamente todas las estructuras que luego montamos, garantizando un control total de calidad en cada etapa del proceso.

Diseñamos y construimos galpones industriales, naves logísticas, entrepisos, silos, celdas, torres, pasarelas y estructuras especiales adaptadas a los requerimientos de cada proyecto. Nuestra experiencia incluye tanto obras llave en mano como adecuaciones o ampliaciones para plantas ya operativas.

Trabajamos con empresas líderes de sectores como alimentación, retail, energía, logística y agroindustria, brindando soluciones integrales que optimizan costos, mejoran tiempos de ejecución y aseguran resultados de alta performance estructural.

En Grupo Odim, creemos que cada proyecto es una oportunidad para construir relaciones duraderas, basadas en la confianza, el profesionalismo y el compromiso con el desarrollo de nuestros clientes.

Description:
Hey fellow Linkedin members! My name is Jeremy Maher and I am one of the 3 founders of Phoenix Home Remodeling.

Like most people, you want to live in a home you love and are proud to share with friends, family, and neighbors.

Working with a remodeling contractor can be frustrating because they show up late, increase the price on you, make a mess of your home which creates unnecessary stress.

Your time and mental energy are valuable and shouldn't be wasted.

When considering a remodel you’re probably asking yourself, "Will they do the job I want them to do?", "Will they do the remodel at a fair price?" and "Will they do it in a timely manner?”

It’s normal to feel overwhelmed.

No one deserves to go through those contractor nightmares like I did.  I believe homeowners deserve proper expectations and ought to be treated honestly and fairly.

I understand how hard it can be.  Like you, I have dealt with contractor nightmares in the past and it motivated me to co-found Phoenix Home Remodeling with Ben and Mark.

Why Choose Phoenix Home Remodeling?
We are an award-winning and licensed remodeling company known for showing up on time, being organized, clearly explaining all aspects of the remodel and adhering to project budget & timeline.

To avoid unorganized contractors who won’t respect you, your project or your home, schedule a free no-obligation call with us to discuss your remodel project and get free expert remodeling advice.

Name: CarbonTrace
Description:
CarbonTrace instantly converts a residential 7 star energy certificate into an upfront carbon analysis, providing a low-friction, seamless way to measure building emissions.

Portfolio organisations and individual builders can now efficiently measure their portfolio emissions, compare performance against industry benchmarks and have the data to support their ESG reporting. 
The residential market is being left behind in Australia’s decarbonisation progress, yet is a major emitter with easy wins. The ability to measure with confidence is the first step to engaging with the opportunities emerging from the shift to decarbonisation.

We are solving this, by providing a way to measure which is harmonised to industry settings and calibrated to the emerging Sustainable Finance Taxonomy. This is of particular relevance to organisations with mandatory ESG reporting requirements, who need to have accurate, transparent data to support their reporting.

Over the last few years, we’ve helped shed businesses, from small resellers to 8-figure manufacturers, move from manual quoting and fragmented systems to full automation. Whether they work with cold-formed or structural steel, our clients scale faster, cut quoting delays, and regain control of their operations.

Shedmate is the first BIM Software explicitly designed for the Shed Industry, addressing critical challenges like quoting delays, scalability issues, and customisation limitations, aligning with aspirations for growth, efficiency, and independence.

By adopting Shedmate as a premium product, your business can operate more smoothly, grow more rapidly, and achieve higher profitability. This isn’t just another software tool; it’s a real-time system that works for you, helping to reduce the labour involved in designing, quoting, and completing shed projects.

If you’re a shed builder, reseller, or manufacturer sick of waiting on engineers, juggling multiple quoting tools, or being tied to a franchise's software, Shedmate is built for you.

Our cloud-based platform lets you design, quote, and engineer sheds in real-time, whether it’s cold-formed or structural steel. That means you can give your customers instant, accurate quotes with compliant plans, cut up to 95% of drafting time, and keep your margins under your own brand.

With Shedmate, you can:
• Double your shed sales without increasing headcount
• Go from enquiry to council-ready plans in minutes
• Sell your designs your way, and own your profits
• Break free from bottlenecks, errors, and supplier restrictions

Our Big Promise: Double your shed sales profitably without new hires or franchise strings

Shedmate is more than software, it’s your always-on quoting, drafting, and engineering team in a straightforward platform.

Name: Jewett Farms + Co
Description:
In 1999, Jewett Farms + Co was started with a sole craftsman whose goal was to build the kind of cabinetry that would last a lifetime. Since then, much has changed including the number of craftsmen and the size of our cabinet shop but our commitment to excellence remains. We have an extremely high construction quality standard that is required from each and every one of our craftsmen. Attention to detail is paramount to a high quality, handcrafted product. 

Our ethos of craftsmanship is the backbone of who we are and how we build things. We see ourselves as philosophically different from those who build mass-produced products. There will never be an assembly line at Jewett Farms + Co. Each cabinet is constructed from start to finish by a single cabinetmaker, who has spent their career developing those skills. Our drawers and doors are hand fitted and hand sanded, not because it's the fastest way, but because it is the best way. 

Each piece of our cabinetry is crafted from raw materials that we source with individualized attention. We believe that true beauty lies in the details, and we take great pains to ensure that nothing is overlooked.

Jewett Farms + Co is deliberately different.
Visit the Jewett Farms + Co. New York City showroom in the thriving design community of the Flatiron district. The cabinetry in this showroom is designed and built specifically for this space, to showcase our work and bring a taste of Maine to NYC.

Our New England flagship showroom is in the heart of Boston's innovation and design district. The Boston Design Center is home to some of the country's most luxurious interior design studios. The Design Center is open to the public, and our showroom staff would love to share our space with you. 

Our showrooms are spaces for inspiration. Each display has been created to show a different idea of an aesthetic or a design element that might be right for you. We want to engage your passion and be the spark that ignites your design dreams.

Name: Central Valley Habitat for Humanity
Description:
Central Valley Habitat for Humanity is an independent affiliate of Habitat for Humanity International, the ecumenical Christian housing ministry founded by Millard and Linda Fuller in 1976. Habitat for Humanity is a global nonprofit housing organization working in nearly 1,400 communities across the United States and in 70 countries around the world. Habitat for Humanity affiliates are local Habitat for Humanity organizations that act in partnership with and on behalf of Habitat for Humanity International. Each Habitat affiliate coordinates all aspects of Habitat home building in its local area.

Habitat welcomes people from all walks of life to partner in serving families in need and creating a better community for everyone who lives here.

Central Valley Habitat for Humanity was organized in 1988 when a group of volunteers at the Bridgewater Interchurch Food Pantry became concerned about the deplorable housing conditions they saw in the community. They incorporated as a non-profit organization and were approved as a Habitat affiliate. Central Valley Habitat dedicated its first house in Grottoes in 1989.

Since then, Central Valley Habitat for Humanity has continued to build simple, decent homes for sale to low-income families at no profit and no interest in Harrisonburg and Rockingham County.

The cooperative effort between Habitat volunteers and partner families has grown to include three Habitat Campus Chapters at local schools, twenty-five Covenant Churches, and many local businesses and organizations.

Como agente rehabilitador, su objetivo es brindar servicios de alta calidad a sus clientes, para lo cual cuenta con un equipo de profesionales altamente capacitados en diversas áreas, como la arquitectura, la ingeniería y la construcción.

Además, Tramiteco es una empresa local comprometida con el desarrollo de la región, lo que le permite ofrecer un servicio más cercano y personalizado. La empresa se encarga de todo el proceso de la rehabilitación, ofreciendo un servicio tipo "llave en mano", lo que permite a los propietarios despreocuparse y dejar en manos de la empresa todo el trabajo necesario.

Tramiteco no solo ofrece servicios de rehabilitación, sino que también brinda asesoramiento y gestión en la obtención de subvenciones y ayudas económicas para la rehabilitación, como las de autoconsumo y las de desgravaciones en la renta. En este sentido, la empresa cuenta con un equipo especializado en la gestión de subvenciones y ayudas económicas, que se encarga de asesorar a los propietarios en el proceso de solicitud y trámite de las mismas, con el objetivo de conseguir el máximo beneficio económico para ellos.

Name: HusArvid AB
Description:
Vi träffar nästan alltid människor som på ett eller annat sätt lever med en dröm. En husdröm som ser olika ut från person till person. Sedan hjälper vi till att förverkliga drömmarna. Med vår erfarenhet skapar vi ett hem så nära drömmen som möjligt. Efter att vi själva 2004 gick från dröm till verklighet och startade verksamheten, har vi förverkligat många drömmar. Och nu bor de där i sina nya hem. Glada och nöjda familjer, barn och föräldrar, unga och gamla, kvinnor och män. Det är så HusArvid arbetar.

Vi letar kontinuerligt efter möjligheter att bygga i redan bebyggda, attraktiva områden. Dessutom är vi duktiga på att hitta nya områden och möjligheter. Därför hjälper vi dig gärna om du letar efter tomt. Hör av dig så hittar vi en lösning. Med vår erfarenhet av vad köpare vill ha, hur banker önskar hantera ärenden och hur kommuner ser på tomter och byggande är vi både snabba och flexibla.

Kort sagt; vi lyssnar på hur människor vill bo och leva, sätter oss ner med de bästa byggarna, arkitekterna och mäklarna och utvecklar området. Det är så vi förverkligar dina och våra drömmar om ett bättre boende.

Description:
We’re not new to the world of development, with three generations of knowledge and expertise in construction and development, we have a rich history in the industry. Our technology was first introduced to the market in the 1980s as an efficient building tech company in Iowa. Since then, we have spent the last 40+ years improving our tech and creating something that is proven to work.

Prior to our shift to residential construction, we built numerous commercial developments in the Midwest region. Our experience in commercial construction has given us a unique perspective on the building process, and we have applied this knowledge to our residential projects.

Knowledge of the housing crisis and lack of innovation in modern housing developments led us to Southern California.

Description:
Founded in 1956 by Arnold Jens Kirkegaard, AJK was established with a firm commitment to the highest quality workmanship, unerring dedication to architectural details, and always putting the client first. Throughout its long history of building the best schools, churches, and related residential buildings in the Denver metro area, AJK established a brand reputation that grew along with the Mile High City. And that still lasts today.

Scott and Jon take pride in working closely with homeowners to create a unique space that truly feels like their personal dream home. As such, the client plays an integral role in the building process—from design to completion. It's all part of the organic, hands-on approach to home building that has been at the heart of the AJK philosophy, and commitment to excellence, since the company was founded more than half a century ago.

Name: Homebuilder Ops
Description:
Homebuilder Ops is the leading HubSpot CRM and sales consulting partner for homebuilders.

We specialize in helping residential homebuilders increase the number of homes you sell each year using the right lead management process, sales automation, and reporting framework.

Builders work with Homebuilder Ops for three reasons.

#1) My Sales Follow-Up Process is the Wild West: 
Builders have leads coming in, but little visibility into their sales pipeline, follow-up activity, and where leads are getting stuck.

#2) I’m Not Getting the ROI I was Promised: 
Builders invested time, money and energy into setting up HubSpot for their specific sales process and team and it is still just not right. They can’t trust their data, their sales team is not using it, and the executive team is not getting the ROI they were promised.

#3) My Sales Team Rolls Their Eyes When I Mention HubSpot: 
Builders are considering HubSpot’s sales and marketing platform, but don’t want to suffer through 18-months of trial and error. They want expert help rolling out HubSpot right the first time to avoid false starts, losing the sales team’s buy-in, and creating a clunky sales system.

If you are focused on sales growth and fit one of the scenarios above, we would love to see if you are a fit for Homebuilder Ops.

We’re building a better way of living for over 55s. We don’t just build homes, we build vibrant communities. Our homeowners and communities are at the heart of everything that we do.

We believe that retirement living should be healthy, happy, and within easy reach of everyone. There’s a happier and healthier life through shared ownership with Platinum Skies.

Our vision is to create vibrant communities that provide a happy, healthy lifestyle and a sense of belonging. Through shared ownership, our homeowners have a home that meets their needs now and in the future, with financial certainty, so they can afford to live well.

The Team

Our streamlined approach focuses on thorough consultation and planning stages, combined with transparent communication from start to finish. We put the homeowners’ experience first and aim to deliver a stress-free and enjoyable renovation you can be proud to show off.

Working with Sharon Giblett and her Tauranga Refresh team (Diamond NZ Ltd) and their network of talented industry professionals means you can trust your renovation will be completed with the highest level of craftsmanship and care.

Throughout this process, one of our local Tauranga Renovation Consultants will be your single point of contact, coordinating everything from reliable contractors and suppliers to consents. From kitchens, bathrooms and laundries, through to additions, extensions and home makeovers, we’ll work hard on your behalf to monitor and manage your schedule and budgets, keeping you updated every step of the way.

Change the way you renovate; renovate the Refresh way.
Sharon Giblett is Franchise Owner of Diamond NZ Limited, a franchisee of Renovation Franchise Ltd, doing business across the wider Tauranga area in the Bay of Plenty.

Door dit uitgebreide netwerk hebben wij een goede onderhandelingspositie. Ook kun je bij ons meeprofiteren van de schaalvoordelen van Fabrikade, zodat je echt de beste prijs op de markt krijgt. Wij nemen namelijk jaarlijks grote volumes af, waardoor wij stevige kortingen, gratis transport en snelle levertijden genieten. Door onze jarenlange samenwerkingen met onze partners en door de juiste contacten binnen die bedrijven kunnen wij snel schakelen, dingen voor elkaar krijgen en een ongeëvenaarde prijs-kwaliteitverhouding bieden.

➦ Doordat de productie elders in Europa plaatsvindt kunnen wij zeer concurrerende prijzen aanbieden.

➦ Bezoek onze showroom. We adviseren je graag en we maken samen de juiste keuzes in de samenstelling en alle productmogelijkheden.

➦ Wij vergelijken meerdere fabrikant-leveranciers uit ons netwerk.

➦ Wij onderhandelen met de leveranciers en leggen jou de beste optie voor. Allemaal nog steeds vrijblijvend.

➦ Jij wordt ontzorgd en ontvangt de beste prijs op de markt. Daarbij blijven wij ook de hoge kwaliteit garanderen.

➦ De producten worden gratis en snel geleverd bij jou op locatie. Eventueel monteren wij deze ook.

GNB Contracting provides general construction contracting services including turnkey projects, interior fit-outs, site improvements, remodels, and renovations. More specifically GNB Contracting specializes in fire and water damage restoration, emergency repairs and refurbishments, exterior work, interior renovations, and waterproofing. 

We provide a diverse range of specialized support services to our clients in the harsh 24 hours a day, 7 days a week environment. Essential maintenance and turnaround services provided by GNB Contracting minimize unit downtime and are essential to helping clients preserve operating efficiency and profitability. We work with the insurance company, but not for the insurance company, because our commitment is to you, the property owner, and your needs.

Name: JK CONSTRUCTION
Description: JK Construction c'est la garantie d'un projet immobilier clé en main : recherche de votre terrain, conseil sur la typologie et les plans de votre futur maison, gestion des démarches administratives, dépôt et obtention du permis de construire, coordination et gestion des entreprises travaux. Et enfin, la livraison de votre bien avec toutes les finitions.

Name: Segmento Engenharia Ltda
Description: A metodologia desenvolvida pela SEGMENTO ENGENHARIA na implantação das soluções, aliada às suas técnicas de planejamento, permite que a empresa ofereça garantia contratual de preços e prazos.

Name: InCUBE Project EU
Description: InCUBE brings together 23 high-profile partners and two affiliated entities from 7 European countries. The project is funded by the European Union’s ‘Horizon Europe Research & Innovation programme’ and envisions to unlock the EU renovation wave through cutting-edge standardized, lean integrated processes based on industrialization, innovative self-RES power producing and storage technologies, digitalization and new market entrants. All while accounting for social inclusion, upskilling and enhancement of women’s role in the construction industry. The InCUBE solutions will be validated in 3 large-scale demo sites: Zaragoza (ES), Trento (IT) and Groningen (NL).

Name: Westbury
Description:
Each and every Westbury garden room is individually designed and constructed by our own expert team who bring each vision into form. 

We have established over our 35 years an impressive reputation for creating beautiful and functional glazed buildings, with durability and longevity in both their design and product.  Whether it is a timber orangery, garden room, pool house or traditional conservatory, each of our glazed buildings are sympathetic to the architecture of the property, ensuring satisfaction of homeowners, architects, planning authorities and conservation officers alike.

Our experienced designers and technicians have extensive architectural knowledge, they use this alongside the latest CAD and 3D software to design accurate drawings to support architects, specifiers and builders.

Throughout this process we are conscious of the environment impact caused by using natural products and therefore choose to use eco-friendly materials, energy saving techniques and minimise our waste, in order to build in the most sustainable and responsible way possible.

Operating since 1988, Westbury has built a reputation for design, quality and innovation, transforming ordinary houses into extraordinary homes.

Name: Cegelec Bourgogne
Description: CEGELEC Bourgogne, société du groupe VINCI Energies propose l’ensemble des services liés aux installations électriques sur les bâtiments tertiaires, l’hôtellerie, le logement et la coque industrielle.

Name: Conteco construction
Description:
Chez CONTECO, nous redéfinissons les standards de la construction avec une approche avant-gardiste et durable. En tant que start-up industrielle innovante, nous sommes spécialisés dans le secteur de la construction hors site, transformant les défis actuels en opportunités tangibles.

Dans un contexte de forte pression sur les ressources et les infrastructures, nous exploitons le potentiel inexploré des containers maritimes pour répondre aux besoins croissants en logements. Notre expertise unique nous permet de réemployer ces structures robustes et modulaires pour créer des solutions immobilières diversifiées : logements étudiants, logements sociaux, studios additionnels, et bien plus encore.

Notre mission ? Décarboner le secteur de la construction tout en accélérant la production de logements grâce à des solutions novatrices. En adoptant des techniques de construction hors site et en industrialisant les processus, nous minimisons l’empreinte carbone, augmentons l'efficacité, la productivité et la qualité, tout en réduisant les déchets et les nuisances sur les chantiers.

 Avec CONTECO, chaque projet immobilier devient un exemple d'ingéniosité et de responsabilité environnementale. Rejoignez-nous pour construire un avenir plus vert et plus intelligent.

Name: ISM Modular Homes
Description: Tetris Homes are built using our advanced pre-manufactured fast build technology. based on a steel structure insulated system with a masonry finish.

Name: Swiss Constructions (Pty) Ltd
Description:
At Swiss Constructions, we specialize in crafting high-quality, sustainable living spaces designed to meet your unique needs. With a commitment to trust, innovation, and precision, we deliver projects that stand the test of time.

Our expert architects and project managers take a forward-thinking approach, ensuring seamless execution from planning to completion, always balancing cost-efficiency and superior craftsmanship.

As an NHBRC-registered construction and development company based in Somerset West, we are fully equipped with our own fleet and expert team, enabling us to complete projects on time, within budget, and to the highest standards.

Whether you’re building a home or a commercial space, Swiss Constructions is your trusted partner in construction excellence.

Name: RISE HOMES
Description:
RISE Homes are Renewable, Innovative, Smart and Efficient. Rise is a forward thinking company dedicated to redefining residential living by leveraging computational design and ai to efficiently design, manufacture and construct our homes. We aim at integrating smart technology, energy efficiency, and aesthetic beauty into every home. At the heart of our philosophy is a commitment to sustainability and innovation, ensuring that each home we design is not only a haven of comfort and style but also a testament to environmental responsibility.

Our homes are crafted with cutting edge eco-friendly materials and equipped with advanced smart home technologies, offering unparalleled efficiency and ease of living. We believe in creating spaces that are not just houses, but homes that nurture and inspire. From energy saving features to contemporary designs, every aspect of a RISE Home is carefully considered to enhance the quality of life for its inhabitants while minimizing the ecological footprint.

Join us on our mission to build a brighter, greener future, one home at a time. With RISE Homes, you're not just building a house; you're crafting a legacy of sustainable living and aesthetic elegance.

Name: JOPS.LTD
Description: JOPS LTD is a leading commercial contracting and construction company, specializing in delivering innovative solutions for diverse construction and contracting projects. With decades of industry experience, we combine proven expertise with cutting-edge global technologies to ensure highly precise, well-planned services across all phases of project execution. Our commitment to quality and modern engineering practices enables us to deliver exceptional results tailored to meet the evolving needs of our clients.

Name: SS Group of Companies Ltd
Description:
SS Group of Companies Ltd , Family owned group of development companies founded in 96 and is UK based, organically evolved and grown exponentially into a modern dynamic practice which has merged all of its real estate businesses in 2012 which incorporate directors and shareholders from varied sectors  within the automotive, legal, real estate and development backgrounds.

Our heritage dates back to the the 90's the group founded in 96 saw a gap in the market for high end developments in both Solihull and Birmingham and built an enviable reputation in building high quality elegant and luxury new homes.

Founded with the aim of designing , planning , building and managing residential developments that was far better that the standards being produced across the country at the time, and that ethos still resonates today. 

"SS Group are heavily focussed on building new homes across the UK under their Seclusive Brands" 

It is still, and always be, the standard of design and build that sets them apart and aim is to produce Innovative and modern homes with character; building by modern and traditional construction. 

With an unequalled 100% planning success rate over the last 5 years, the group put it down to developing strong relationships with all key stake holders and sympathetic understanding to sites surroundings; with a proven track record in developing luxury homes, student schemes, apartments suitable for PRS to modular homes suitable for the governments plans to build homes quickly for the current social housing demand.
 
From Inception to completion we have experts in the following areas, architecture, design, planning, construction, development and new homes sales.

SS Group of Companies Ltd and the Seclusive brands are the fastest growing real estate development companies in the Midlands, operating across the residential, commercial and hospitality sectors

Name: MMC Eco Homes
Description: At MMC Eco Homes, we build better homes for a brighter, greener future.

Name: VPP System
Description: Småländska VPP System tillverkar och säljer uterum, skjutdörrar, vikdörrar och andra glaspartier med stort fokus på designfrihet. Från oisolerade glaspartier till fullt isolerade glasfasader. Varje produkt i valfri kulör och mått - oavsett bredd eller höjd. Vi är Schüco Partner och tillverkare.

Name: Community Builders NJ, Inc.
Description:
Community Builders NJ, Inc. is a construction and facility management firm dedicated to meeting the needs of a modern workforce and clientele through modern day approaches to solving complex issues.  We are dedicated to our community, our teammates, our clients, and our industry partners based upon our values of Forthrightness, Authenticity, Momentum & Efficiency, Conviction, and Excellence.

At the heart of every structure we build lies a commitment to our teammates, clients, partners, and community.  Our method is founded on both creative problem solving and a pledge to client satisfaction.  It integrates transparent systems and disciplined processes resulting in a record of predictably delivering exceptional results.  Our method is what makes us the builders of choice for those who seek excellence in construction and partners dedicated to creating lasting value for the clients and communities we serve.

Name: Roof MRI
Description:
It’s time moisture scanning actually makes sense. 

Simple, fast, and seamlessly integrated into your bidding process. We’re proud to offer the first moisture scan ever designed specifically for commercial roofing, giving contractors a clear edge before bids even go out.

With our technology, you gain the power to pinpoint whether insulation must be torn off, spot replaced, dried out, or left alone. This restores R-value and preserves your client’s investment. No more guesswork, no more padding quotes, and no more slashing prices just to stay competitive. By bringing a reliable moisture scan into the early stages of planning, you can install better systems and do right by the environment, the client, and your bottom line.

Key Benefits:

• Faster, Smarter Bidding: Identify real needs up front so you can deliver accurate proposals.

• Better Installations: Make informed decisions on materials, eliminating costly surprises.

• Competitive Advantage: Stand out from the pack by showing you’re committed to true solutions, not just the cheapest price.

Stop leaving moisture detection to chance. Discover how data-driven insights can help you win more bids, boost profitability, and deliver peace of mind. This is what commercial roofing has been missing.

Name: MONACOR GROUP
Description:
Monacor started its activity in 2006 with two people having 20 years of extensive professional experience in different aspect of construction industry.

We are specialized in finishing residential and commercial multi family projects from small size to medium and large size developments.

Our extensive experience and back ground has given us this ability to start and finish any project sized in a quality and timely manner. To service our community we will welcome any size project, big or small.

Name: HousePro
Description:
At HousePro, we make home improvement simple, fast, and reliable. Based in Cherry Hill, NJ and serving homeowners across Southern New Jersey, we deliver high-quality results on time and on budget.

Our services include:

Roofing & Siding
Kitchen & Bathroom Remodeling
Flooring, Decks & Porches
Painting & Interior Upgrades
Home Additions 

From free, no-obligation estimates to clear financing options, HousePro is your one-stop partner for turning your house into the home you’ve always wanted.

Name: Siesta Homes Group S.L.
Description: Siesta Homes is a boutique developer of finely crafted homes and living concepts in Marbella. The tools of our trade are creativity, innovation, sustainable development and know-how. The result is a growing legacy of ever-better projects.

Name: G2 Builders, Inc.
Description:
At G2 Builders, we’re passionate about creating homes that feel safe, welcoming, and built to last. For us, this work is more than just a job—it’s a way of giving back to the community we love, remodeling spaces with the same quality we’d want for our own families.

Our story began over 40 years ago when Carlos first got into remodeling to support his family. Over the years, this work became his passion, leading to a lifetime of craftsmanship and dedication. Jacob, a Northern Virginia native, joined his father after college, and together, we developed a company we hope to pass down to the next generation—Jasper and Harper.

With deep roots in family and community, we’re driven to create lasting homes and meaningful relationships. Jacob’s love for craftsmanship is rivaled only by his love for cars—a passion he shares with his kids through car shows and a shared Hot Wheels collection. Building and remodeling homes with character and quality is a family tradition for us, and we bring that same dedication to every project.

The G2 Difference
When you work with G2 Builders, you’ll be working directly with us from start to finish. We don’t just own the company; we’re on-site, hands-on, and committed to bringing your vision to life with the highest standards of quality.

Ready to build something lasting? Let’s bring your vision to life together.

Name: Rhythm Homes
Description:
Rhythm Homes was registered in 2020, is classified as a Major Builder and a member of the Housing Industry Australia (HIA) and Masters Builder Association (MBA).
Rhythm Homes services the external agent channel and has a vast network of agent partners that market to investors. The Rhythm Homes product offering is designed to generate high yields and are purchased with a level of inclusions that consider future tenancy, return on investment and low maintenance.
Rhythm Homes is committed to building strong relationships with our External Agents. Our streamlined processes ensure the home buying journey is a transparent and seamless experience, our honest and open approach, timeframe guarantees, and upfront certainty pricing means our customers can relax as we build their new home.
We offer a “Tenant Ready” including landscaping, fencing, blinds, clothesline, letterbox and even a TV antenna - ready for the investors to earn a return immediately after settlement.
Rhythm Homes’ unique selling features set us apart from our competitors.

Name: ECRIN AURA
Description:
Nos équipes d’experts vous accompagnent et vous conseillent dans la réalisation de l’entretien, la maintenance, la réparation et la sécurisation des toitures et des façades de vos bâtiments.

Permettant ainsi d’offrir à ses clients un partenariat de qualité à forte valeur ajoutée. 1	Le respect strict des règles de sécurité
2	La ponctualité sur les chantiers
3	La réactivité et l’assiduité
4	Un interlocuteur unique de proximité
5	Le suivi et préconisations d’actions correctives
ECRIN GROUPE s’engage à vos côtés pour la préservation de votre investissement.

Name: Shaw Construction Inc.
Description:
Design and construction is a communication process of aligning goals and meeting expectations. We execute this process with energy and excellence, delivering an exceptional experience throughout your project.

Building Excellence
Drawing on a history that spans almost five decades, we have honed our skills to deliver unparalleled construction services. From concept to completion, we are dedicated to achieving excellence in every detail, ensuring your vision is exceeded. A principal is involved in every project to ensure you receive unparalleled service and value. Our projects range from small-scale renovations to significant, complex developments, showcasing the versatility of our team and the breadth of our capabilities.

Client-Centric Approach
Relationships are the cornerstone of our business. We believe in transparent communication, collaboration, and a hands-on approach. Our clients are partners; we work together to turn ideas into tangible, remarkable spaces.

Values: Integrity | Service | Teamwork | Communication | Innovation
These are ingrained in every aspect of our work, from innovative design solutions to meticulous construction. Shaw Construction raises the bar for excellence in the industry.

As a family-owned and operated commercial construction services and general contracting firm, we bring a unique blend of expertise, passion, and commitment to every project.

Name: Ecoparque Bairros Integrados
Description:
A Ecoparque Bairros Integrados adota um sistema construtivo revolucionário para o Brasil. Os apartamentos saem prontos de sua fábrica de prédios, inclusive escadas e banheiros, e são montados como um lego no canteiro de obras, o que dá celeridade e à construção.

Prédios de 15 andares são totalmente instalados em apenas 180 dias.
A fábrica de Cascavel, com 200.000 m2 entre área construída coberta e pátios operacionais com pontes rolantes, já está em testes e será
inaugurada oficialmente no dia 23 de FEV 2024. Altamente robotizada com equipamentos da Alemanha, pode produzir até 5 mil apartamentos por ano, com qualidade impecável, atendendo canteiros de obras distantes até 300 km de Cascavel.

Name: IFP - Incorporadora Ferreira Pinto
Description:
Fundada por Aires de Oliveira Pinto, em 1971, a Incorporadora Ferreira Pinto – IFP atua no mercado de Pernambuco há 54 anos, tendo como missão promover empreendimentos imobiliários diferenciados e que superam as expectativas de clientes e investidores.

Ao longo de todo esse período, foi entregue um vasto portfólio de empreendimentos, tendo em comum entre eles a localização privilegiada, a inovação dos projetos de arquitetura e ambientação, a excelência de qualidade aplicada em todas as etapas da construção e o alto padrão de acabamento, perceptível em cada detalhe. Diferenciais que proporcionam uma entrega de mais valor aos clientes.

Trabalhando a partir de normas e conceitos fundamentados no cumprimento de compromissos firmados, na melhoria da qualidade do habitat e na modernização produtiva, somando a isso a aplicação de práticas sustentáveis em cada um dos nossos projetos.

Name: INNOVAMETALL GmbH
Description:
Unser Anspruch ist es, neue Perspektiven für kommende Generationen durch nachhaltige Wertschöpfung zu schaffen. Wir glauben daran, dass echte Stärke durch die kluge Nutzung erneuerbarer Energien und durch lokale Zusammenarbeit entsteht. Wir wollen ein Modell etablieren, das Sicherheit, Demokratie und Unabhängigkeit bietet.

Die Art, wie wir bauen und uns fortbewegen, soll in Zukunft eine deutliche Verbesserung des derzeitigen Standards darstellen. Die Sonne bietet uns unendliche Energie - mit der wir unseren Lebensstandard erhalten und verbessern können, ohne fossile Ressourcen zu verbrauchen.

Unsere Lösungen nutzen bereits vorhandene Flächen wie Gebäude und Parkplätze, um Energie zu erzeugen, zu speichern und sinnvoll zu verteilen. So werden Gebäude und die Mobilität klimaneutral, und die Betriebskosten sinken.

Wir legen bei unseren Lösungen großen Wert auf Mehrfachnutzen und ein ansprechendes Design. Ein Beispiel ist unser sybkon Anbaubalkon-System, das neben der Wertsteigerung auch den klimaneutralen Betrieb der Immobilie sichert. Mit dem Solar Sky Park Park, werden einfache Parkplätze zu leistungsstarken Ladeparks mit umfassenden Mobilitätslösungen.

In unserer Branche unübertroffen und einzigartig ist unser vielfältiges Leistungsspektrum. Die umfassende Herangehensweise und unsere Expertise sorgt für Vertrauen bei unseren Partner:innen und Kund:innen.

Unsere Produkte und Dienstleistungen umfassen unter anderem:
 Modulare, vorgefertigte Balkone, die technisch einfach umsetzbar sind 
 Modulare PV-Parkplatzüberdachungen inklusive Ladeinfrastruktur - ohne Netzausbau und aufwändige Bautätigkeiten
 Software für Energiemanagement und Mobilitätsinfrastruktur
 Langjährige Expertise im Bereich Sanierung Mehrfamilienhäuser, Balkonbau, Haltestelleninfrastruktur

Name: Forage Gareau Cie Ltee
Description: Depuis 1975, nous sommes les spécialistes dans le domaine du sciage et forage de murs, planchers et rues en béton. Le moins que l’on puisse dire, c’est que notre réputation nous précède. Notre expertise est reconnue partout dans le milieu de la construction.

L'entreprise VENTURA.N intervient pour de nombreux groupes tel que : EQUANS, VINCI ENERGIE, BALAS, EIFFAGE ou encore SPIE.

Nous sommes une entreprise au Savoir-Faire centenaire qui conçoit et fabrique sur mesure l'enveloppe de votre bâtiment ainsi que 100% de vos agencements...vous découvrirez ici nos réalisations et notre actualité ! 

48 collaborateurs engagés derrière le projet de l'entreprise dont les piliers stratégiques sont "son Savoir-Faire, sa Créativité et son Organisation".

Nous possédons 3 ateliers intégrés et situés dans le vignoble proche de Nantes dans lesquels nous fabriquons, à partir de différentes essences de bois et du métal, 100% de nos fabrications.

From planning and modeling to execution, Profundes ensures every project reflects quality, creativity, and reliability.

Description:
Just some of the benefits using Modfloor for your next project:

Cost effective - up to 33% cheaper than traditional bases

Easy assembly - joists simply connect to bearers, eliminating the need for welding.  Lighter components eliminate the need for hot rolled steel

Design - can be designed to suit virtually any type of of foundation system

Service holes - pre-punched holes allowing the installation of plumbing and electrical services

10 year corrosion warranty

Name: Global Home Improvements
Description:
Global Home Improvements is an Irish family-run business, celebrating 45 years of transforming Irish homes for the future. We design, manufacture and expertly install bespoke windows, doors, roofline and flat roofing. We offer an unmatched aftercare & support service including 20 Year Unlimited Guarantee, 10 Year Home Security Promise and Global 365 Emergency Assist Service - 24/7 emergency cover, 365 days of the year. 

At Global Home Improvements, we're all about you.

Description:
Ohana Design & Build is a high-end custom home building, architecture and interior design firm with extensive experience in the U.S. and abroad. Approachable and deeply knowledgeable, our team embraces a holistic approach that puts our clients’ needs and perspectives first.

Ohana Design & Build is a subsidiary of Ohana Real Estate Investors.

Name: Charybdis Developments Limited
Description:
Since forming in early 2013 Charybdis Developments has quickly established itself as a first-class developer within the private property market in Surrey. Constructing unique homes for the discerning client as well as the speculative marketplace our philosophy is to provide the best solution for a residential development delivered to the highest standards.

Principally focused on high-end luxury homes Charybdis have consistently exceeded benchmark sales values for high-end luxury houses. A sure sign of the quality of workmanship and attention to detail that we have become known for over the last 9 years, 2022 saw us rewarded for our hard work with an award from SME for best luxury developer.

With a strong client build and continued private commission works, Charybdis also completed another landmark commission on the exclusive Crown Estate last year and has 6 projects currently underway across North Surrey with a combined GDV well in excess of £60 million.

Headed by Managing Director James Prichard BSc Eng, Charybdis Developments team of experienced professionals calls on an unrivalled pool of experience in the construction of prime residential properties. That experience underpins our ability to tackle large residential projects that involve complex building techniques and engineered solutions. Often engaged at the planning stage of a project we will also draw on our experience to ensure that cost and time-effective proposals are evolved from the outset reducing risk exposure for clients and development partners alike in the construction phase of the project.

Name: Heartland Property Developers
Description: We create smart custom homes. As a developer, builder and owner, we are able to simplify the buying process. Shaping your dream home is meant to be a special experience. Our approach sets us apart from other developers who rely solely on agents. With us, you'll have a dedicated assistant guiding you through every step, from the start of the journey to move-in day, and beyond.

Name: Wilman Infra Projects Pvt. Ltd.

Since 2017, Wilman Infra Project Private Limited has executed many projects. Since then, the company has continued to deliver the best value in construction services by placing expert construction professionals on all their projects. Wilman Infra Project Private Limited’s success over the past 5 years is due to its employees’ dedication to excellent work, customer service that exceeds expectations, and a safety program that has led to millions of zero-accident hours. Honesty and open communication have empowered Wilman Infra Project Private Limited’s workforce since day one, and it shows in our work.
The company has successfully completed the construction of houses, schools, community centres, warehouses, etc. during the last 5 years. Similarly, the company has also completed residential and commercial complexes in Uttar Pradesh. The company has a team of experienced technical and non-technical staff, a force of skilled and unskilled labour, and various equipment, machinery, and vehicles required for the construction work..

Our vision is to uncover hidden potential—where prime location, market timing, and bespoke design intersect—and transform it through discerning acquisitions, sophisticated renovations, and impeccable execution.

Nos équipes d’experts vous accompagnent et vous conseillent dans la réalisation de l’entretien, la maintenance, la réparation et la sécurisation des toitures et des façades de vos bâtiments.

Description:
Family-owned and operated business that specializes in kitchen cabinet refacing. 

Cabinet refacing is one of the most innovative and efficient ways to transform the look of your kitchen — just don’t confuse it with the old-school cabinet refinishing where cabinet doors were removed, painted and then re-installed.

Simply put, when our team of professionals REFACE your cabinets, we replace all of the exterior parts of the cabinet. We can add new doors, drawer fronts, gables, knobs, and hinges — all at a more affordable cost than a full cabinet replacement. You can expect to pay roughly 50% less than a full remodel, so cabinet refacing is a great option when you want to remodel your kitchen.

Name: LM Rengøring
Description:
I en verden, hvor hvert minut tæller, forstår vi hos LM Rengøring vigtigheden af øjeblikkelig respons og upåklagelig service. Når du ringer, er vi der for dig med løsninger og et lyttende øre. Vi træder ikke blot ind som din rengøringsservice - vi bliver en del af dit team, dedikeret til at rette op på selv de mindste fejl og sikre, at alt er præcist som du ønsker det.

Det, der virkelig adskiller os, er vores urokkelige passion for at finde den rette løsning, skræddersyet til dine unikke behov. Vi bringer ro i dit sind ved ikke bare at tage ansvar for vores arbejde, men ved at gå et skridt videre – vi tænker ud af boksen for at sikre de mest innovative og effektive rengøringsmetoder er i spil.

Typiske opgaver:
- Grov rengøring
- Slut rengøring
- Finish rengøring
- Vinduespolering
- Kontorrengøring
- Trappevask
- Skurvogne
- Byggepladsservice

Vores kunder værdsætter det behagelige samarbejde, den tydelige og konkrete kommunikation, og den måde vi overgår forventningerne på. Vi er fleksible og stabile – en kombination, der sikrer, at hvert eneste ønske imødekommes med professionalisme og et smil. Ærlighed ligger i vores grundværker - vi er ikke for alle, men for dem, vi er for, stræber vi efter at være de allerbedste.

Med LM Rengøring kan du stole på, at vi leverer – ikke kun renlighed, men også en positiv attitude og et drive, der overskygger alt andet. Vores mål er ikke at være endnu et rengøringsfirma. 

Vi ønsker at være din hustler i renhedens verden, der sikrer at ingen stikkontakt, ingen krog eller krinkelkrog bliver overset. Vi er alle sammen en del af denne vision – uanset sprog eller baggrund, du er garanteret den samme kvalitet og respekt.
