Name: Ginosko Modular
Description:
Ginosko Modular is something entirely new: the industry’s first true one-stop shop provider for the construction and development of affordable multifamily housing. As a vertically integrated company built to leverage unmatched efficiencies to deliver affordable, accessible, and appealing modular housing solutions, Ginosko Modular produces high-quality 3D volumetric components at its custom-designed 105,000-square-foot production facility in Romulus, Michigan. The state-of-the-art facility enables Ginosko Modular to use assembly-line-style production efficiency and unlock seamless structural and operational synergies with the potential to shape the future of affordable multifamily construction.

THE ADVANTAGES
•	Ginosko Modular’s cutting-edge manufacturing facility allows the company to control approximately 60% of its production costs, eliminating many of the substantial markups in traditional construction supply chains. 

•	Ginosko Modular’s innovative production processes makes it possible to build faster and get to market quicker, also reducing financing costs.

•	By relying on an in-house team of skilled professionals, Ginosko Modular is able to mitigate the risks and costs associated with a growing skilled labor shortage.

•	Vertical integration resolves construction tolerances and connectivity issues, simplifying scheduling and sequencing for tighter timelines. The result is a speedier and more efficient production and assembly process ideally suited to meet the construction challenges of our time.

•	With this facility, Ginosko Modular is not only helping to bring the construction industry into the 21st century, it’s simultaneously addressing a persistent affordable housing shortage and decreasing the cost burden for renters.

Name: Wohnbaugenossenschaft wagnis
Description:
Im Jahr 2000 wurde die Wohnbaugenossenschaft wagnis gegründet. Heute gehören zu wagnis ca. 4.300 Mitglieder, acht realisierte Projekte in München mit rund 650 Wohneinheiten, sowie ein Projekt im Bau in Augsburg und ein Projekt in Vorbereitung in Freising. 

Genossenschaftliches Wohnen bei der wagnis heißt, dass die Bewohner*innen von Anfang an Einfluss darauf haben, was in ihrem Projekt geschieht - sei es das Leitbild des Projekts zu entwickeln oder zu überlegen wie die Gemeinschaftsräume genutzt und eingerichtet werden. Die Wohnprojekte sind selbstorganisierte und selbstverwaltete Hausgemeinschaften Das gesamte Projekt ist Gemeinschaftseigentum der Mitglieder. Sie besitzen ein lebenslanges Wohnrecht und zahlen auf Dauer günstige Mieten. 

Impressum: https://www.wagnis.org/impressum.html

Използваме авангардни технологии и екологични материали, за да създадем енергийно ефективни и рентабилни сгради, които допринасят за по-добра околна среда.

Ние вярваме, че всеки човек заслужава да живее в удобен и красив дом и затова се фокусираме върху създаването на изключителни жилищни пространства, които отразяват стила и ценностите на нашите клиенти. 

Независимо дали търсите уютен апартамент или просторен семеен дом, ние имаме набор от опции, които да отговарят на вашите нужди. Апартаментите, които предлагаме са подходящи както за живеене, така и за инвестиция.

Присъединете се към нас в изграждането на бъдещето на изключителни жилищни пространства.

Name: Climate Resilience Co
Description:
"Climate Resilience Co." operates in the environmental and sustainability industry, focusing on providing solutions and strategies to enhance climate resilience and adaptability for communities, businesses, and ecosystems. This includes services related to sustainable infrastructure, buildings' assets, climate impact assessments, and innovative adaptation measures.

Climate Resilience Co. is the first company in Egypt and the Middle East specifically in climate resilience. 'Resilience' doesn't just mean avoiding risky areas. Climate Resilience Co. uses a combination of physical risk modeling and machine learning to show how various climate challenges will impact physical spaces - helping real estate companies, building societies and banks figure out the future of their portfolios. to help stakeholders command their investment toward climate-resilient regions by predicting high hazard index under various climate change scenarios based on scientific reasons over 100 years. As well as producing digital platforms for climate hazard and risk by integrated approach framework to resilience assessment of the building's assets, community, and help the individual's building already in the high hazard area to avoid the hazards.

Name: The Brent Hull Companies
Description:
Everyday we pursue a passion for craft. We glean inspiration from master builders of the past and the way things used to be built. Dedication to distinguished craftsmanship, fine classical millwork and high-end construction is our business ethos. Building beautiful, timeless houses, ranches and estates is the promise we make to our discerning clients.

Brent Hull is an award-winning master builder. He is an expert in historically accurate architectural millwork and moldings and his work is in nationally registered properties and homes across the country. In the early 1990’s he studied Historic Preservation at the prestigious North Bennet Street School in Boston and learned the art of traditional building. He returned to North Texas in 1993 and started his business in the garage of a 1911 Bungalow.

Over the past 30 years, the Brent Hull Companies have received numerous awards, including ICAA John Staub and Traditional Builder Palladio Awards. Brent is an author, designer, speaker, consultant and teacher. He loves to read, sketch and spend time with his family. His greatest professional aim is to help everyone who desires to build better and more beautifully to do so.

Name: Bisinella
Description:
A national award winning family-run business, Bisinella Developments has a proud 59 year history of successful residential and industrial development in the Geelong region.

In 1953, nine-year-old Lino Bisinella migrated to Australia from Italy with his family. They settled in Little River and then Norlane.

A plasterer by trade, Lino was working for himself by the age of 19 and took on his first full-time employee in October 1964. A decade later, the enterprising post-war migrant was employing a workforce of 45 at his plasterboard factory in Corio.

Over the years, the business has grown and diversified into Bisinella Developments as we know it today – one of the region’s largest local land development company.

Bisinella has a proud history of facilitating investment and generating jobs in the region.

Since he started, Lino, Bisinella’s managing director, has provided direct and indirect employment for thousands of local people on the company’s industrial and residential projects. 

The family business employs 18 staff and has more than 75 contractors and consultants working on Bisinella projects throughout the Geelong region on any given work day.

Lino’s first residential subdivision went on the market in 1990 and since then he has developed estates, totalling thousands of lots, across the Geelong region.

Bisinella’s successful formula is to provide high quality real estate, urban design and community infrastructure and back it up with exemplary customer service.

Name: SwiftWall
Description:
SwiftWall is a nationwide leader in innovative temporary wall solutions for events, offices, and construction projects across the U.S. With distributors and dealers nationwide, we provide sales, rentals, and installations of modular wall systems that empower you to Create, Transform, and Divide Any Space with unmatched simplicity and quality.

Our Product Lineup:
•	SwiftWall Pro: Heavy-duty barriers for tough construction and industrial applications.
•	SwiftWall Max: Non-combustible and secure, meeting high safety standards.
•	SwiftWall Flex: Flexible and reconfigurable for evolving workspaces and healthcare.
•	SwiftWall Lite: Lightweight, cost-effective, and quick to install in commercial spaces.
•	SwiftWall Click: Tool-free assembly for rapid setup and easy reconfiguration.

Our patented modular systems simplify and accelerate installation, delivering professional-grade results without the need for skilled labor. Designed to meet the highest standards of safety and performance, SwiftWall products are reusable, reconfigurable, and durable, ideal for construction sites, dynamic workspaces, healthcare facilities, and more. They meet ASTM E-84 Class A/C and ICRA Class IV/V standards, with noise reduction capabilities of up to 50%, making them perfect for creating quiet environments in busy areas.

Key Benefits:
•	Fast & Simple Installation: Panels click together seamlessly in minutes.
•	No Skilled Labor Needed: Anyone can assemble, disassemble, or reconfigure.
•	Reusable & Reconfigurable: Adaptable to changing project needs, saving time and resources.
•	Professional Quality: Engineered for strength, stability, and reliability.
•	Lightweight & Durable: Built for robust performance in various applications.

At SwiftWall, we believe there’s a better way to install walls—one that’s sustainable, efficient, and adaptable. From multi-phase projects to large event spaces and industrial applications, SwiftWall makes transforming your space easy and impactful.

Description:

VI SKAPER BEDRE HJEM
Retten til et trygt og godt sted å bo er beskrevet i FNs bærekraftsmål og er et viktig fundament for å sikre den enkelte et godt liv.

Vi skaper bedre hjem. Ved å være best på det vi gjør og ha våre kunder, ansatte og samfunnet i fokus skaper vi bedre hjem.

ANSVARLIG
Vi er sannferdige, forutsigbare og rause. Tar ansvar for hverandre og samfunnet vi lever i.

NYTENKENDE
Vi utfordrer etablerte sannheter og er ikke redd for å gjøre feil. Skaperkraft og innovasjon ligger i vår natur.

UTHOLDENDE
Vi slår oss aldri til ro og tror på kontinuerlig forbedring.

SAMFUNNSANSVAR
Vi tar samfunnsansvar gjennom hvordan vi planlegger og gjennomfører våre prosjekter.
Miljø, klima og boligsosiale tiltak er områdene vi prioriterer.

EIERSKAP
Fredensborg Bolig eies i partnerskap av Tollef Svenkerud og Fredensborg AS. De har begge lang erfaring med eiendom- og boligutvikling. Eierne er aktive, industrielle, ekspansive og kapitalsterke med lang tidshorisont.

Ansatte er eiere i selskapet. Felles interesse blir kraft til å nå ambisiøse mål.

Além do nosso destacado time de sócios, a equipe da Capital Concreto representa a espinha dorsal de nossa operação. Entendemos que o sucesso de nossos empreendimentos não se deve apenas à visão estratégica de liderança, mas também à criatividade e comprometimento da equipe. A sinergia entre nossos sócios e colaboradores fomenta um ambiente de inovação contínua e excelência operacional, garantindo a construção de valor duradouro para os investidores e a comunidade.

Localizada estrategicamente em Alphaville, São Paulo, a Capital Concreto tem sua operação baseada em pessoas, simplicidade e inovação digital, sustentada por um ecossistema de negócios integrado, garantindo resultados excepcionais.

Name: Ingenious
Description:
Ingenious richt zich, sinds haar oprichting in 2009, op het ontwikkelen en realiseren van en investeren in hoogwaardige en toekomstbestendige gebieden.

Met een frisse blik op vastgoed en door een eigentijdse en vernieuwende wijze van vastgoedontwikkeling hebben wij in de afgelopen 15 jaar Ingenious opgebouwd tot wat het nu is. Een periode waarin wij kansen hebben gezien en waarin wij geïnvesteerd hebben in ons bedrijf en onze projecten. Een stabiele gebiedsontwikkelaar en een bewezen betrouwbare partner voor al onze stakeholders. 
Onze onderscheidende wijze van vastgoedontwikkeling en no-nonsense mentaliteit maakt projecten haalbaar. Juist door anticyclisch te blijven denken en door het anders te doen zullen wij de komende jaren Ingenious continueren en verder uitbreiden. 

Wie 
Met de intrede van de economische crisis in de loop van 2009 had de traditionele vastgoedmarkt in de toenmalige vorm zijn beste tijd gehad. Het was de hoogste tijd voor een nieuwe denkwijze om vastgoedontwikkelingen haalbaar te maken. En laat dat nu precies zijn wat wij doen en waar onze kracht ligt. Daarom hebben wij Ingenious opgericht. 

Hoe 
Wij staan voor daadkracht en vindingrijkheid met een eigen(wijze) blik op vastgoed. De dynamiek van de markt en de behoefte van de eindgebruiker staan bij ons centraal en vormen het vertrekpunt bij iedere ontwikkeling. 

Wat 
Wij gaan voor een toekomstbestendige en duurzame samenleving. Een kwalitatief hoogwaardig eindproduct voor iedereen om zorgeloos te kunnen wonen, werken, winkelen en recreëren en dat tevens staat voor een stabiel rendement wanneer aangewend als investering.

Name: Future Sydney
Description:
The housing affordability crisis is dire. Many growing up in Sydney can no longer afford to live here. Impacting local families and communities – it’s also threatening Sydney’s diversity, vibrancy and position as Australia’s primary economic hub. 

Yet, under pressure to find a fix, the NSW Government’s planning reforms are not only politically motivated – they’re also not good enough. Upzoning by drawing circles around train stations will not deliver the amount of affordable homes we need, nor setup great places to live. 

However, despite the spin – we can tackle affordability while enhancing liveability and creating great place outcomes, sustainably. But it will require brave leadership and a clear vision, along with strategic planning and a sophisticated discussion to enable it.  

Simply cutting red tape, chanting “more supply” and avoiding the tough decisions needed to address deep inequities in the housing market – will only deliver mediocre outcomes at best. Alternatively – when increased density is met with increased amenity and well-funded infrastructure – we get great places to live with parks, schools, tree canopies, walkability and healthy open space. 

We want a city where sustainable development and design excellence are championed. One with character and personality, where our built-environment story is treasured. Places that not only remain highly liveable, but highly loveable too. Density done well, not recklessly. 

We’re a network of Sydneysiders, working in the built-environment industry. Disappointed by the current reforms and discourse – we’re also inspired by this genuine opportunity to think about the future Sydney we call home, before we pass it on. 

After all, change is the only constant in world-class cities. An ingredient we embrace for the dynamism it sparks. But Sydney deserves better change than what is currently on offer. So, we will advocate for the type of change we believe Future Sydney can have.

Name: Precision Construction Limited
Description:
At Precision Construction, we're more than just builders; we're builders of great people and quality homes. 

Our talented "Team Blue" unwavering in our mission to lead residential construction in Auckland and Northland, setting the standard for excellence in our industry. 

What sets us apart is our belief that its good business to invest in creating a "work home" where talented people can excel and grow awesome careers. We pride ourselves on being the place people come back to time and again to do great work with great people.

Our founding team is still very much part of our growth plan, and they're actively involved the growth and development of our next generation of leadership.  We know what good looks like and enjoy enduring partnerships with customers, suppliers and specialist trades to deliver some of the most exclusive and exciting homes in New Zealand.  Simultaneously we have a whole division committed to innovative community housing solutions and redefining community neighborhoods are brought to life.

Our values are the foundation of everything we do. We believe in doing it together, listening to truly understand, keeping our word, and demonstrating care because strong relationships are critical tools of our trade. 

Mastering our craft, owning our impact, seeking feedback, and remaining open to continual growth is our formula for excellence and so we share ideas, seek help when needed, speak up for what's right and look out for one another. We think it's faster, safer, and way more fun to work this way!

Whether you are an apprentice, a hammer hand, a project manager or a senior leader we believe that everyone has value to add.  We seek guidance and learn from those who have been there before so we can innovate safely and with confidence.  

If you share our beliefs and are driven to leave the legacy of exceptional homes and communities, join "Team Blue" - it's the “home” for talented people to excel, grow and become their best.

Name: Estação 1 Construções e Empreendimentos
Description:
Evolução construtiva.

A Estação 1 transcende as fronteiras convencionais da construção. Emerge das raízes profundas de Feira de Santana, pulsando em sincronia com os desejos intrínsecos de nossa gente. Nós somos os arquitetos do amanhã, moldando horizontes com visão e paixão.

A Construção é nossa tela, e a cidade é nossa princesa. Na sinfonia dos tijolos e concreto, criamos harmonias que ecoam desde as residências mais acessíveis até os palácios dos sonhos. Elevamos a excelência a um patamar inigualável, onde a qualidade dança em perfeita sintonia com preços.

Somos tradição, os pioneiros do novo. A juventude em nosso espírito é a chama que nos guia para além do comum. Cada projeto é uma narrativa do futuro, uma prova viva de que o progresso não conhece limites. Mergulhamos nas águas da modernidade, trazendo à vida casas e apartamentos que são testemunhas do nosso compromisso inabalável com o bem-estar.

Em um momento icônico, em 2019, a Estação 1 resplandeceu no 36º lugar do pódio nacional da INTEC, como a faísca baiana mais brilhante, lançando metros quadrados de grandiosidade pelo Brasil. Cinco anos de história, uma história de destemor e impacto. E além das estrelas, erguemos a bandeira do progresso sustentável, tornando-nos pioneiros em Feira de Santana a ostentar o Selo Casa Azul + CAIXA, distinção que honra nossos empreendimentos Lantai e Mangata.

Name: Collins Residential
Description:
The Collins Residential Group is a branch of what was originally known as H Collins & Son, that still has strong family ties with the entrepreneurial spirit of the Collins family dating back four generations to 1904. Originally having started as a reputable Pietermaritzburg-based construction company, the business evolved into the commercial and industrial property space. In more recent times embarked on a tactical expansion into the residential property, hospitality, and agricultural sectors, redefining its future while honouring the roots of its successful past.

Collins Residential has perfected the art of creating communities where places, people, and purpose matter. With a core value of environmental rehabilitation, preservation, and care under-pinning all property development activity, each development is extensively researched, and delivered in an innovative offering that sets their property projects apart. 

Passionate about conservation and Africa’s natural heritage, Murray Collins has taken a robust approach to contributing towards the tourism sector in the SADC region. A specific focus on eco-tourism has resulted in Collins having developed interests in a portfolio of camps and curated eco-tourism experiences. These range from fishing charters in the wildest heart of Africa through to a number of luxury camps in Botswana and Zimbabwe , raw and earthy beach adventures in verdant Pondoland to the tranquility of crystal-clear waters on a private island in the Indian Ocean archipelago of Alphonse Island in the Seychelles. The vision of celebrating these natural assets is upheld throughout all experiences and hospitality offerings within the group. The directors are unwaivering in honouring their commitment to maintaining the authenticity of each destination and touching the earth lightly.

Description:
Der Name EPPLE steht seit 1984 für Qualität bei der Durchführung von anspruchsvollen Neubau-Immobilienprojekten. Vom familienfreundlichen Reihenhaus über elegante Eigentumswohnungen in besten urbanen Lagen bis hin zur komplexen Quartiersentwicklung: Mit Sitz in Heidelberg und Stuttgart engagieren wir uns als Planer, Bauträger und Projektentwickler für Wohnimmobilien mit Einfühlungsvermögen und Leidenschaft dafür, einzigartige Lebensmittelpunkte zu schaffen – in unserer Heimatregion Rhein-Neckar, sowie in unserem zweiten Zuhause, der Landeshauptstadt Stuttgart und im Rhein-Main-Gebiet.

Unsere jahrzehntelange Erfahrung macht uns bei EPPLE zum kompetenten Partner für Kommunen, Kirchen und Hochschulen. Für städtebaulich gelungene Ensemble-Qualität, richtungweisende Nachbarschaftskonzepte sowie herausragende Architektur wurde EPPLE bereits vielfach ausgezeichnet, unter anderem mit dem Deutschen Bauherrenpreis.

Unser Hauptsitz befindet sich - seit 2000 - im ehemaligen Radium-Sol-Bad in Heidelberg. Seit 2021 findet man uns außerdem in unserer neuen Filiale auf dem Stuttgarter Bosch-Areal. Rund 60 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter stehen hinter dem Erfolg von EPPLE.

Jesteśmy dumni z faktu, że bierzemy udział w budowaniu nowej tkanki miejskiej. Nie poprzestając na dotychczasowych osiągnięciach planujemy kolejne inwestycje, które będą miały istotny wpływ na kształtowanie wizerunku miasta. Nasze najnowsze inwestycje to Mirabelkowa Eko i Moja Retkinia, które odpowiadają na oczekiwania klientów w kontekście ekologicznego stylu życia, funkcjonalności i designu; co jednocześnie przyczynia się do wzrostu atrakcyjności Łodzi jako komfortowego miejsca do życia.
Naszym niekwestionowanym atutem jest doskonały wybór lokalizacji, precyzyjnie dostosowany do oczekiwań Klientów i dynamicznych trendów rynkowych. Projektujemy przestrzeń, która nie tylko spełnia, ale przewyższa oczekiwania społeczności łódzkiej.

Mieszkania inwestycyjne to nasza specjalność, zrealizowane m.in. w jednej z pięciu najlepszych lokalizacji w Polsce. Jako liderzy rynku łódzkiego dostarczamy najwyższe standardy i wyróżniającą się jakość. Znając unikalne potrzeby łódzkiego rynku, oferujemy innowacyjne rozwiązania, tworząc miejsca, które stają się integralną częścią życia społeczności.

Długotrwałe doświadczenie pozwala nam z sukcesem dostosowywać się do dynamicznych zmian rynkowych. Real Development Group to nie tylko deweloperia – to partner, który z pasją kreuje przestrzeń, spełniając marzenia o wymarzonym domu czy mieszkaniu. Nasze projekty to nie tylko budynki, to historie, które piszemy razem z naszymi Klientami, tworząc trwałe piękno i funkcjonalność.

Description:
At Excela, we create value for clients throughout the Chicagoland area by combining our knowledge and experience of the local market with our established relationships to provide excellent client service. 
We offer fully integrated owner representation services to maximize ROI and asset value. With a deep understanding of the complexities of corporate, institutional, and entrepreneurial owners, we develop comprehensive, individualized marketing strategies to achieve the highest possible alignment with owner investment objectives, predicting market challenges before they become issues for owners.
Changes in the Economy 
Fluctuations in demand for commercial real estate and pricing always affect the commercial property owner. We partner with clients to strategically build properties to align with tenant behavior to help clients maintain competitive positions. 
Finding the Right Match
Finding the right tenants that match your property’s business model, culture, and location can be challenging. We assist by staying up to date on tenant demands such as technology or transportation needs, ensuring your properties meet tenant expectations. 
Changing Demographics

Your target customer is different today. So why are you still communicating with them in the same way you always have? We help owners connect with today’s customers by maintaining an understanding of current and emerging trends. 

Rise in Experiential Consumerism

Commercial property owners must adapt to changing trends to remain relevant. Consumers crave an environment where their purchasing needs become an experience, translated into retail showroom spaces and mixed-use environments. 

We serve as the owner’s representative, building bridges with owners, project managers, and contractors and filling in gaps left by design professionals, commissioning agents, and general contractors. We are committed to helping clients achieve excellence through cost estimation/reduction, project coordination, and deep knowledge.

Känslan av ett eget hus. Kanske kommer den känslan av att du har varit med och ritat huset själv, vetskapen om att ingen annan bor på riktigt samma sätt? Eller av möjligheterna som lösvirkeshus ger - att ditt hus blev precis som du ville ha det. Är det för att vi tillsammans lagt vår omtanke och själ i ditt hus.

Om detta kan vi bara spekulera. I slutändan är det ju som med hela vår filosofi - vad som blir ditt eget kan bara du bestämma. Vi finns här för att förverkliga dina husdrömmar.

Med Derome, Sveriges största familjeägda träindustri, i ryggen kan vi dessutom erbjuda dig en stabil och trygg partner under ditt livs viktigaste affär.

Name: DSL Enginyeria i Arquitectura
Description:
DSL es una empresa de estudios técnicos de ingeniería y arquitectura fundada en 1995 por Daniel Puente y especializada en los sectores de industria, comercio y corporativo.

A lo largo de nuestra trayectoria, hemos realizado más de 2.000 proyectos de construcción e instalaciones.

Nuestra misión es aportar soluciones de calidad a nuestros clientes, y para ello trabajamos los proyectos desde una perspectiva integral. Nos responsabilizamos de todo el proceso, desde el diseño hasta la construcción y puesta en marcha de la instalación. Además, gracias a nuestra visión multi disciplinar, cada elemento del proyecto se integra con la máxima eficiencia al conjunto.

Nuestra filosofía se basa en combinar la creatividad de la arquitectura con el rigor de la ingeniería. Del mismo modo, incorporamos el desarrollo sostenible en la política energética basándonos en criterios de funcionalidad y economía, a partir de los cuales se trabaja la estética. Creemos que para que una construcción sea funcional, debe de ser diseñada desde la racionalidad. Y para que sea económicamente viable, es necesario un estudio en profundidad del mantenimiento general así como del consumo energético y la utilización de los materiales y tecnologías indicados en cada caso.

La línea de diseño que seguimos busca la máxima eficiencia energética, integrando soluciones arquitectónicas con las últimas tecnologías de instalaciones, lo que hace posible el balance energético cero.

El equipo de DSL está formado por un grupo de profesionales con una alta calificación técnica y amplia experiencia en el diseño y ejecución de proyectos. Más allá del dinamismo, nuestra principal característica es la diversidad de especialidades de cada uno de los miembros del equipo: estructuras, energía, telecomunicaciones, domótica, acústica, urbanización, construcción, etc.

Contáctanos: info@dsl.cat

Name: BH'İnşaat
Description:
BH İnşaat – 25 Yıllık Tecrübe, Yüzlerce Başarı Hikayesi

Başçınar Hatipoğlu İnşaat (BH İnşaat), 25 yıllık birikimiyle inşaat sektöründe güvenin, kalitenin ve sürdürülebilirliğin temsilcilerinden biridir. Bugüne kadar altyapıdan üstyapıya, kamu projelerinden özel sektör yatırımlarına, yüzlerce projeyi başarıyla tamamladık.

Okul, yurt, hastane, fabrika gibi kurumsal yapılar; bakım, tadilat, güçlendirme, yenileme ve komple yıkım-yeniden yapım projeleri gibi tüm kapsamlı işlerde uzmanlığımızla fark yaratıyoruz. Her ölçekteki işte; zamanında teslim, teknik yeterlilik ve çözüm odaklı yaklaşımımızla müşterilerimizin yanında yer alıyoruz.

KOBİ’lerden bireysel yatırımcılara, kamu kurumlarından büyük ölçekli özel şirketlere kadar geniş bir kitleye hizmet veriyor; uzman kadromuz ve yenilikçi çözümlerimizle her projeyi bir adım ileri taşıyoruz.

Misyonumuz
Misyonumuz, kaliteli inşaat hizmetleri sunarak müşteri memnuniyetini en üst seviyeye çıkarmak, projeleri zamanında ve bütçe dostu bir şekilde tamamlamak, çevreye duyarlı ve sürdürülebilir çözümler geliştirmektir. Her projede, müşteri ihtiyaçlarını ön planda tutarak güvenilir, yenilikçi ve etkili çözümler üretmek, topluma ve sektöre değer katmak hedefindeyiz.

Vizyonumuz
Vizyonumuz, inşaat sektöründe lider bir firma olarak tanınmak, ulusal ve uluslararası alanda projeler geliştirerek büyümek ve sürdürülebilir inşaat çözümleri ile geleceğe sağlam temeller atmak. Sektörümüzde kaliteyi, güveni ve müşteri odaklı çalışmayı ön planda tutarak, her projede sektöre örnek bir başarı ortaya koymaktır.

Name: ATOM Builders Contracting
Description:
Atom Builders has a current focus of improving the exteriors of buildings using an advanced Green Energy Cork-Based Thermal Coating. This performance coating has residential, commercial and industrial applications and can be applied on new construction as well as retrofitting existing structures.

We are certified applicator's of Vipeq Thermal CorkShield; a gorgeous exterior finishing product that offers both performance and protection to the existing structure. Some of the performance benefits offered are naturally associated with cork and include being Class-A fire rated, mold and mildew resistance and offering an effective thermal break (think of a cork hot plate).

This means transfer of energy (Heat loss), in or out of a building, is drastically slowed. This high-performance coating offers a Thermal Conductivity Rating (K-Value) of 0.058 - This means it effectively slows the transfer of energy prior to penetrating through your homes walls, keeping you warmer in the winter and cooler in the summer!

In addition to the performance benefits offered, any structure’s visual appeal is instantly improved with over 30 vibrant colors available all with a fade rate of less than 1%, compared to traditional paint which may fade between 10%-15% annually. 

Vipeq Thermal CorkShield has undergone extensive testing to PROVE these benefits

Benefits include:
- Class A Fire Rating (ASTM E84-20)
- Thermal Break / resistance to freeze/thaw (ASTM E8245)
- Fungi & Rot Resistance (ASTM G21 / ASTM D3273)
- Water Resistant & Breathable (ASTM D2247)
- Salt and Corrosion Resistant (ASTM B117-18)
- Hypoallergenic
- .... and others!

Atom Builders continues to offer residential construction and renovation services. The breadth of successful jobs range from full basement developments to legal suites and everything in between from decks and fences to bathrooms and kitchens.

Name: Sound Living NZ
Description:
What We Do

Sound Living is a boutique home builder led by respected, experienced directors who are personally involved in delivering high-quality, well-thought-out homes. We collaborate with an industry-leading team of consultants to provide homes that balance quality and affordability. These partnerships, combined with our expertise, ensure efficient design and construction across all developments.

How We’re Different

Unlike many other developers, Sound Living is a fully integrated development and construction business. This means we manage the entire process in-house — from concept to completion — eliminating friction between developer and builder. The result is a smoother, more streamlined experience for our customers, and greater accountability from us.

We are committed to building better, faster, and more efficiently. By having complete control over each stage of the process, we focus on the details that matter and continuously improve, delivering higher-quality homes at more affordable prices.

Materials and Design

We believe in building homes that last. That’s why we only use robust, high-performance materials like concrete, steel, block, and brick. These materials ensure long-term durability and reduce maintenance costs setting us apart from other developers.

Landscaping

A key feature of every Sound Living development is thoughtful, high-quality landscaping. Lush gardens and green amenity spaces are designed to enhance everyday living and foster a strong connection to the great Kiwi outdoors. We believe these natural elements are essential to creating vibrant, livable communities.

Name: Nordic Stone Care
Description:
Hos Nordic Stone Care hjælper vi virksomheder, boligforeninger, ejendomsudviklere og kommuner i Danmark med at gøre deres bygninger mere holdbare, energieffektive og bæredygtige. 

Vi brænder for at levere innovative tagløsninger, der ikke bare holder længe, men også styrker jeres ESG-profil, ved at reducere miljøpåvirkningen og optimere driftsomkostninger.

Vores hvide silicone tagmembran er designet til flade tage og leverer konkrete fordele:

Sparer energi: Holder taget køligt (kun 5-10 grader over udetemperaturen mod tagpaps 40-60 grader), hvilket skærer op til 35% af køleomkostningerne og skaber et bedre indeklima.

Bæredygtighed i fokus: Markant reduceret CO2-aftryk gennem lang holdbarhed og lavere energiforbrug, hvilket understøtter jeres ESG-mål og bidrager til en grønnere fremtid.

Booster solceller: Forbedrer solcellers effektivitet med op til 15% med den reflekterende overflade.

Bygget til at holde: Over 40 års levetid, tæt mod lækager og modstandsdygtig over for stillestående vand. Op til 25 års garanti og brandklasse Broof(t2).

Vi skræddersyr løsninger til industri, produktion, kontorer og boligkomplekser, så I får en pålidelig, energieffektiv og bæredygtig tagløsning, der løfter både jeres ejendomme og jeres miljøprofil.

Lad os tage en snak om, hvordan vi kan styrke jeres ejendomme og ESG-indsats. Ring til os på 51 53 18 16 eller skriv til info@nordicstonecare.dk – vi er klar til at hjælpe!

Name: 2B Structures Ltd
Description:
Our Story & Culture
2B Structures was founded on 8 December 2021 by Robert Vata and a team of driven professionals with a bold vision: to build more than just a construction company. From day one, our mission has been to create a solutions-focused business rooted in innovation, integrity, and a culture of excellence.
The name “2B Structures” carries deep meaning. It reflects our purpose—to build (“2B a Structure”)—and our belief that with the right people, anything can be built. Three ⚟ lines in our logo symbolize family roots, a personal emblem that reminds us of the strength found in unity, legacy, and shared purpose.
We began with a strong foundation in groundworks and reinforced concrete (RC) frames, quickly earning a reputation for technical expertise, reliability, and trust. As our capabilities grew, so did our ambition—expanding into complex civil engineering projects, including ports, specialized basements, and aviation infrastructure.
We're also proud to include Flush line in our portfolio—experts in drainage solutions who share our commitment to precision and performance.
With headquarters in Woolwich Arsenal, London, we deliver projects across the UK for both public and private sector clients, forging long-term partnerships and pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in construction.

Name: Flowerday Homes Limited
Description:
At Flowerday Homes, we’re proud to be one of the Bay of Plenty’s most trusted and experienced residential building companies.

We’ve been building homes since 2014 — originally as ZB Homes BOP and later rebranded to Flowerday Homes — but our commitment has never changed. No matter the size or scale of the project, we focus on building high-quality homes and delivering an exceptional customer experience.

In 2017, we were named New Zealand’s fastest-growing business in the Deloitte Fast50 — the only time a construction company has received this award.

We’re members of both Certified Builders New Zealand and the Registered Master Builders Association, and we’ve been recognised with multiple Master Builder House of the Year awards.

We have played a key role in several significant developments, including the Te Mania residential development in Te Puke (temania.nz) and the Owhata Kohanga Rakau housing initiative in Rotorua (owhatahousing.nz).

Led by General Manager Daren Green and Directors Rik and Fiona Flowerday, our mission — building homes, enriching lives, creating communities — underpins everything we do.

Our Services

Design & Build
We offer a full Design & Build service. Whether you have your own plans or just an idea, we’ll work closely with you to bring your vision to life with care, creativity, and attention to detail.

Contract Builder
As experienced contract builders, we partner with private developers, community groups, and government agencies to deliver high-quality, cost-effective housing solutions.

House & Land Packages
We have a variety of house and land packages available. 

If you are looking for a trusted build partner in the Bay of Plenty, we’d love to hear from you. 

www.flowerdayhomes.co.nz

Մենք ներկայացնում ենք «Նոյան Տուն» բնակելի թաղամասը՝ իր թաունհաուսներով և առանձնատներով։
Թաղամասը գտնվում է կենտրոնից ընդհամենը 7 կմ հեռավորության վրա՝ զերծ է քաղաքի աղմուկից, հարուստ է էկոլոգիապես մաքուր և կանաչապատ տարածքներով և իհարկե գեղեցիկ տեսարանով։
Թաղամասում առկա է ընրհանուր անվտանգության համակարգ, երեխաների համար նախատեսված ժամանցի վայր։Մոտակարքում են գտնվում նաև դպրոցներ, մանկապարտեզներ և ժամանցի կենտրոններ։
Նոյան տուն թաղամասում դուք կգտնեք հարմարավետ և ներդաշնակ կյանքի համար անհրաժեշտ բոլոր նախապայմաներով Ձեր երազանքի տունը։

Name: Kalkmann Wohnwerte GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Gegenseitiges Vertrauen ist die Basis für jede seriöse Geschäftsabwicklung im Immobiliengeschäft. Ob Grundstücksverkauf oder Wohnungserwerb – stets entscheiden nicht nur wirtschaftliche Aspekte, sondern auch der gute persönliche Kontakt. Wir haben dabei den Anspruch, alle Geschäfte fair und zur allseitigen Zufriedenheit durchzuführen.

Bei uns gilt das gesprochene Wort. Deshalb vertrauen uns zahlreiche Kunden seit Beginn unserer Tätigkeit im Jahre 1986. Und wir vertrauen unseren Kunden.
Eine unserer großen Stärken sehen wir in unserem kompakten Kernteam. So können wir schnell, flexibel und kreativ arbeiten und wesentliche Entscheidungen in kürzester Zeit treffen. Mit unserem umfassenden und stabilen Netzwerk erhalten wir zudem auch von Außen das Fachwissen, das wir für den Gesamterfolg unserer Arbeit benötigen. Dreißig Jahre Erfahrung mit Immobilien kommen dabei unseren Kunden und den zukünftigen Bewohnern zugute.

Für unsere Kunden bedeutet das: Sie werden vom Beginn bis zum Abschluss eines Wohnprojekts stets ganz individuell und sehr persönlich betreut. KALKMANN WOHNWERTE steht für Flexibilität, Kompetenz und Verlässlichkeit vom Grundriss bis zur Schlüsselübergabe!

Name: Revonia
Description:
In Ancient Rome vaulted buildings were irreplaceable and were held in high regard, this was also where cross-vault construction was invented.
Even when time has not been kind to the buildings, the vaulted cellars still firmly stand in all their glory.
But the construction of vaulted buildings has become increasingly rare these days, as there’s a lack of craftsmen with the necessary knowledge.

Our mission is to revive and continue this distinguished and resilient tradition.

Revonia is an Estonian company established in 2010. 

Our main line of activity is manufacturing precast wine/earth cellars, saunas, underground grills, kitchen rooms, and wellness centers with vaulted ceilings.
 
Cellar building tradition has been in Estonia for centuries and vaulted buildings have been constructed for almost ten centuries. 

We are keeping all the traditional and dignified looks of the older cellars and combining them with a modern twist and technology. Our way makes the building process less time-consuming and our cellars are stronger than ever.

Our cellars are pre-made in our Estonian factory. They include handmade shelves, hinges, handles, doors, and other decorations. Styles vary from medieval to modern and even classy ones.

Our solution makes exporting the whole packet easy and allows the building to be constructed on-site even with only one day!

Name: VBW Bauen und Wohnen GmbH
Description:
Die VBW Bauen und Wohnen GmbH, mit Unternehmenssitz in Bochum, ist die führende Wohnungsanbieterin der Stadt. Für mehr als 40.000 Bochumer*innen bietet das 1916 als Bochumer Heimstätten GmbH gegründete Unternehmen mehr als 12.600 eigene und 178 fremdverwaltete Wohnungen an.

Als Wohnraumversorgerin der Stadt Bochum gibt die VBW entscheidende Zukunftsimpulse für eine ganzheitliche Quartiers- und Stadtteilentwicklung. Damit das gelingen kann, realisiert die VBW einen gesunden Mix in ihren Neubauquartieren: Es werden Neubauten zu jeweils 50 Prozent öffentlich gefördert sowie zu 50 Prozent freifinanziert angeboten. Mit rund 40 Prozent Bestandswohnungen, die einer festen Mietpreisbindung unterliegen, leistet die VBW einen erheblichen Beitrag zur sicheren und sozial verantwortungsbewussten Wohnraumversorgung. 

Gleichzeitig unterstützt die VBW Stiftung seit 2016 gemeinnützige Projekte in den Quartieren, um das soziale Miteinander zu fördern. Jugend- und Altenhilfe, Bildung und Erziehung sowie das Wohlfahrtswesen sind dabei die Schwerpunkte der Stiftung.

Weitere Informationen über die VBW finden Sie unter www.vbw-bochum.de sowie über die VBW Stiftung unter www.vbw-stiftung.de.

Name: Impresa Tilatti
Description:
Costruire le case ben coscienti che - per le persone - edificare un'abitazione rappresenta la realizzazione del sogno della vita. L'Impresa Tilatti di case - dal 1953, quando è nata per volontà di Rinaldo Tilatti - ne ha costruite più di duemila e 500. E tutte sono state costruite con la medesima cura che avremmo messo per la nostra.

Le abitazioni che propone l'Impresa sono di varie tipologie: in linea, a schiera, monofamiliari o bifamiliari. Nel corso degli ultimi anni l'offerta si è ampliata estendendosi anche alla Bio Edilizia e agli interventi di recupero energetico. E per chi una casa ce l'ha già, forniamo servizi di restauro e manutenzione.

L' Impresa Tilatti dispone di attrezzature all'avanguardia che consentono di intervenire in tempi brevi senza la necessità di realizzare ponteggi fissi o installare gru di cantiere. 

Dal 1953 costruire case è il nostro lavoro. In oltre sessant'anni di attività ci siamo costantemente adeguati ai miglioramenti di tecniche, mezzi e materiali, ma una cosa continuiamo gelosamente a conservare inalterata: la passione per il lavoro fatto con cura.

Why Choose KY Two Tone?
At KY Two Tone, we believe in setting new standards for housing by combining cutting-edge technology with sustainable practices. Our Light Gauge Steel Structure system ensures durability, safety, and a faster construction process, ultimately delivering a home that stands the test of time.


Bangladesh, with a growing population and economy, has certainly opened up opportunities in the house-building sector. Our government has been making significant progress in the planning of affordable housing policies and implementing agendas signifying housing as a right and a requirement for realizing social change.
Keeping that in mind, KY Steel, one of the leading Flat Steel Manufacturers in Bangladesh, has geared up to provide a sustainable new housing solution with state-of-the-art technology and with raw materials the company produces.

Name: AMH Hire
Description:
Founded in 2018, AMH Hire delivers containerised, tailored multi-use space solutions at speed.

With over 30 years’ experience in the construction industry, site accommodation and staff welfare, the team behind AMH Hire identified a gap in the market for stylish containerised space solutions that could be both put in place at speed and customised according to the client’s needs.  

With over 5000 containers used for hire every year, AMH Hire design containers to a ‘plug in and play’ specification which means that they can be installed quickly and used modularly, fitting together with ease. Offering the ultimate in flexibility, AMH Hire containers can be permanently installed, hired long-term or even purchased.

Tailored to your needs
Our eco-friendly containers can be delivered UK-wide and designed around your precise needs, whether you’re opening a shop or a mixology bar. AMH Hire containers allow you to fill your container with the equipment that you need and then we can interior design your container around your brand. Our dedicated team works closely with each client on an individual basis to design a solution tailored to your needs.

With sustainability at the heart of our operations, we use non-toxic materials in our modular buildings to ensure that we’re an environmentally-friendly company with a low carbon footprint. Our containers are endlessly recyclable, which helps to minimise use of landfill.

Quick, Reliable, Customisable
Our containers can be fitted and installed in days. We know the importance of business-as-usual operations and our quick lead times mean that we can fully fit and test containers off-site within one to two days, before installing them and handing them over to you. And the part that everyone forgets…. When you no longer need your container, we remove it at speed with minimum fuss.

Name: HOWMZ
Description:
HOWMZ was created to replace homebuilding as you know it. 

Traditional homebuilding is stagnant. It hasn’t evolved in decades. The industry relies on outdated processes that drive higher costs, unnecessary waste, unreliable outcomes, and homes designed for ease of construction and the lowest possible cost, not for living. 

We create precision-built homes you can feel. Homes you experience. Every home is designed, engineered, manufactured, and constructed with real life at the center: how you enter, how sound carries, how air moves, where you gather, and how you rest. Because a home is more than its exterior – it’s the sum of everything working together throughout the home. If the exterior captivates you, just wait until you learn how we made it – that’s where the difference truly reveals itself. Every step of making a HOWMZ home is guided by how it will be lived in, and every inch is finished with intention.

And we don’t simply promise it – we prove it. Our homes speak for themselves. The moment you walk in, you notice things you can’t quite put into words at first: the stillness, the warmth, the touch, the solidity, the comfort that settles in without asking for attention. It’s in the way the home holds temperature, filters air, softens sound, and moves with the rhythms of daily life. Nothing is for show – everything is for living, made to last through years of real life. We simply create with care, precision, and intention – and the result says everything that needs to be said. 

This is the evolution of building.
This is the revolution of living.
This is HOWMZ.

Name: BIMForum Global
Description:
The mission of BIMForum Global is to make improvements within the built environment. This is achieved through results-oriented research that delivers practical implementation of technology to project owners and their team.  

BIMForum Global (The Forum, “BFG”) is a forum of Ascend Building Knowledge Foundation (ABKF) with the focused goal of improving the built environment through the practical implementation of innovation for project owners and their teams. The target audiences are the Virtual Design and Construction (VDC) professionals and the organizational leaders who serve, guide and direct them. While The Forum does draw from rigorous academic research through Ascend, it is focused on practical, realistic application of VDC processes on real world projects. The BIMForum Global content is developed from Ascend’s research in architecture, engineering, construction, and Operations/Facility Management (AECO-FM), as well as, practical feedback from end users and other organizations that Ascend collaborates with.  

The ABKF was established in 2017 to provide the AECO-FM industry evidence based research that leads to educational tools VDC professionals can utilize to improve their teams, organizations and projects through innovation and advancements in technology and processes. 

The Ascend Building Knowledge Foundation focuses on research and training for high performance projects in the AEC-FM industry, seeking to provide the resources that will allow the industry to continue to develop, adapt, and grow. At ABKF, we want to equip the current and future generations of AEC workers with the knowledge and capabilities to innovate in the area of building technology. Our focus is on researching trends and innovations within the industry and using that research to educate, equip and collaborate within the industry.

Ascend Building Knowledge Foundation is incorporated as a nonprofit, public benefit, charitable research & education foundation with 501(c)(3) status.

Uit deze schat aan ervaring putten wij ook bij de realisatie van al jouw wensen. Maak gerust eens een afspraak om jouw mogelijkheden te bespreken. Name: SN Byggservice AB
Description:
Vi på SN Byggservice är ett pålitligt och mångsidigt byggföretag med lång erfarenhet inom byggbranschen. Vi erbjuder en bred palett av tjänster inom nybyggnation, tillbyggnation, renovering, projektledning, totalentreprenad och underentreprenad. 
Våra skickliga hantverkare är experter inom måleri, plattsättning och snickeri och vi tar oss an både små och stora projekt för såväl privatpersoner som större byggfirmor.

Tjänster vi erbjuder

- Nybyggnation – från start till färdigt hem eller byggnad.
- Tillbyggnation – utbyggnader och anpassningar efter dina behov.
- Renovering – totalrenovering eller specifika rum som kök och badrum.
- Projektledning – effektiv och strukturerad ledning genom hela byggprocessen.
- Total/Under-entreprenad – komplett lösning för större byggprojekt.
- Måleri, plattsättning och snickeri – detaljarbete med precision och högsta kvalitet.

Varför välja oss?

- Vi samarbetar med välkända aktörer som K-fastigheter, Gösta Bengtsson Byggnads AB och Kihlgrens Byggplåt.
- Medlemskap i Byggnads och Målareförbundet ger trygghet och säkerhet för både våra anställda och våra kunder.
- Vi är ett certifierat våtrumsföretag, vilket garanterar kvalitet och säkerhet vid våtrums arbete.
- Vår unika underentreprenad modell, som vi utvecklat under de senaste 5 åren, eliminerar ÄTA-arbeten och minimerar konflikter mellan olika underentreprenörer. Vi tar hand om en stor del av bygget, inklusive hela grov- och finsnickeri, plattsättning och måleri, vilket säkerställer att tidplan och kvalitet följs från start till mål.

Våra kunder säger

Vi har genom åren byggt upp långvariga samarbeten med både stora byggfirmor och privatpersoner, vilket vittnar om vårt engagemang, vår höga kvalitet och vår förmåga att leverera i tid.

Name: Mjöbäcksvillan
Description:
Mjöbäcks bygger hus och utvecklar bostadsområden med en stor lyhördhet för behov och önskemål. Genom att kombinera attraktiva lägen med upplevelserik arkitektur och moderna, praktiska bostäder skapar vi förutsättningar för maximal livskvalitet för såväl småbarnsfamiljer på landsbygden som urbana individer i stadsnära miljöer. Ända sedan starten 1970 har vår ledstjärna alltid varit att leverera en optimal lösning för varje behov, en filosofi som har byggt vår framgång och bidrar till att Mjöbäcks fortsätter att utvecklas starkt. 

Våra rötter finns i den lilla orten Mjöbäck som ligger i skogarna på gränsen mellan Västergötland och Halland. Där finns sedan lång tid tillbaka en gedigen husbyggartradition. Mjöbäcks Projekt är fokuserat på uveckling genom att förädla markområden med villor, flerfamiljshus och bostadsrättshus. Verksamheten är koncentrerad till södra och mellersta Sverige. Drivkraften är densamma idag som när vi startade – att leverera kvalitetshus, såväl i byggkvalitet som i krav på att tillgodose behov som varje nybliven husägare har. Det har givit resultat, idag bygger vi fler hus än någonsin tidigare.

Name: VdW südwest – Verband der Südwestdeutschen Wohnungswirtschaft
Description:
Im VdW südwest sind rund 200 genossenschaftliche, kommunale und private Wohnungsunternehmen in Hessen und Rheinland-Pfalz mit einem Wohnungsbestand von etwa 450.000 Wohnungen organisiert, die rund 1,1 Millionen Menschen ein sicheres, modernes und lebenswertes Zuhause geben. Mit einer Durchschnittsmiete von 7,19 Euro pro Quadratmeter in Hessen und 6,23 Euro pro Quadratmeter in Rheinland-Pfalz stehen unsere Wohnungsunternehmen wie keine anderen für guten und bezahlbaren Wohnraum in Stadt und Land. "Gut und sicher wohnen" gilt für uns gerade auch in Krisenzeiten.

Wohnen zählt zu den Grundbedürfnissen des Menschen und daher ist die Debatte um Wohnraum auch ein Politikum. Als Interessenvertretung der Bestandshalter nimmt der VdW südwest politische Verantwortung wahr. Mit unserer Kompetenz in allen Fragen rund um das Wohnen sind wir Ansprechpartner Nummer eins für die Politik. Daneben unterstützen wir unsere Mitglieder mit einem breiten Dienstleistungs- und Beratungsangebot. Dies reicht von den Megathemen Klimaschutz und Digitalisierung über Rechts- und Steuerberatung, die technische sowie betriebswirtschaftliche Beratung bis zur Wirtschaftsprüfung.

Somos un equipo apasionado por  la industria inmobiliaria, que da visibilidad a sus  socios inversionistas a través de inteligencia de mercado, análisis de factibilidad y viabilidad financiera, negociación y cierres,  tecnología, análisis de datos, y búsqueda de propiedades.

Creamos una propuesta de valor, que entiende el grado de compatibilidad que una inversión tiene con su posible tenedor, considerando: los tiempos, formas y fondo, de todos y cada uno de  los involucrados en el primer paso de todo proyecto inmobiliario… la adquisición de un bien inmueble para su transformación. 

En OrigiLand.com.mx no vendemos o compramos inmuebles, recolectamos historias, de éxito, de crecimientos y de logros, de buenos negocios, con estándares altos de ética y buenas practicas.

Name: Leonard Valve Company
Description:
In 1911, while getting a hot-towel shave at the local barber shop, Frederick C. Leonard had his face scalded by the non-tempered water used on his towel. An Inventor, Leonard knew that there had to be a way to deliver safe, tempered hot water from a plumbed source. His painful experience inspired him to design the World’s First Thermostatic Mixing Valve.

In the 110+ years since our Founder introduced the world to mechanically tempered hot water, we at Leonard Valve have built upon his legacy. Throughout our history, we have introduced innovative solutions that improve the safety and performance of domestic hot water systems. From thermostatic shower valves to digital mixing valves, our products are designed to keep up with modern-day needs, while providing “The Right Mix of Safety and Performance” every single time.

From the interior metal components of our valves to assembly and testing, our products are proudly Made in the U.S.A.! Our valves are assembled and tested by hand, by our team of skilled Union Craftsmen with decades of experience. The attention to detail we offer cannot be matched by machines and is one reason why we are the industry leader in quality, reliability, and durability.

Here at Leonard Valve, we take pride in our mission of continuing to provide industry leading water management solutions in our next century while maintaining our heritage of high quality, reliable, and dependable water temperature solutions.

QUIS NOUS SOMMES 
4A’S Piscine est la première branche de 4A’S Group. Elle est née d'une passion pour le luxe, l'envie de démocratiser l'accès et la rigueur. Nous souhaitons offrir à tous à chacun la possibilité d'acquérir une piscine et les avantages y afférents sans se ruiner. Actuellement, notre leitmotiv est la satisfaction de nos clients. Créée en 2020, 4A’S Piscine compte à son actif une vingtaine de piscines toutes catégories confondues. Nous visons les 100 réalisations pour la fin 2023.

POURQUOI 4A’S
Pour sa passion et son expertise : nous sommes une équipe de passionnés avec une expertise poussée dans chacun son domaine travaillant en synergie pour vous offrir le meilleur. Pour sa créativité : l’innovation est au centre de notre valeur. Nous cherchons toujours à aller au-delà de la demande de nos clientèles en vue de les surprendre. Pour sa compétitivité : nous soutenons notre devise, c’est de rendre le luxe accessible pour nos épicuriens. Casser la barrière au luxe à travers des offres abordables tout en respectant les normes.

NOS FORCES
La ressource humaine.
4A’S Piscine est composée d'une équipe expérimentée. Chaque mini équipe est autonome et correspondant à une tâche particulière. Mais toutes travaillent en synergie en vue d’offrir la meilleure piscine à nos clients. Notre écoute. Vos exigences. L'équipe avance avec les besoins des clients. Du début du projet jusqu'à l'entretien d'une piscine finie. Nous nous plions, avec recommandations, aux exigences de nos clientèles.

Avec la vente de nos services et produits, nous nous engageons à vous accompagner de nos recommandation et assistance afin que vous puissiez jouir avec quietude de nos biens

Votre constructeur de piscine sur mesure upgrade ses services afin de mieux vous satisfaire.

Votre constructeur de piscine sur mesure

Nato dalla volontà di creare un’alternativa abitativa eco-friendly, il progetto ha preso forma attraverso anni di impegno e collaborazione multidisciplinare.

L’iniziativa ha superato sfide, abbracciando le nuove frontiere dell’architettura sostenibile e della bioedilizia. Le case ecologiche (tutte Nzeb ovvero a energia quasi zero), progettate con attenzione all’efficienza energetica e all’uso di materiali eco-compatibili, rappresentano l’impegno verso uno stile di vita sostenibile.

L’ecoquartiere, oltre ad essere un modello di residenza, sta evolvendo per offrire nuovi spazi anche per le persone che non vi risiedono. I servizi come la palestra, la caffetteria- bistrot, il market e l’asilo nido mirano a completare l’esperienza di vita, promuovendo la salute, la socialità e l’istruzione.

Oggi, Ecovillaggio è più di un luogo, è una realtà che condivide valori di sostenibilità, solidarietà e connessione con la natura. Attraverso una storia di impegno, Ecovillaggio continua a crescere, ispirando cambiamenti positivi per un futuro eco-consapevole.

Name: Coach, Truck & Tractor, LLC
Description:
Coach, Truck & Tractor is a family-owned, independent crane service provider. We are located in Williston, North Dakota, providing service in Dickinson, Watford City, Tioga, other Bakken oil field cities, and nationally. We provide service, inspection, and repair for all-terrain, crawler, truck, pickers, overhead, and tower cranes. We provide hydraulic component rebuilding and resealing, and our hydraulic cylinder table can accommodate cylinders in excess of 40′ to 120′. Our services are available on-site and at our facility 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

In order to provide efficient break-down service and maintenance, we are an authorized Parker Store Hose Doctor, offering mobile hydraulic hose replacement services. 

Additionally, we are an authorized Isuzu Industrial Engine dealer, providing sales, service, and parts. Our technicians are factory-trained and offer the latest diagnostic and service techniques. 

CT&T prides itself on its approach to safety with membership in, ISNetworld, North Dakota Safety Council, Crane Certification Association of America, and Energy Coalition for Contractor Safety. We have insurance coverage, both professional and general liability.

Next to safety, our biggest priority is quality of service by offering continuing education to our technicians, OEM products, and a culture of “do it right the first time.”

Description:
Der Anfang unserer Geschichte

1978 von Theodor Semmelhaack gegründet, steht das inhabergeführte Wohnungsunternehmen seit über 45 Jahren für hochwertigen Wohnungsbau und werterhaltende Objektbetreuung. Strategischer Weitblick, erfolgreiche Umsetzung von eigenen Projektentwicklungen und hohe Fachkompetenz sicherten ein kontinuierliches Wachstum und machten das Unternehmen zu einem der erfolgreichsten seiner Art in Norddeutschland. 
Die Errichtung moderner und bezahlbarer Geschosswohnungen mit hohen baulichen und ökologischen Standards ist ein wichtiger Schwerpunkt des SEMMELHAACK Wohnungsbauunternehmens. Bundesweit zählen mehr als 25.000 Wohneinheiten zum Bestand.

Mit über 45 Sozialimmobilien (stationäre Altenpflegeeinrichtungen) trägt SEMMELHAACK zur Bewältigung demografischer Herausforderungen bei. Überdies zählen zahlreiche Gewerbe- und Handelsimmobilien zum Portfolio. 

2016 wird mit der Gründung der Theodor Semmelhaack Familienstiftung der Fortbestand des Unternehmens und die erfolgreiche Weiterführung seiner Aktivitäten gesichert. Der Stammsitz des SEMMELHAACK Wohnungsunternehmens mit seinen 260 Mitarbeitern ist in Elmshorn, eine Niederlassung befindet sich in Horst in Holstein und eine in Potsdam.

Name: Alians Development
Description:
Alians Development olaraq biznes modelimiz 4 əsas hissədən ibarətdir. 
1. Araşdırma, 
2. Layihə,
3. İnşaat,
4. Satış  
Təyin etdiyimiz biznes modelimiz əhalinin arzuları üzərində qurulub. Biznes modelimizin hər bir mərhələsində arzularınız nəzərə alınır.

1. Araşdırma” mərhələsi
Bu mərhələ başlanğıc mərhələ olduğu üçün növbəti mərhələlərə böyük təsiri vardır. Burada əhalinin mənzil almaq istədiyi məkan, qiymət, mənzil forması araşdırılır və təyin olunur . Sonra bu təyin olunan plan ”Layihə”, “İnşaat”, “Satış” kimi mərhələlərimizdə istifadə olunur.

2. Layihə mərhələsi.
İlkin mərhələdə   təyin olunan plana əsasən layihənin məkanı, layihənin planı seçilir. Bundan sonra sifariş olunur və “İnşaat” mərhələsinə  hazırlanılır.

3. Inşaat mərhələsi.
Layihənin planını əldə etdikdən sonra binanın inşasına başlanılır. Tikintinin keyfiyyətli olması üçün  daim nəzarət olunur və arzu olunan vaxta tamamlanması üçün  lazımi işlər görülür. Bizim satış mərhələmiz məhz bu mərhələdən başlayır.

4. Satış mərhələsi.
İlk növbədə müştəri xidmətimiz təşkil olunur. Müştərilərə həm əyani həm də qiyabi şəkildə məlumat verilir. Sonrakı mərhələ satışın təşkilidir.

Marketinq:	
Yeni layihə planlaşdırıldıqda ilk işimiz araşdırma  ilə başlanılır. Araşdırma layihənin məkanı daxil olmaqla bərabər bu layihəyə əhalinin münasibətini araşdırırıq. Bütün bu araşdırmaların nəticəsi olaraq layihənin marketinq təhlilini, marketinq planını, reklam strategiyasını hazırlayırıq.
Bizim məqsədimiz sizin məmnun qalmağınızdır.

Satış:
Satış  komandası olaraq müştəri ilə  ilkin  görüş bizimlə başlanır. İstər əyani  istərsə də qiyabi şəkildə məlumatı çatdırmaq, müqavilə bağlamaq bizim işimizdir. Müştərilərin hər bir arzu və təkliflərini  qeyd edərək  satış şərtlərinin hazırlanmasında istifadə edirik.
Bizim işimiz yüksək xidmət göstərməkdir.

A oggi Montacchiello ospita più di 50 aziende che danno lavoro a oltre 1.500 persone. A impreziosire l’area la presenza di aziende che operano nel settore ICT ad altissimo livello di specializzazione e rivolte a un mercato nazionale e internazionale.

All’interno dell’area, la Forti Holding ha sviluppato importanti progetti high tech quali i centri direzionali altamente tecnologici che ospitano grandi realtà aziendali del terziario avanzato. In particolare il Centro La Vela, dove sono ospitate importanti software house e il digital campus Talent Garden Pisa, e il primo green building a Pisa dedicato al fondatore dell’omonima impresa ossia il Centro Direzionale Umberto Forti, uno dei lavori più ambiziosi affrontati negli ultimi anni e vero simbolo di edilizia sostenibile di tutta la regione Toscana.

Name: Construction Di Paolo
Description:
UNE PASSION: LE TRAVAIL DE QUALITÉ
Né dans une famille d’entrepreneur, Emilio a grandi avec le désire de fonder son entreprise. Curieux et autodidacte de nature, il n’était pas rare de le voir aux abords de chantiers des journées entières afin de comprendre comment bien construire.

Il fait ses premières armes au sein d’une entreprise familiale et travaille sur des projets de construction variés. Consciencieux, il met tous ses efforts à assurer la satisfaction complète des clients dont il est responsable. Sa réputation pour un travail de qualité commence dès lors à se bâtir.

Il fonde son entreprise en 1986 et s’évertue à transmettre sa passion pour le travail bien fait à chacun des membres de son équipe. La croissance et la stabilité financière de l’entreprise sont au rendez-vous et mènent à son incorporation en 1998 : CONSTRUCTION DI PAOLO INC voit le jour.

En 2014, dans la foulée de la croissance de ses affaires, l’entreprise aménage son nouveau siège social à Saint-Laurent. Le bâtiment complètement rénové d’une superficie de 2 500 m2 abrite le magasin-entrepôt, une salle de coupe et de montage ainsi que les bureaux administratifs.

L’arrivée récente du fils aîné d’Emilio – Giuseppe Di Paolo – à la vice-présidence, ajoute une nouvelle perspective ainsi qu’une vision dynamique et actuelle à nos projets.

Fière de ses réalisations et s’appuyant sur l’ensemble de ses compétences reconnues, Construction Di Paolo poursuit aujourd’hui sa croissance avec une passion qui défie le temps : la passion pour le travail de qualité.

Name: The BS and Beer Show
Description:
BS&Beer is your go‑to destination for building science, creative construction solutions, and a refreshing take on making high‑performance homes. We blend expert insights in HVAC, materials, control layers, vapor management, and airtightness with smart humor, craft‑beer culture, and a real‑world community vibe. We’re not just talking theory—we’re in the trenches, unpacking lessons from the field, learning from mistakes, and having fun while we do it.

 What we do

Host weekly podcast episodes diving into technical fundamentals: from vapor‑permeable assemblies to thermal bridging to dynamic moisture control.

Feature honest roofer and HVAC pro stories—mistakes included—to help the broader community avoid the same pitfalls.

Bring in manufacturers, engineers, and experienced GC voices to share insights on emerging materials and performance‑based detailing.

 Who it’s for
Our audience includes home‑building professionals, architects, DIYers, energy‑efficiency advocates, and anyone curious about how to build smarter, safer, and greener homes. Whether you’re building an airtight Passive House or retrofitting an older home to improve occupant comfort, we deliver rigor and relevance—with personality.

 Why it matters

We simplify complex topics: think “vapor drive explained over a pint,” or “layering control layers like you’d build a good brewery tap wall.”

We foster a collaborative community: crowdsourcing questions, troubleshooting tricky assemblies, and sharing data‑backed case studies.

We mix rigor with real life: no jargon labyrinths—just clear, practical takeaways you can apply tomorrow.

 Join the conversation
Follow us to catch all our current and archived episodes, behind‑the‑scenes footage, event invites, and community‑driven Q&A. Whether you’re here for professional growth or the below‑the‑surface geekery, there’s always a seat at the (virtual) bar.

BS & Beer: Building science served cold

Name: BuildWorks LLC
Description:
Welcome to BuildWorks LLC, a premier construction company specializing in large residential homes. Founded in 2022, we are committed to delivering exceptional construction projects with personalized service and attention to detail.

At BuildWorks LLC, we understand that building a home is a major investment and a deeply personal endeavor. That's why we work closely with our clients to ensure that their vision is brought to life. We offer a range of services, from initial consultation and design to project management and construction, all tailored to meet the unique needs of each client.

Our team of skilled professionals brings years of experience to every project, and we use only the highest quality materials and the latest construction techniques to ensure that our work exceeds your expectations. Whether you're looking to build a custom home from scratch, remodel an existing home, or add an addition to your current property, we have the expertise and resources to make it happen.

At BuildWorks LLC, we are committed to delivering a seamless and stress-free construction experience. We understand that communication is key, and we work closely with our clients every step of the way to ensure that they are informed and involved in the process.

Thank you for considering BuildWorks LLC for your construction needs. We look forward to helping you bring your dream home to life!

~If opportunity doesn’t knock, build a door ~

Name: Central Energy Audits, LLC
Description:
Central Energy Audits is an energy consulting firm dedicated to helping homeowners, builders, and contractors create more efficient, healthier, and comfortable living spaces.  We ensure that buildings adhere to energy efficiency standards and regulatory guidelines for optimal performance and sustainability.

Central Energy Audits offers services designed to help clients comply with, and certify buildings through various programs. We achieve this by thoroughly analyzing building plans and efficiency details, conducting blower door, duct leakage, mechanical ventilation and other various tests, and using advanced software to determine energy code/program compliance and the ideal size for HVAC equipment and distribution systems. Our services include providing HERS Ratings, Manual J, S, and D calculations, LEED Ratings, Energy Star Certifications and NGBS Services to ensure optimal performance and energy efficiency for whatever your needs are.

Cada projeto é realizado com transparência e compromisso, porque sabemos que mais do que a  obra, nós entregamos confiança.
Agora diga-nos:
- Está satisfeito com o espaço onde vive ou trabalha?
- Já imaginou como seria ver o seu apartamento antigo convertido num open space luminoso e moderno?
- E se o escritório da sua empresa transmitisse a verdadeira identidade do seu negócio?

Nós, na Namaqua, não fazemos promessas vazias: mostramos e entregamos resultados.

Siga-nos, inspire-se com os nossos projetos, descubra dicas exclusivas de remodelação e veja como transformar a sua visão em realidade!

Deixe de imaginar. Siga-nos e veja a mudança acontecer ou fale connosco hoje mesmo e descubra como podemos transformar o seu espaço.

Name: GCITT BENIN SA
Description:
La Société GCITT BENIN S.A est spécialisée sur les prestations de construction de bâtiments, travaux publics et commerce général depuis 2008, avec pour mission de satisfaire les besoins en logements au Bénin en respectant des normes de durabilité écologique et celles de sa clientèle.

GCITT BENIN SA se positionne pour répondre aux besoins des familles et des investisseurs en matière de construction immobilière, d'aménagement et de valorisation foncière, et de tous les services connexes.

Notre capacité technique
Pour réaliser sa vision, la GCITT BENIN SA, s’est dotée d’une série de matériels et d’équipements techniques de production. Outre les machines, la société s’appuie aussi depuis bientôt une décennie, sur :

Une équipe d’hommes et de femmes bien formée, avec un savoir-faire et une expérience avérée ;

Des moyens de production performants ;

Une technologie adaptée à l’environnement et créatrice d’emplois.

À nos Clients
Satisfaire nos clients, en respectant leurs exigences de même que celles légales et règlementaires est notre priorité. La GCITT BÉNIN SA s'évertue chaque jour à offrir des services de construction d'excellente qualité en utilisant les technologies les plus résilientes et une main-d'oeuvre qualifiée, de la conception du projet jusqu’à son achèvement.
À nos parties intéressées
Nous gagnons et préservons la confiance de nos parties intéressées en maintenant un degré élevé de transparence dans toutes nos opérations.

À l'environnement
La préservation de la santé, de la sécurité au travail et de l’environnement est au centre de nos préoccupations.

À la communauté
Nous croyons que notre succès doit profiter au Bénin et à l’Afrique, que notre prospérité doit soutenir l'économie du pays. Pour cela, nous nous investissons pour le développement des localités d’intervention ; et intégrons notre entreprise à leurs initiatives.

A konečněspolečnost Kindt Construction se specializuje na stavební služby nejvyšší kvality se silným zaměřenímna hydroizolační systémy. Jako společnost klademe důraz na inovace, profesionalitu a spokojenost zákazníků. Náš tým odborníků se snaží dosahovat výjimečných výsledků a překonávat očekávání našich klientů. Připojte se k nám ve společnosti Kindt Group, kde společně utváříme lepší budoucnost, vytváříme udržitelné nemovitosti, podporujeme zavádění obnovitelných zdrojů energie, poskytujeme finanční řešení na míru a poskytujeme stavební služby nejvyšší kvality.

Name: SmartReno
Description:
SmartReno

At SmartReno, we’re redefining how homeowners and contractors navigate residential renovation.

The traditional renovation process is fragmented, stressful, and inefficient — homeowners face confusing quotes and uncertainty, while contractors waste valuable time chasing unqualified leads and managing disjointed communication.

SmartReno bridges that gap.
We’re building an AI-powered renovation marketplace that combines real-world expertise with modern technology to simplify every step of the renovation journey — from initial project intake to estimate generation, contractor bidding, and final project completion.

For homeowners, SmartReno provides:
 A streamlined process with verified contractors
 Transparent estimates and timelines
 Confidence in every renovation decision

For contractors, SmartReno delivers:
 Qualified project opportunities
 Faster onboarding and bidding
 More time spent building — not estimating

Our mission is simple: make renovations smarter, faster, and more transparent.

Whether it’s a kitchen remodel, basement finish, or full home addition — SmartReno ensures the experience is as seamless and trustworthy as it should be.

"Renovations Simplified"

Brick n Mortar is more than just a name — it's a promise. A promise to bring structure to your dreams and precision to every project we touch. Whether it’s crafting your dream home, renovating a legacy space, or managing turnkey interiors, Brick n Mortar blends old-school values with new-age execution.

Backed by a growing network of verified vendors and skilled professionals, we simplify the entire construction and design journey. From vendor onboarding to approvals, from material selection to final finish, we ensure a seamless experience — powered by systems, not chaos. Our proprietary workflows and admin dashboards help clients track every detail, while our curated teams ensure execution with heart and craft.

At Brick n Mortar, we believe the foundation of every great structure is trust. That's why we focus on clear communication, timely delivery, and zero compromise on quality. No more chasing contractors, no more project guesswork. You get what you sign up for — and often, a little more.

We cater to homeowners, NRI clients, corporate offices, commercial spaces, and anyone who seeks construction that’s accountable and aesthetics that last. Our current footprint spans multiple regions in India, and we’re just getting started.

Whether you’re building from scratch or giving life to an old space — Brick n Mortar is your one-stop solution for construction, interiors, and everything in between.

Your dream. Our blueprint. Let’s build it, beautifully.

״בונים יחד״ הנו מיזם-מאגר חברתי של אנשי ונשות מקצוע מענף הבנייה אשר מתנדבים לעמוד לצד המשפחות שנפגעו לסייע להם בשיקום המרחב הבנוי, הבתים והדירות ביישובי העוטף והצפון שנהרסו או נפגעו במלחמת ״חרבות ברזל״. כל זאת על מנת להחזיר את התושבים והמשפחות למרחבים בנויים חדשים ומתחדשים במהרה.

בשעה זו אנו פועלים להקמת מאגר איכותי של מתכננים ויועצים בעלי הכשרה מקצועית אשר ייקחו חלק משמעותי בשיקום בתי המגורים ביישובי העוטף ביום שאחרי. המתנדבים במאגר יתחייבו לעמוד לצד המשפחות שנפגעו וללוות אותם בתהליך התכנון, הבנייה והשיפוץ לו הם נדרשים ביום שאחרי.

"Bonim Yahad" is an initiative that brings thousands of construction industry volunteers together into a community committed to assisting families affected by the "Swords of Iron" war. Our professional aim is to reconstruct homes and apartments as swiftly as possible in order to enable residents to return home to new and revitalized living spaces.

Name: Adexia Bo-Partner
Description:
Adexia Bo-Partner är Byggföretaget som skiljer sig från dem flesta andra i byggbranschen.

Vårt viktigaste motto är att alla kunder skall ha högsta prioritet!

Detta är väldigt sällsynt i byggbranschen, därför har vi tagit fram ett helt nytt sätt att arbeta på för att säkerställa att man alltid skall få levererat det man förväntar sig, och alltid få svar på sina frågor.

Vi har även tagit fram ett hållbarhetsprogram som vi arbetar med för att alla kunder skall tydligt veta vad man betalar för, och när vi är färdiga med det vi har tagit på oss.


Vi är verksamma i hela Skåne men även i Stockholm med omnejd, vi arbetar med totalentreprenad och hanterar dem flesta uppdragen stora som små.


Nere i Skåne har vi specialiserat och tagit fram ett mäklare anpassat koncept som är helt unikt, och ger en rad värde för både mäklare och slutkund, vi har arbetat med dem största mäklarföretagen i Skåne sedan 2011, vi är helt unika och har byggt konceptet tillsammans med dem ledande mäklare företagen i Sverige. 

 
Vi svarar alltid i telefon, vi tar av oss skorna, städar efter oss, men framför allt så håller vi vad vi lovar!

Testa oss ring 040-30 90 00

Alt: 070-7661124

As a married home remodeling team, they work with private clients when they aren’t squeezing in time to renovate their 115+-year-old home in a small town near Philadelphia.

Together, they share design and how-to blogs and videos on MyFixitUpLife.com. They hosted a nationally syndicated radio show, have written for national magazines, contributed to national and local TV shows, and authored books.
