Name: Spar- und Bauverein Solingen eG
Description:
Die Spar- und Bauverein Solingen eG ist mit rund 14.000 Mitgliedern und ca. 130 Mitarbeitenden die größte Wohnungsgenossenschaft des Rheinlandes mit eigener Spareinrichtung und verfügt über ca. 1.750 Häuser mit ca. 7.000 Wohnungen. Allen Bevölkerungsschichten modernen und sicheren Wohnraum zu fairen Bedingungen zu bieten – diesem Anspruch fühlt sich der SBV seit seiner Gründung vor über 125 Jahren verpflichtet. Heute ist die Genossenschaft aus dem Leben der Solinger Stadtgesellschaft nicht mehr wegzudenken: Fast jeder zehnte Solinger, jede zehnte Solingerin ist Mitglied der Genossenschaft, jede:r Achte wohnt in einem Haus der Spar- und Bauverein Solingen eG. Als Genossenschaft investieren wir jährlich zweistellige Millionenbeträge in unsere Immobilien, um sie auf dem neusten Stand zu halten und schaffen neuen Wohnraum.

𝗨𝗻𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗻𝗲𝗵𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘀𝗸𝘂𝗹𝘁𝘂𝗿

⨀   Werte wie Solidarität, Demokratie, Verantwortung, gegenseitige Achtsamkeit und Herzlichkeit sind bei der Spar- und Bauverein Solingen eG  im Leitbild verankert und werden auch im Sinne eines genossenschaftlichen Miteinanders gelebt.

⨀   Wir fördern einen respektvollen Umgang miteinander und eine transparente, wertschätzende Kommunikation innerhalb der Abteilungen, zu anderen Kollegen:innen und Gewerken der Genossenschaft, unseren Mitgliedern und in die Gesellschaft hinein.

⨀   Auch gemeinsame Freizeitaktivitäten werden angeboten: etwa die Teilnahme an einem Firmenlauf, an den Aktionen "Mit dem Rad zur Arbeit" und "Stadtradeln" ebenso wie ein sommerliches Grillfest und eine festliche Weihnachtsfeier.

Mit unserem variablen, seriellen Modulbau bieten wir ultimative Vielseitigkeit, ob für den einzelnen Nutzer, für Betreiber großer Wohnanlagen oder Investoren. Durch die Modulbauweise sind 1er-, 2er-, 3er-Cubes und mehr möglich. Dadurch sind Wohneinheiten mit Größen von 19 qm bis zur Wunschgröße problemlos machbar.

Die XSCUBE Wohnmodule sind wie Bausteine, die sich nach Wunsch aneinanderreihen, stapeln und verbinden lassen. Mit diesem System findet jeder Bauherr für sein Vorhaben die optimale, maßgeschneiderte Lösung.

Und das Schönste: Unsere XSCUBES werden fix und fertig geliefert, ganz nach dem Prinzip »plug & live«. Aufstellen, anschließen, wohnen !!!

The Builder Collective brings Consultants, Agents, and Builders together through:

• Local leadership chapters run by vetted Builder Sales Consultants
• Professional education and training tailored to new construction
• A national referral and collaboration network
• Plug-and-play event systems for agent education and community building
• Market positioning and leadership opportunities through city boards
• A comprehensive online training platform designed to elevate industry standards
• A National Board driving innovation and best practices across U.S. markets

Our mission is simple:
Elevate the Consultant. Elevate the Builder. Elevate the Industry.

As new construction becomes a growing share of the U.S. housing market, we are committed to equipping industry professionals with the tools, systems, and relationships needed to thrive at the highest level.

We’re now expanding into markets across the country for our 2026 launch.

Name: Smartblocks Homes
Description:
We build intelligent, sustainable, infinitely customizable pre-fab smart homes of the future.

We intend to disrupt traditional housing industry model by addressing three key challenges: supply chain constraints leading to long lead times, shortage of qualified workers leading to complexity and time consuming construction, and lack of innovation. 

Smartblocks eliminates traditional supply chain hurdles by shipping prefabricated ready-to-assemble lightweight building panels (“smart blocks”) directly from our factory to the consumer. Our homes are assembled ”IKEA-style” in three easy steps, with the help of a simple app in just 5 days, and do not require professional skills or specialized tools. They are designed using the latest technologies and materials, that are highly energy efficient, eco-friendly, lightweight and durable.  Our custom “smart blocks” are designed from the ground up for IoT integration, and are pre-built with all the necessary infrastructure to run a smart home.  

The final product is a luxurious, stylish and cozy, green high-tech dwelling with superior energy efficiency, powered by the latest in AI technology. All this at a fraction of a cost of a traditional house.

Il est également possible de visiter des réalisations pour vous aider à vous projeter et vous permettre de constater la qualité du travail.

(*) Les Maisons batibat - créées en 1984 - sont fortes de plus de 1200 réalisations. Constamment à l'écoute des souhaits des futurs propriétaires Laurent Maudens, son dirigeant, a l'exigence de construire des maisons avec rigueur et professionnalisme, adaptant ainsi les projets au plus près des désirs de ses clients. La réussite d'un chantier tient pour beaucoup aux rapports humains, aussi une attention toute particulière est accordée à la qualité des relations De plus un ensemble de garanties vient conforter la sécurité des clients : livraison aux prix et délais convenus, parfait achèvement....

Name: Exodus Design Build
Description:
Responsive. Reliable. Relational.


Hundreds of satisfied homeowners in the Greater Atlanta area know Exodus Design Build by these three core values. Our turnkey, design-build process and team of dedicated employees place clients in the driver’s seat on the journey to make their vision a reality.


We strategically walk beside clients through all aspects of the design process, creating a tailored luxury experience. Our team holds multiple degrees in interior design, making us a general contractor who sees beyond the mere nuts and bolts of a project to ensure the final product—and the process of getting there—takes homeownership delight to the next level.


Formed in 2015 by Brad Scarberry and Garrett Erath, Exodus Design Build emphasizes high-quality home construction and repair. Our service to clients in the Southeast allows us to send financial support to missions projects and relief work happening around the world.


What can I expect?


From dream to design to done, the Exodus Design Build team is ready to walk with you during every step of your home-improvement journey. Here’s what our turnkey process looks like:


Meet — We spend one-on-one time with you to ensure we catch your unique vision. Behind every project is a person, so we want to know you and hear the heart behind your dream.


Design — We produce detailed drawings, photographs, and a spec book that lists all materials to be used in your project. Like a Polaroid photo coming into focus, this stage allows you to see your vision as it will come to life.


Estimate — We create a detailed scope of work and propose a budget that works for you. Our design team is skilled at finding creative solutions to ensure you’re making a lasting investment in your home.


Build — We provide on-site direction with subcontractors and clients and oversee all aspects of production, including building and maintaining schedules, ordering materials, and managing vendor and subcontractor relationships. We do the heavy-lifting

Name: EVOLV Commercial Construction, Inc.
Description:
• Vision  • Solutions  • Value
EVOLV Commercial Construction provides visionary project management, worksite efficiency, and superior craftsmanship for tenant improvement and commercial construction projects in the San Francisco Bay Area.

What We Do

Every project is unique, whether it’s a new build, rehabilitation, a retrofit, renovation, or historical building restoration.

We begin every commercial construction project with pre-project analytics to identify problem areas and recommend solutions well before construction begins. With a smart plan in place, we work collaboratively with owners, managers, architects, and our construction partners to move efficiently through all project phases.

Our Founder

Founder and CEO Matthew J. Moore launched the company in 2004 with decades of experience in construction, project management, and a commitment to superior craftsmanship. Matthew was inspired to create a company culture focused on smart planning, worksite efficiency, and quality results. In 2019 the original company, MJ Moore Design & Construction, was renamed EVOLV Commercial Construction Inc. to reflect the company’s growth and his clients’ desires for custom environments in step with today’s market.

Enjoy the benefits of a smooth running EVOLV project!

• Pre-project analytics, pre-construction problem resolution
• Orderly construction worksite areas, cleaned daily
• Frequent progress and schedule updates
• Easy access to the EVOLV project team
• Superior results

Name: Szczęśliwe wnętrze sp. z o.o.
Description:
Nie lubimy pisać bajek. 
Każdy chciałby usłyszeć, że wszystko pójdzie jak po maśle, z delikatną muzyką w tle. Prawda jest taka, że w remontach jest od groma niespodzianek, delikatnie mówiąc. Wszystko może pójść dobrze jak i wszystko może się popierniczyć. 
Dla nas najważniejsze to zawsze znaleźć rozwiązanie, zawsze trzymać emocje na wodzy i dbać o siebie i dobrostan klienta i powierzonych nam środków, nieruchomości i materiałów. To trudna branża, my nie jesteśmy w niej od 3 lat, a od ponad 13 lat, także wiemy co robimy i co potrafimy.

Name: Viersener Aktien Baugesellschaft AG
Description:
Die Viersener Aktien-Baugesellschaft AG ist das Wohnungsunternehmen der Stadt Viersen. Seit 1898 versorgt es die Viersener und alle die in Viersen wohnen wollen mit vielfältigem, angenehmen und bezahlbarem Wohnraum. Die VAB vermietet, errichtet, verwaltet und veräußert Wohn- und Gewerberaum sowie Objekte der sozialen und öffentlichen Infrastruktur.

Mit rund 3.100 eigenen und 600 verwalteten Wohnungen sind wir der größte Wohnungsvermieter vor Ort.

Dazu gehört auch die Wohnungsvermietung für den Gemeinnützigen Bauverein Dülken eG, für den die VAB die Geschäftsbesorgung durchführt.

Unser breites Wohnraumangebot bietet Lebensraum für die unterschiedlichsten Wohnwünsche und in allen Preislagen. Bestimmt ist auch für Sie etwas dabei.

Our Core Values: Excellence, Honesty, Loyalty, & Integrity. Our certified technicians have over ten years of experience in the chimney & painting industry.

Genesis Chimney has a full menu of fireplace and chimney services. We have seen the damage caused by chimney fires and do not want this to happen to families in our communities.

• Gas Fireplace Installation/repairs
• Wood Fireplace Installation/repairs
• Pellet Stove Installation/repairs
• Wood Fireplace and Stove Annual Service
• Gas Fireplace Annual Service
• Chimney and Fireplace Inspections
• New Chimney Construction and Repairs
• Chimney Relining and Resurfacing
• Chimney Cap, Damper, and Stainless Steel Chase Cover Installation
• Fireplace Facelift
• Fireplace Repairs
• Chimney Metal Vent Installation
• 3rd Degree Creosote Removal
• Dryer Vent Cleaning

We install, inspect, and repair fireplaces that are of the highest quality. Our experienced team of certified, professional chimney technicians can repair, sweep and clean your chimney, no matter its age or type.

Chimneys and fireplaces never go out of style. From older townhomes in Washington,D.C. to newer ranch-style homes in Northern Virginia and Central Maryland, homeowners gather around their fireplaces nightly for meals, television, homework and entertainment. It’s a gathering place for their busy lifestyles. 

Additionally, for many other homeowners, it’s a source of heat. Your fireplace works hard during the cold fall and freezing winter to keep your home comfortable. It has to be working at maximum capacity, year-round, to provide the heat your home needs.

We are certified by the CSIA (Chimney Safety institute of America), Certified Chimney Sweep, Masonry Repairs, Chimney Relining, and Chimney Physics. 

Certification # 10034

And also an NFI (National Fireplace Institute) Certified Gas Specialist.

Certification #180649

We are also licensed, insured and bonded.

Name: APGAir
Description:
@APGAir Understands the Importance of Air Purification
While COVID-19 may no longer be top of mind for some organizations, recent surveys and continued research show that the need to improve IAQ is here to stay. The devastating global impact of the latest pandemic permanently altered public perceptions of indoor air quality and how organizations need to change. Employees are aware of the impact of air quality on their health.

The push for cleaner indoor air in our workplaces has been led by public health researchers, national associations and the White House, which have all recognized the role employers, contractors and consultants can play in designing and improving workplaces for better indoor air quality (IAQ). Fellowes surveyed over 1,000-employees of all ages and found that only 1-in-3 said the air was very clean. However 73% of people surveyed agreed that the quality of the air they breathe directly impacts their health and well-being.

Indoor Air Quality Management is Here to Stay
According to research conducted by Carbon Lighthouse, over 80% of millennials said they would feel safer returning to the office if they had access to real-time, transparent information on indoor air quality.

Name: Bijou Homes Australia
Description:
“If you think you’re too small to make a difference, you haven’t spent a night with a mosquito”

– African proverb

Once upon a time, the world was a bigger place – and the spaces wider in between. Today, however, the planet faces very real challenges in the shape of resources, waste, overcrowding and the effects of climate change. As a result, there is a greater focus on sustainability and liveability in the spaces that we choose to call our own.

Enter the ‘Tiny Home’ movement – and actually, movement is a big part of the Bijou story. Because while the lavender and herbs may eventually grow happily around the base, these dwellings are designed to MOVE!

That’s where Bijou’s founders – Adele Greenberg and Braam Walters – bring a unique energy and practical, transport-based background to the world of tiny homes. The pair have more than 50 years combined experience in the design, manufacture, sales and management of motorhomes, buses, trailers and trucks – everywhere from urban environments to the remote African wilderness and even the rugged mining industry.

More recently, while in roles relating to sustainability and the customer experience, they identified an itch that wasn’t being scratched in the Tiny Home market. A high-end design that would promote living spaciously, yet portably, in a single-level layout that delivered a small footprint without sacrificing a sense of luxury. And so, Bijou was born – and we cannot wait to share it with you!

Name: Elea Costruzioni s.r.l.
Description:
Casa è il luogo dove vivi, quello in cui ci sentiamo a nostro agio, amati, protetti.
Casa è anche, scriveva già Le Courbusier nel 1923, una macchina per abitare. E cioè un organismo che funziona per garantire il nostro benessere.
E non c’è niente di più bello che costruire luoghi dove le persone stiano bene.
Su questa filosofia e dall’incontro di Giuseppe e Sergio Ponzio con Antonello Ricci nasce nel 2018 Elea costruzioni.

Giuseppe e Sergio Ponzio hanno contribuito a trasformare un’azienda nata – da un’intuizione del nonno Giuseppe nel pieno della seconda guerra mondiale – per il trattamento superficiale dell’alluminio in un gruppo leader nella progettazione e costruzione di finestre, facciate continue, portoncini e serramenti. Una storia di successo, coraggio, ricerca, sperimentazione e innovazione. E anche di rigore, serietà e affidabilità.

Antonello Ricci è stato per più di venti anni ceo di società immobiliari e ha concorso a realizzare – senza mai perdere la curiosità, il rigore e la passione della prima volta – decine e decine di costruzioni residenziali, commerciali e alberghiere in tutta Italia.

Elea costruzioni nasce con l’ambizione di realizzare case belle, funzionali e innovative nel rispetto dell’ambiente e della storia che ci circonda.

Każdy nasz projekt charakteryzuje się dbałością o detale, przemyślanym układem przestrzennym oraz wykorzystaniem nowoczesnych technologii budowlanych.

Dlaczego HEGRA Deweloper?
- Jakość i solidność – Gwarantujemy trwałość i niezawodność naszych inwestycji.
- Design i funkcjonalność – Projektujemy wnętrza, które zachwycają estetyką i komfortem użytkowania.
- Lokalizacje z potencjałem – Nasze inwestycje powstają w starannie wybranych miejscach, zapewniających wygodę życia.
- Doświadczenie i pasja – Łączymy wieloletnie doświadczenie z pasją do tworzenia wyjątkowych przestrzeni.

Description:
Vi på A13Bostad tror på ett annat sätt att bygga bostäder. Vi vet att många svenskar drömmer om att bo i ett eget hus med trädgård, men att det är svårt att hitta ett sådant boende som passar både plånboken och livsstilen. 

Därför har vi utvecklat ett nytt koncept: prisvärda och yteffektiva enplanshus i radhus- och parhusstil. Våra hus är byggda med hög kvalitet, modern design och smarta lösningar. De passar perfekt för dig som vill ha ett eget markboende utan att behöva kompromissa med komfort eller service.

Vi vill skapa trygga och trivsamma bostadsområden där människor kan leva, umgås och växa tillsammans. Vi bryr oss om våra kunder och vår miljö och vi vill bidra till att lösa bostadskrisen i Sverige genom att erbjuda fler alternativ på bostadsmarknaden till billigare priser.

Name: Northeast Builders & Remodelers Association of Massachusetts
Description:
The Northeast Builders & Remodelers Association of Massachusetts (NEBA) is the local chapter of the National Association of Home Builders (NAHB) and the Home Builders & Remodelers Association of Massachusetts (HBRAMA). We are an association of builders & remodelers as well as associate members representing all aspects of the home building industry including lumber yards, financial institutions, subcontractors, suppliers and the most successful and influential business people in the area.

NEBA is comprised of more than 230 member companies in the greater Merrimack Valley area. We represent over 90 categories associated with the building trade. Membership is open to all companies and individuals who support the housing industry. We openly welcome member participation in all association activities.

NEBA is a great organization to meet other professionals associated with the building industry. Many long-term and financially-rewarding relationships and partnerships began at NEBA-sponsored events.

If you answer YES to any of the questions below, you should join today!!
- Are you in the building industry?
- Do you want to grow your business?
- Do you want to have representation on Capitol Hill & Beacon Hill to help stop regulations that adversely impact the building industry?
- Do you need to be up to date on the latest building code issues, requirements and changes?
- Do you want easy access to the most powerful, successful & influential business people in your area?

Members of NEBA are automatically members of both the state association, HBRAMA, and NAHB.

Name: conwerk
Description:
Herzlich Willkommen, bei…

conwerk - Bau clever. Lebe grün.

Unser Produkt: 
DAS MODUL-MEHRWEG-HAUS
Modular. Zirkulär. Digital.

„Wir von conwerk sind Neudenker, Planer, Realisierer und überzeugt davon - die Zukunft des Bauens ist modular und grün!

Wir glauben an eine umweltverträgliche und kulturorientierte Lebensweise der Menschen. Daraus ziehen wir die Inspirationen für die Verwirklichung unserer Vision von zirkulären Häusern. 

Zirkuläres Denken und Planen liegt in unserer Natur und ist der Schlüssel für eine umweltverträgliche Kreislaufwirtschaft. Wir müssen jetzt beginnen die durch uns produzierte anthropogene Masse über den ursprünglichen angestrebten Verwendungszweck hinaus, unter neusten Erkenntnissen in einem geschlossenen und sicheren System zu nutzten, um den Planeten zu entlasten und ihn für uns zu bewahren. Nur so werden wir unseren eigenen Lebensraum und den immensen Bedarf zur Versorgung der Menschheit sicherstellen und dabei unser Wirtschaftssystem erhalten können. 

Die Bauwirtschaft ist die Branche mit dem höchsten Abfallaufkommen, weshalb sie neu entwickelt und zukunftsfähig gemacht werden muss. Zum einen muss die große Masse des Vorhandenen neu verwertet und Neues unter der Einhaltung einer verantwortungsbewussten Kreislaufwirtschaft hergestellt werden.

Unser Ziel: Die Grüne Welle im Wohnungsbau anstoßen und für einen klimaneutralen Gebäudebestand sorgen. Unsere Modul-Mehrweg-Häuser bewirken vielzählige positive Effekte auf die Umwelt und Gesellschaft und leisten damit einen wichtigen Beitrag auf dem Weg zur Circular Economy.“

Name: The Bedek Man
Description:
Hi, I'm Chanina Landesman.

I was born in Israel and moved to Los Angeles when I was 7 years old and remained there until I graduated high school. My wife and I met in 2017 and we currently reside in the Merkaz, Israel with our two children. 

Working in the construction industry for almost a decade, I’ve gained an immense amount of knowledge about building in Israel. 

After helping out many friends and family members who bought homes in Israel, I became aware that the process is not so simple; especially for those who do not speak Hebrew well or who are not in the country while their home is being built.

After completing my bedek bayit (home inspection) certification, I wanted to gear specifically towards English speakers because I believe they deserve the best service possible in a language they feel comfortable with.

Follow our page to learn all there is to know about home inspections in Israel or send us an email to book your consultation today!

Description:
Quality Drywall Midwest, Inc. is located in New Hope, MN and is proud to be a 4th generation, family- owned construction company. We have been a leader in providing quality commercial drywall services for well over 50 years. Our story has a deep history. Our family roots began with the first drywall contractor in Minnesota founded under the leadership of our grandfather, (the late) Boyer Palmer. Our father, Bruce Palmer, continued his passion in the industry with the establishment of his drywall business. He instilled in us valuable knowledge, work ethic and commitment. Experience, hard work and education prepared us to continue the leadership and growth of the company; navigating the business through cycles of change, challenges and growth in the industry.

The Quality Drywall family extends well beyond our name; it is our work culture. We pride ourselves on having a loyal, experienced field team. The longevity and success of our company is attributed to our highly-trained  workforce, experienced project management team, establishment of a safe and productive work environment and dedication to exceptional standards.
Quality construction means delivering an exceptional end product. Whether it’s an office building remodel, or ground-up construction; we engineer value and savings into every phase of the job.  We will provide quality workmanship and experienced project management throughout the completion of your project. We offer competitive estimates to meet your budget goals and dedicated staff to meet your schedule and timelines.

Name: ECO-CLASSIC Sp. z o. o.
Description:
Działalność deweloperską na warszawskim rynku nieruchomości prowadzimy bez mała od chwili jego narodzin. Początki naszej firmy sięgają 1983 roku, kiedy to grupa architektów założyła przedsiębiorstwo projektowo – wykonawcze. Wraz z rozwojem rynku i przemianami gospodarczymi nasza działalność ewoluowała w kierunku deweloperskim, a w 1993 r. powstała firma realizująca ten nurt do dnia dzisiejszego - ECO-Classic. W ramach generalnego wykonawstwa i działalności deweloperskiej w trakcie tego czasu zrealizowaliśmy ponad 120 obiektów w kraju i za granicą, w tym 30 budynków z ponad 4200 lokali jako deweloper. Mamy doświadczenie w budowaniu i prowadzeniu działalności deweloperskiej, o czym świadczy fakt, że przetrwaliśmy różne, nawet gorsze okresy na rynku.
W każdej z naszych inwestycji projektujemy mieszkania jakich poszukują nasi klienci. Wsłuchując się w potrzeby osób odwiedzających nasze biura sprzedaży, odpowiednio przygotowujemy projekty, czyniąc nasze inwestycje i mieszkania odpowiedzą na oczekiwania naszych klientów.
Nasze aktualne inwestycje są realizowane w Warszawie i Gdańsku.
- Wolne Miasto, Gdańsk
- Moja Północna, Warszawa

Many companies claim that they are dedicated to quality and customer service, but very few actually live up to it. So what makes Peak25 Roofing different?

As a GAF Master Elite Contractor, we take great pride in our mission: to consistently train our people according to the highest standards of roofing excellence and to deliver superior value to our customers by educating them on the best solutions for their individual needs.

We designed our thorough Peak25 Roofing Inspection to evaluate the 25 most critical areas that could jeopardize your investment into your home. On every roof we evaluate, we perform and walk you through this essential inspection to provide you the peace of mind you deserve.

Our solutions, including the High Performance Roofing System – Powered by Peak25 Roofing, come with an industry-leading 25-Year Workmanship Warranty on qualifying homes. This combines with a non-prorated lifetime warranty on materials to give your home unbeatable warranty coverage.

Let us be your trusted partner for protecting your most valuable asset.

As our name (Latin for "craftsman") suggests, we are guided by a deep respect for time-honored building traditions, all while we build trust with every client.

We specialize in high-end projects that require meticulous craftsmanship, from historic preservation and whole-house renovations to complex new construction. Our 24-member team is comprised of highly skilled professionals, including the largest number of graduates from the American College of the Building Arts in Charleston. We have the capabilities to deliver excellence from foundation to finish.

Our passion is preserving Charleston's rich architectural heritage. We are experts at navigating the complexities of historic projects, working closely with the Board of Architectural Review to ensure smooth and authentic restorations. We believe our job is as much about working with people as it is about wielding hammers, and we are committed to using innovation and ingenuity to protect a building's integrity and a homeowner's investment.

Our Core Services:

Historic Preservation & Renovation

New Construction

Whole House Renovation

Design/Build Services

We are a proud member of the Preservation Society of Charleston, the Historic Charleston Foundation, and are a multi-year recipient of the prestigious Carolopolis Award for our work in historic preservation.

Frequently, the custom projects we take on involve some complex aspect in the design or architecture that makes other home builders shy away. An indoor pool, a net-zero energy home with a geothermal system, a full-sized gym, a two-story waterfall that drops magically into a koi pond in the basement. Selskapets hovedsatsningsområder er Oslo og Akershus. Vi ekspanderer forsiktig og kontrollert og har gode ordrereserver, og lav risikoprofil. Mange prosjekter er under utvikling til enhver tid. Name: HausShield Pro
Description:
The Future: Performance, Transparency, and Responsibility

HausShield Pro is built on responsibility. Wildfire is now a structural reality across the American West, and ignition-driven loss has outpaced the evolution of building materials. Anti-Fire Technology brings science directly to the surfaces where ignitions start and redefines how risk, documentation, and accountability move through the supply chain.

Who HausShield Pro Serves:

HausShield Pro supports the groups facing ignition risk every day—whether through construction, maintenance, or long-term community planning.

• Lumberyards and retail centers expanding WUI-focused categories
• Builders seeking an edge in wildfire-prone markets
• General contractors aiming to reduce construction-phase fire risk
• HOAs and planned communities updating mitigation plans
• Equestrian facilities vulnerable to ember intrusion and open-air ignition
• Wildfire councils and districts focused on community risk reduction
• Insurance restoration firms rebuilding fire-impacted properties
• Owners of legacy homes lacking ignition-resistant assemblies
• Rural and agricultural properties with multiple outbuildings and exposed wood

All of these groups face the same challenge: ignition probability. HausShield Pro delivers targeted tools that directly address that risk.

Where HausShield Pro Is Going Next:

Wildfire resilience won’t be defined by a single product or code requirement—it will be shaped by integrated, science-driven systems. HausShield Pro is advancing that approach through expanded ASTM and UL testing, deeper collaboration with fire authorities, new Anti-Fire Technology products, builder certification programs, equine-specific solutions, retail training, and insurance-aligned documentation.

The goal remains the same: lower ignition probability across surfaces, structures, and communities.

Ignition is predictable.
Ignition can be influenced.
Ignition can be reduced.

Description:
Your Backyard Should Feel Like Home
Here at Outdoor Kitchen Guy, we believe that your backyard should feel like home. Sure, it’s attached to your house, but do you truly feel at home in your own backyard? You deserve to enjoy your Orlando Outdoor Kitchen space. Fire up the grill while your kids splash in the pool. Shake up some martinis while you watch the fireflies. Entertain. Cook. Enjoy. As a company, we like to focus on the little things in life, and how we can use our Orlando Outdoor Kitchen to bring people together.

The Outdoor Kitchen
Most Americans spend the majority of their days indoors. We’re on a mission to help change that. The outdoor kitchen is a centerpiece of your family. Whether you have a barbeque island or a fully decorated outdoor dining area, this is where you and your loved ones will reconnect with each other and the beautiful outdoors. There are several different types of outdoor kitchens, and each one has a different focus. Some are minimalist, focused on simplicity. They’re functional, without distracting from the moment. Other outdoor kitchens are elaborate, custom-built and designed to fit you and your personality.

An Extension of Your Family
Speaking of personality, one of our top priorities is that your outdoor kitchen reflects you and your family. Just like your house should reflect who you are, your outdoor kitchen should feel like you. Our team of design experts work with you to create a design that fits you and your family’s lifestyle. When you work with our professional designers, you’ll be able to fully customize your outdoor kitchen aesthetic. Looking for a covered dining area that fits your Italian villa theme? We’ve got that. En cada proyecto, cuidamos cada detalle: la elección de la ubicación, la eficiencia energética, la sostenibilidad de los materiales y, por supuesto, la calidad constructiva.

En Geria Homes creemos que un buen proyecto no solo se mide por sus metros cuadrados, sino por la capacidad de mejorar la vida de quienes lo habitan. Por eso trabajamos con una filosofía basada en tres pilares:
 Transparencia: comunicación clara y constante con clientes e inversores.
 Innovación: diseño contemporáneo, procesos constructivos modernos y soluciones sostenibles.
 Compromiso: cumplir lo prometido en plazos, calidades y resultados.

Nuestra misión es clara: ser un referente en el mercado inmobiliario canario, creando desarrollos que no solo aporten valor patrimonial, sino también bienestar, seguridad y confianza.

Si buscas un socio fiable para invertir, comprar o desarrollar proyectos inmobiliarios en Canarias, en Geria Homes encontrarás un equipo que comparte tu ilusión y se compromete contigo en cada paso del camino.

 Conecta con nosotros y descubre cómo podemos construir juntos el futuro.

В сътрудничество с другите подразделения на холдинга, включително AST Beton, ние можем да гарантираме високо качество на използваните материали в строителството на нашите жилищни сгради. Това включва производството на бетон от най-висок клас, който се използва за големи жилищни и офис сгради в цялата страна.

Description:
The Gablok Australia system is a European designed, patent approved revolutionary insulated modular wood frame construction method that delivers a lower cost housing solution for owner-builders that can be built by any layman, making construction far easier, faster and more cost effective than traditional building methods. 

We are also in raising capital for our show homes - https://www.venturecrowd.com.au/s/lp/gablok-australia-eoi 

We’re a company that believes in giving you the tools, training and support you need to build your dream home with your own hands. That’s why our modular timber block construction system has been designed specifically to meet the needs of owner-builders, enabling everyday people to take control of their building project to save time and money by being an active part of the construction of their dream homes. 

Our system is an owner-builders dream, and its child’s play to build. The Gablok system is comprised of just 10 portable components delivered as a flat-pack construction system along with step-by-step plans. Construction involves connecting insulated modular timber blocks together by hand, laid directly on to a concrete slab, enabling DIY builders to construct the exterior and interior walls, floor and ceiling of their homes by hand in a matter of days, not weeks.

Notre mission : garantir l'esthétisme et la durabilité accrue de chaque ouvrage à travers des solutions de traitement adaptées.

Notre Force Opérationnelle:

Nous intervenons là où vous en avez besoin grâce à une double expertise  :

En Atelier Industriel : Capacité de traitement pour tous volumes et quantités. Nos infrastructures intègrent des machines spécialisées et adaptées à l'ensemble des besoins de la filière bois : flowcoater, cabines de pulvérisation, ponts roulants 10T, machines à teinter et vernir.

Sur Chantier : Une mobilité totale avec des équipements adaptés (micro-nacelles, échafaudages, cabines de pulvérisation mobiles, nacelles grandes hauteurs).

Expertise Spécifique & Réactivité:

Nous disposons d'une expertise reconnue dans l'ignifugation (prévention passive contre l'incendie / réaction au feu). 
Notre organisation nous permet une réactivité et une flexibilité optimales dans la gestion de vos flux et de vos calendriers de production.

Ouvrages Traités :
Tasseaux, panneaux (massif, CP, LC, MDF), structures CLT, menuiseries, bloc portes, volets bois).

Solutions techniques : 
Traitement biocide, lasures, solutions ignifuges, vernis hydro haute performance, laques et peintures microporeuses, Aqua Oil, vitrificateurs et saturateurs.

Nos Engagements:

Performance Durable : 
Sélection de produits haute performance et éco-responsables.
Rigueur Professionnelle : Respect strict des conditions d’application, des délais et recyclage systématique des déchets.

Qualité de Service : 
Conditionnement soigné, gestion rigoureuse des OPR/SAV et sécurité absolue de nos intervenants.

Name: :: ANGULAR DOMOS ::
Description:
ANGULAR DOMOS, se trata de una empresa de diseño y fabricación de  de pabellones geodésicos de lujo especialmente orientados a la industria del glamping premium y de los resorts de lujo con un fuerte componente de experiencialidad.

Somos especialistas en desarrollo de proyectos turísticos en la naturaleza. Estamos especializados en el turismo experiencial.

Fruto de esta especialización ha surgido el modelo Orbit, un modelo revolucionario que tiene varios aspectos que lo hacen único:

a) Cuidamos mucho el diseño y la parte sensorial a la hora de habitar el pabellón.
b) El sistema de giro buscando atardeceres, amaneceres o ver diferentes constelaciones, buscando privacidad o simplemente protección del viento, el calor o el frío.
c) Por otro lado, es el único domo o pabellón geodésico cuyo gran ventanal permite apertura y cierre estanco con sistema de corredera.
d) ANGULAR envía los triángulos del domo patetizado en un KIT listo para su instalación. Puede contratar a montadores locales o puede montarlo usted si dispone de algunos conocimientos de autoconstrucción. También puede contratarnos su montaje. Nuestros Domos se hacen únicamente con 2 tamaños de triángulos, y por tanto el montaje es más sencillo. Otros fabricantes pueden llegar a facilitar hasta 30 tipos distintos de triángulos lo que complica su montaje.
e) Usamos maderas certificadas de alta calidad y alta eficiencia energética. Aislantes naturales, en general huimos de productos químicos que no provengan directamente de la naturaleza.
f) Nuestros domos se pueden desmontar.
g) Los domos vienen ya tratados con aceites para barcos, de tal forma que su mantenimiento sea mínimo.

For oss er det viktig å kunne tilføre nærmiljøet vårt mer enn bare tjenestene vi tilbyr i det daglige. Vi lever etter følgende visjon: "KBBL skal bidra til at Kristiansundsregionen blir verdens beste bosted!" Dette forsøker vi å gjenspeile gjennom bl.a. stor bredde i våre byggeprosjekter. I tillegg til tradisjonell boligbygging, satser vi på prosjekter for seniorboliger, omsorgsboliger, tilpassede boliger for ungdom og en satsing på utbygging av heis i eksisterende bygninger. 

For KBBL er det viktig å også være en samfunnsengasjert støttespiller og initiativtaker til positive tiltak i nærmiljøet, være en pådriver for JA-kommunen Kristiansund, samt være med å støtte idretts- og kulturaktivitet.

Description:
David LeRoy Plumbing, Inc. is now called Ready & Able Plumbing, Heating & Air. 

Company president David LeRoy started his career in plumbing, heating, and air conditioning in 1981. He graduated from a 3-year course in high school Vo-Tech. David was a pipe fitter in the Navy for 4 1/2 years. 

After an honorable discharge from the Navy, he was anxious to start his own business, so he took a job as a plumbing apprentice and attended school twice a week for 4 years in order to take his plumbing journeyman's exam in Harrisburg. Two years later, he passed his plumbing masters exam. 

Today, with the help of many great people in the company, he runs the finest plumbing, heating, and air conditioning service and repair company between Harrisburg and York.

Жилищен комплекс „Елин Пелин“ е проект на архитектурно студио LOEL ARHITECTURAL DESIGN, който включва 44 двуетажни еднофамилни газифицирани къщи с три спални, споделени общи пространства и със собствени озеленени дворове. Разположен в източната част на софийското поле, между склоновете на Стара планина от север и Средна гора от юг – югоизток, в землище, което се чувства вечно и изпълнено с история.

Description:
Steel Structure Homes Inc. is an innovative leader in the construction industry, specializing in the design and development of steel-framed homes. Founded on the principles of sustainability, durability, and modern design, Steel Structure Homes has rapidly become is rising as a beacon of excellence in the field, delivering solutions that are not only environmentally friendly but also tailored to the modern homeowner's needs for flexibility and aesthetic appeal. 

After the unexpected closure of BONE Structure, a key player in steel home construction. This pivotal moment left a noticeable gap in the market and a group of visionary former BONE Structure employees, alongside an experienced builder of BONE homes, saw an opportunity to fill this void and advance the legacy of steel in residential building.

Fueled by a deep passion for steel construction and a desire to innovate within the space, this team founded Steel Structure Homes. Their mission was clear: to leverage the unmatched benefits of steel to offer durable, sustainable, and beautifully designed homes. They aimed to address the modern homeowner's needs for both environmental responsibility and aesthetic appeal, making Steel Structure Homes a symbol of modern, sustainable living.

Steel Structure Homes Inc. stands today as a testament to resilience, innovation, and the relentless pursuit of excellence. It represents not just a continuation of steel home construction but a new era of quality, sustainability, and design ingenuity in the industry. With a focus on customer satisfaction and a commitment to pushing the boundaries of what's possible in residential construction, Steel Structure Homes Inc. is not merely filling the void left by BONE Structure—it's redefining the future of homebuilding.

Description:
The Sound Vision designs and installs smart home systems for executives and entrepreneurs who are great at managing their businesses but ready to stop managing their homes.
We specialize in technology that makes daily life effortless: mornings that start with your favorite music, evenings that feel like evenings, movie nights that actually happen, and homes that respond to your family’s needs without complexity, frustration, or a learning curve.
Our approach is consultative, not transactional. We listen to how you live, design around your routines, and create systems that feel intuitive and invisible. Whether it’s lighting that adapts throughout the day, shades that open with the sunrise, security you can check from anywhere, or whole-home entertainment that just works, everything is built to give you back time and peace of mind.
Many of our clients work from home and appreciate a network that handles video calls reliably. But when you close your laptop, that’s where our story really begins. We help you transition from work mode to life mode, so you can be present for the moments that matter.
From seamless smart home systems to custom theaters and whole-home audio, we create technology that works in the background so you can focus on what’s happening in the foreground.

Name: W.E. Beaty Inc.
Description:
W.E. Beaty Inc. was founded in 1986 by Ernie Beaty. Ernie had worked for a company that did block laying when a builder came to him looking for someone who could perform multiple tasks in the home-building process. Ernie decided to start his own business, providing turnkey foundation services.

 

Ernie found success, both in the home-building and commercial realms, and built a staff of dependable and honest workers. His staff became like family to Ernie. He took great interest in their lives and did anything he could for his team.

 

Ernie’s sons, Scott and Stephen, grew up on their father’s job sites, riding their bikes around the dirt piles. They started working for the family during summers in middle school. Both started out as general laborers, learning the process from the ground up. Through the years, they moved through the ranks, becoming crew foreman. In 2013, Ernie turned the company over to the boys full time and retired (semi-retired, that is. Ernie will always have a part to play in his concrete family).

Our range of work includes, but is not limited to, reinforced concrete construction of culverts, communication tower foundations, tilt slab wall construction, heavy machinery foundations, walls, building foundations, piers, tank foundations, trenches, weirs, diversion channels, and flat work. En 2025, nous avons lancé la série Altera bigénération, conçue pour répondre aux réalités des familles modernes en alliant proximité, autonomie et design réfléchi. Cette approche innovante de la cohabitation met en avant le savoir-faire et le leadership des co-fondateurs Maxime Thérien et Maurice Dagenais.

Mais Harmonie Construction ne s’arrête pas à la bi-génération. Notre offre inclut aussi des maisons unifamiliales sur mesure, jumelées et habitations locatives, toujours livrées avec un souci du détail et une qualité d’exécution irréprochable.

Une offre résidentielle complète
Altera bigénération : Cohabitation réinventée avec flexibilité, design et durabilité.
Maisons unifamiliales sur mesure : Spacieuses, modernes et adaptées aux modes de vie contemporains.
Maisons jumelées : Confort optimisé sans compromis.
Habitations locatives : Conçues pour un mode de vie pratique et moderne.
Des milieux naturels d'exception
Nos projets, situés à Cantley et Val-des-Monts près de Gatineau, s’intègrent parfaitement dans le paysage naturel, offrant un cadre de vie alliant confort et accessibilité.

Des valeurs ancrées dans chaque projet
Collaboration, intégrité et excellence guident chaque réalisation. Notre équipe adopte une approche personnalisée, combinant innovation et savoir-faire pour livrer des habitations durables, fonctionnelles et esthétiques.

Rise Up: A Contractor's Journey into Residential Development

Our services include:
Intensive Workshops: Dive deep into the world of property development through our immersive, small-group sessions. Learn about site selection, planning, finance, and risk management in a collaborative environment.
One-on-One Mentoring: Receive personalized guidance as you navigate your first development project. Our experts are with you every step of the way, from concept to completion.
Funding Support: Leverage our extensive network and expertise to secure the right financing for your projects. We'll help you understand and access various funding options, from traditional loans to innovative joint ventures.
Networking Opportunities: Connect with fellow contractors-turned-developers, industry professionals, and potential partners through our exclusive events and community.
Ongoing Education: Stay ahead of the curve with our regular updates on market trends, regulatory changes, and best practices in residential development.
Whether you're looking to diversify your business, increase profitability, or completely transition into development, Rise Up provides the roadmap and support you need. We don't just teach theory – we help you apply it in the real world, guiding you through your first development and beyond.
Join us and elevate your career from building houses to developing com

Name: BIM PROBUILD PTE LTD
Description:
At BIM ProBuild, we specialize in revolutionizing the construction industry through cutting-edge Building Information Modeling (BIM) solutions. With a steadfast commitment to innovation and excellence, we empower construction projects of all scales to achieve enhanced efficiency, sustainability, and cost-effectiveness.


Who We Are

Founded on the principles of technological advancement and industry expertise, BIM Probuild has emerged as a leader in BIM services. Our team comprises skilled professionals who blend creativity with technical prowess to deliver comprehensive BIM solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of each client.


What We Do

We offer a full spectrum of BIM services, including:

BIM Modeling: Accurate and detailed 3D modeling for architectural, structural, MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing), and infrastructure components.
Clash Detection and Coordination: Streamlining project coordination and minimizing clashes through advanced clash detection tools.
Construction & As-built Drawings: Produce detailed drawings from the coordinated 3D model according to the project specifications.
Quantity Takeoff and Cost Estimation: Precise material quantities and cost estimates derived from BIM models.
4D and 5D BIM: Adding the dimensions of time (4D) and cost (5D) to BIM models for enhanced project scheduling and budgeting.


Why Choose Us

Expertise: Our team consists of BIM specialists with extensive experience across various industries.
Innovation: We stay ahead with the latest BIM technologies and methodologies.
Client-Centric Approach: Each project is approached with a focus on understanding client objectives and delivering measurable results.
Quality Assurance: Rigorous quality checks ensure accuracy and reliability in every deliverable.


Get in Touch

Explore the future of construction with BIM ProBuild. Contact us today to discuss how our BIM services can transform your next project.

Welcome to Cocoon Tiny Homes, where adventure meets craftsmanship! We are your gateway to the exhilarating world of tiny home living. With our amazing-looking tiny homes, we bring your wildest dreams of a life closer to nature to life.

At Cocoon Tiny Homes, we are fueled by a passion for exploration and a desire to simplify. Our mission is to provide a faster and more affordable way for intrepid individuals like you to embark on an extraordinary journey of living closer to nature while embracing a minimalist lifestyle.

We understand that you crave the thrill of the unknown and the freedom to roam wherever your heart desires. Our tiny homes are meticulously crafted to be your adventurous companion, ready to take you on a wild ride. Whether you're scaling down from a traditional home or seeking a more minimalist way of life, our homes offer the perfect blend of functionality, style, and affordability.

Imagine waking up to the breath-taking views of majestic mountains, tranquil lakes, or lush forests right outside your window. With Cocoon Tiny Homes, you can immerse yourself in the wonders of nature without sacrificing the comforts of home. Our homes are designed to seamlessly blend into their surroundings, allowing you to live in harmony with the great outdoors.
So, are you ready to embark on an extraordinary adventure? Are you prepared to simplify, explore, and connect with nature like never before? Cocoon Tiny Homes is here to accompany you on this thrilling journey. Let our amazing-looking tiny homes become your haven, your basecamp, and your refuge as you seek out new horizons and embrace the untamed spirit within you.
Get ready to dive headfirst into the world of tiny home living with Cocoon Tiny Homes. Unleash your adventurous spirit and create memories that will last a lifetime. Your dream of living closer to nature and embracing a minimalist lifestyle starts here, with us.
Adventure awaits. Are you ready to answer the call?

Together, all of the Authority Companies come together to provide the absolute best possible home remodel experience from planning to final result.

De l’étude financière à la remise des clés, les équipes de Maisons Millot assurent un accompagnement complet et personnalisé à chaque étape, avec une approche fondée sur l’écoute, la proximité et la transparence. Chaque réalisation est pensée pour répondre aux usages, aux contraintes et aux ambitions de ses clients.

Choisir Maisons Millot, c’est faire confiance à un constructeur local de référence, durablement implanté en Limousin, pour concevoir des projets adaptés et permettre à chacun de se sentir bien chez soi, aujourd’hui comme demain.

Name: CONSULTING VECTOR
Description:
L’EXIGENCE SUISSE AU SERVICE DU PATRIMOINE AZURÉEN

Pilotage indépendant de projets de rénovation et de valorisation immobilière

Objectif : un chantier maîtrisé — délais, qualité, budget — avec une information fiable, au bon moment.

Née en Suisse, Consulting Vector s’appuie sur une culture reconnue de ponctualité, de fiabilité et de précision, appliquée aujourd’hui aux projets immobiliers entre Cannes et Monaco.

Nous accompagnons des maîtres d’ouvrage particuliers et professionnels sur des projets de rénovation aux caractéristiques et contraintes propres, lorsque le maître d’ouvrage souhaite sécuriser ses décisions, maîtriser son budget et disposer d’une information claire et fiable tout au long du chantier.

 Notre rôle
Sécuriser les décisions, maîtriser les risques et contrôler l’exécution.
Nous ne vendons pas de travaux.
Nous pilotons et contrôlons, exclusivement dans l’intérêt du maître d’ouvrage.

 Le sens de Consulting Vector
Consulting
→ Anticiper, cadrer et sécuriser les décisions avant l’engagement des travaux.

Vector
→ Maintenir le projet sur sa trajectoire pendant l’exécution, sans dérive de coût, de délai ou de qualité.

 Notre méthode : S.A.F.E.
Sécurité – Assistance – Facilité – Efficience
Un cadre opérationnel clair pour éviter les dérives et rendre le chantier compréhensible.

 Une gestion lisible et factuelle
Suivi visuel, décisions documentées, information centralisée et accessible à distance.

 AMO & Maîtrise d’Œuvre
Cadrage stratégique et assistance au maître d’ouvrage (AMO).
Conception, pilotage technique et contrôle de l’exécution (MOE), selon les missions confiées contractuellement.

 Clients & prescripteurs
Particuliers, investisseurs, family offices, marchands de biens, promoteurs recherchant un pilotage indépendant, fiable et documenté.

Consulting Vector
Un pilotage indépendant.
Une méthode.
Des preuves.

Name: JM Investments
Description:
JM Investments is a property company formed in 2020 which harnesses the extensive knowledge and experience of its Director’s with the goal of creating homes in England to improve the worsening housing shortage.
The company is owned and operated by brothers Jason and Michael Cartwright who have a combined 55 years of experience specialising in Architecture, design and development.  During this time they have had significant involvement in many projects which have lead to the creation of homes for the more vulnerable people in our society.  JM Investments was born from the idea to not only develop new homes but create homes that suit the needs of the people that will live in them.  There can be a multitude of factors to consider when the requirement for a development is identified in any given location.  A ‘one size fits all approach’ can lead to the creation of homes which are not fit for purpose.

Working alongside our sister company, Architectural Consultancy P4BA, we believe in approaching each development individually to correctly capture the requirements for each home.  This is achieved by adopting a fully collaborative design process with housing, care and support providers.  The result is the creation of homes designed and developed to meet the specific needs of the people who will come to know these places as home.  Our inter-company relationship with P4BA brings design services in-house forging a holistic approach to the design and development of each home and allowing us to identify and unlock the potential in both land and properties to create much needed homes.

At JM Investments we have the team and resources to source and purchase suitable land and buildings, and in conjunction with P4BA we will work with housing providers to create the right homes for people.

Her journey began in 2011 when she purchased her first home, excited to embark on a full renovation. Faced with the reality of her home’s condition, Christine made the difficult decision to sell her dream home. This experience ignited her commitment to ensuring that other families wouldn’t have to endure similar challenges. As a woman in a predominantly male industry, she recognized the importance of being a voice for safe, healthy living environments.

Christine channeled her passion into founding Holistic Homes, a company dedicated to promoting wellness through construction and design.

Description:
Welcome to PRO4Mance, a leading provider of comprehensive property restoration and reconstruction solutions. With years of expertise and a commitment to excellence, we specialize in a wide range of services to help you restore your property after a loss.
Our core services include:
1.	Fire and Water Restoration: When unexpected disasters strike, our highly skilled team is equipped to handle the restoration process with precision and efficiency. From fire damage to water intrusion, we work diligently to bring your property back to its pre-loss condition.
2.	Mold Cleanup and Remediation: Our certified experts employ cutting-edge techniques to identify, contain, and eliminate mold infestations. We prioritize your health and safety while restoring your property to a clean and healthy environment.
3.	General Cleaning: Our comprehensive cleaning services ensure that your property maintains a pristine and inviting appearance. We use eco-friendly practices and advanced equipment to deliver exceptional results.
4.	Reconstruction and Remodeling: From minor repairs to complete property overhauls, our skilled craftsmen can transform your space to meet your unique vision. We approach each project with attention to detail and uncompromising quality.
5.	Roofing Services: As a full-service restoration company, we also specialize in roofing solutions. Whether it's repair, replacement, or maintenance, our team ensures your roof's longevity and resilience.

At PRO4MANCE, we take great pride in delivering prompt, reliable, and customer-centric services. Our knowledgeable team works closely with you to tailor solutions that suit your specific needs, adhering to the highest industry standards.

When you choose PRO4MANCE, you choose peace of mind. Let us be your trusted partner in safeguarding and enhancing your property's value and beauty. Contact us today for a consultation or to schedule our services."

Name: ST Construct (SA)
Description:
ST Construct specialises in building quality Custom Homes in the Adelaide Metro area. 

ST Construct is a family business, consisting of Sam & Georgia Tucci, building new homes for families since 2012. 

ST Construct offers a ‘Design & Construct’ service or ‘Construct Only’ service. 

Via our Design & Construct service, ST Construct guides families through the planning stage of their future home. This includes creating Building Plans through our network of trusted Architects & Building Designers through our introduction, engaging all the key third parties (such as Engineers and Energy Assessors), all the way through to achieving Council Development Approval.  Once approval has been achieved, ST Construct will then guide you through the process of making your selections, before construction can then commence. 

Alternatively, ST Construct also offer a Construct Only service. If you have already worked with your own Building Designer or Architect and you have all your necessary approvals in place, ST Construct is happy to build from these plans.

At ST Construct, we understand that building your family home is one of the most significant investments a family will ever make. That’s why at ST Construct, we only work with a small number of families at any one time. This is to ensure that every home gets the time and full attention that it deserves, giving every family a stress-free experience and building confidence.

Nasze dążenie do ciągłego doskonalenia przyniosło szerokie grono zadowolonych klientów oraz liczne nagrody i wyróżnienia. Wyróżnia nas elastyczność i otwartość na potrzeby mieszkańców, co przekłada się na wygodę życia. Jako deweloper, chcemy być długoterminowym partnerem, oferując wsparcie na każdym etapie zakupu mieszkania.

Nieustannie podnosimy standardy, oferując lepsze, wygodniejsze i bardziej ekologiczne mieszkania, dzięki zaufaniu naszych klientów. Każda inwestycja to zbiór doświadczeń i wysokich oczekiwań. Zespół, który tworzymy, z pasją podchodzi do realizacji projektów, zawsze stawiając na pierwszym miejscu potrzeby mieszkańców.

Name: HexHomes
Description:
HexHomes is rethinking prefabricated modular housing with customizability, sustainability, and affordability in mind. Using solar energy and greywater recycling systems, our homes maximizing efficiency while reducing climate impact. HexHomes aims to expand the housing market for the diverse populations of the Inland Empire and Southern California. Eventually, HexHomes hopes to build one-of-a-kind communities of HexHomes for families to thrive together. HexHomes will also focus on providing temporary or permanent housing relief for disaster affected individuals with minimal set-up time and effort.

The HexHomes design deviates from traditional design, drawing inspiration from the hexagonal beehive honeycomb. Hexagonal pods minimize wasted square footage by eliminating hallways found in rectangular construction and cleverly partitions the space. The hexagon has the perfect geometry for modular design, allowing for an infinite range of possibilities and customizability. With our hexagonal design, we have prioritized minimizing environmental impact while maximizing production capability.

s your local G.J. Gardner Homes Denver builders, we have up to date local knowledge.

Name: ELMNTL
Description:
Elemental is an architecture and fabrication studio. We build cabins, studios, and saunas for individual and hospitality clients to experience a simple way of belonging in nature. 

Every Elemental dwelling can be adapted and configured to your needs. The modular convenience of our factory-built spaces means they are shipped to you completed and installed on your site within hours.

We believe in design by nature: we're committed to planetary regeneration and biodiversity, so the structural DNA of our spaces is formed with natural, biodegradable, and decarbonizing materials. Designed for disassembly, Elemental materials can be reused for generations to come.

We believe in nature bathing: drawing inspiration from the Japanese practice of shinrin-yoku 自然浴 “forest bathing”, we embrace shinzen-yoku "nature bathing" - an invitation to live simply amidst the elements.

We wish for our spaces to inspire you to wander in the woods.

Elemental is headquartered in Boulder, Colorado.

Name: AVT UK
Description:
AVT UK is a specialist provider of advanced building performance diagnostics, offering Pulse Air Testing and 3D Heat Thermography solutions to the UK construction industry.

We support developers, architects, and contractors in achieving regulatory compliance, enhancing energy efficiency, and ensuring the integrity of the building envelope. Our non-invasive testing methods provide accurate, visual, and data-driven insights into air leakage, thermal bridging, and insulation performance.

By combining technical expertise with state-of-the-art technology, AVT UK delivers precise, actionable results that help streamline compliance with Part L of the Building Regulations and promote sustainable construction practices.

Core Services
Pulse Air Testing for airtightness compliance (Part L)

3D Heat Thermography for thermal performance analysis

Building Envelope & Airtightness Testing

Detailed reporting and compliance consultation

Trusted by professionals. Driven by data. Focused on performance.

Operating across the UK and serving residential, commercial, and industrial sectors.

Oferujemy profesjonalne usługi dla przemysłu, budownictwa mieszkaniowego, biur, hal magazynowych, obiektów komercyjnych oraz instytucji publicznych.

Realizujemy zarówno projekty w nowo powstających inwestycjach, jak i modernizacje istniejących obiektów, zapewniając klientom najwyższe standardy wykonania, bezpieczeństwo oraz nowoczesne rozwiązania techniczne.

Nasze prace obejmują m.in.:

instalacje wodno-kanalizacyjne,

instalacje grzewcze i sanitarne,

instalacje technologiczne dla przemysłu,

montaż, modernizację i serwis instalacji,

prace hydrauliczne,

kompleksowe wsparcie techniczne na każdym etapie inwestycji.

Działamy przede wszystkim na terenie Warszawy i całego Mazowsza, jednak realizujemy projekty również w innych częściach Polski — wszędzie tam, gdzie potrzebne są sprawdzone i solidnie wykonane instalacje.

Wyróżnia nas terminowość, rzetelność, doświadczenie oraz indywidualne podejście do każdej inwestycji. Współpracujemy z deweloperami, firmami budowlanymi, biurami projektowymi oraz klientami instytucjonalnymi, dostarczając rozwiązania dopasowane do potrzeb i technologii najnowszych standardów.

Name: A.M. HOME
Description:
Qu'est-ce que l'Assistance à Maîtrise d’Ouvrage (AMO) ?

Comme le souligne sa dénomination, l’assistance à maîtrise d'ouvrage (AMO) a pour fonction principale d’assister le maître d’ouvrage (MOA) dans la gestion d’un projet de construction neuve, de rénovation ou d’extension.

La raison d’être de l’assistance à maîtrise d'ouvrage (AMO) est de mettre des informations et des solutions objectives à la disposition des clients, afin de garantir les meilleures prises de décisions pour la réalisation des travaux.

L’AMO est le conseiller idéal dans les opérations de constructions immobilières. Il est au coeur du lien entre toutes les parties prenantes du projet. Il dispose des compétences qui font de lui un véritable chef de projet.

L’AMO en réalité joue un rôle de conseiller ou de consultant, il n’est pas habilité à agir au nom du maitre d’ouvrage.

Il doit coordonner tous les travaux et animer les entreprises.

Son but est d’assister le maître d’ouvrage dans les missions de suivi du planning, de contrôle technique et de la viabilité de son projet.

SF CONSTRUCT - STYLISH FAMILY HOMES. Bij SF CONSTRUCT bouwen we stijlvolle woningen voor jouw familie. Onze focus ligt op eigen ontwikkelingen, waarbij we vakmanschap en innovatie combineren tot unieke huizen die passen bij de moderne levensstijl.
Kies voor gemak en gemoedsrust met onze sleutel-op-de-deur oplossingen. SF CONSTRUCT neemt de volledige verantwoordelijkheid over het bouwproces, van ontwerp tot oplevering. Zo kun jij je toekomst plannen in een huis dat volledig aan jouw wensen voldoet.
Bij SF CONSTRUCT streven we naar perfectie in elk detail. Onze woningen behoren tot het hogere segment, waar kwaliteit en luxe samenkomen. Ontdek hoe doordacht ontworpen ruimtes en hoogwaardige afwerkingen jouw huis transformeren tot een thuis met comfort en stijl.
We streven naar een hoge levenskwaliteit. Onze ontwerpen bieden een warme en comfortabele omgeving. 
Bij SF CONSTRUCT creëren we hoogwaardige woningen op toplocaties. Onze woningen zijn zorgvuldig gebouwd op strategische locaties die een unieke levensstijl mogelijk maken. Een bruisende stadswijk, een rustige buitenwijk of een schilderachtig landschap? Onze woningen zijn altijd ontworpen met elegantie en comfort. De combinatie van een verfijnd ontwerp en hoogwaardige materialen resulteert in woningen vol vakmanschap op unieke plekken. 
Bij SF CONSTRUCT omarmen we onze roots als de bouwfirma met sleutel op de deur, maar we evolueren met een vernieuwde visie. Onze ervaring, vakmanschap en toewijding aan sleutel-op-de-deur oplossingen combineren we met een frisse benadering van moderne woningbouw. SF CONSTRUCT blijft de sleutel tot jouw uitzonderlijke thuis.
Onze focus op kwalitatieve leefruimtes is complementair aan een toekomstgerichte benadering. Daarom integreren we duurzame bouwpraktijken in al onze projecten. Met energiezuinige technologieën en milieuvriendelijke materialen, kijken we verder dan de behoeften van vandaag. We bouwen woningen die ook bijdragen aan een duurzamere morgen.

Name: GD Infrastrutture
Description:
GD Infrastrutture nasce dalla visione di manager con maturata esperienza nel settore delle infrastrutture e dell’edilizia civile e industriale. Opera in Italia e all’estero, sia nel settore pubblico che in quello privato, realizzando progetti di rilevanza nazionale e internazionale. Come “General Contractor” realizza progetti per la costruzione di infrastrutture di viabilità quali ferrovie, strade, aeroporti, con progetti localizzati anche all’estero. Nel settore privato opera, inoltre, attraverso l’acquisizione e lo sviluppo di interventi di riqualificazione urbana, tramite la progettazione e la successiva costruzione di immobili residenziali.

Fondata nel 2013, GD Infrastrutture ha sede a Roma ed è controllata dalla società di ingegneria "BE Constructive Group", azienda formata da professionisti nella progettazione di opere di ingegneria civile a livello internazionale. La dinamicità del team, con uno staff composto da giovani professionisti altamente qualificati che operano principalmente nelle aree tecniche, amministrative e legali – oltre alle risorse produttive impiegate nella costruzione di tutti i progetti - ha alimentato una crescita costante del portafoglio lavori. Dopo una comprovata azione sinergica nei diversi Paesi nell’ambito delle infrastrutture pubbliche, è nata la divisione di ‘Real Estate’ che sta guadagnando terreno nel mercato immobiliare italiano, concentrandosi su città in forte espansione, da Milano a Taormina.

L’impresa è dedita a lasciare un’impronta decisa nel panorama delle costruzioni e a trasformare le idee in realtà tangibili, per realizzare in modo efficiente e sostenibile un futuro migliore per le comunità in cui opera.

Name: Ambient Sustainable Living
Description:
At Ambient Sustainable Living (ASL), we believe a home is more than walls, a roof, and finishes. A home is a living system – and when every element is designed to work together, the result is a space that is more comfortable, more resilient, and more sustainable. Our mission is to build homes that respond to Western Australia’s unique climate challenges while reducing long-term running costs and providing a healthier living environment.

We specialise in system-built homes, where energy efficiency, durability, and smart technologies are integrated from the start. Unlike conventional builds that combine isolated components, our homes are planned as unified ecosystems – from the Structural Insulated Panel (SIP) envelope and triple-glazed windows to automated shading, ventilation, and smart security. Each element is designed to complement the other, creating homes that remain cool in summer, warm in winter, quiet, secure, and cost-efficient to run.

Name: Eagle Eye Exteriors
Description:
Your home is your largest investment and painting your home can be an expensive endeavor. It is critical that you choose the right company for this important project. Trust that when you choose Eagle Eye Exteriors, you are putting your home in the hands of one the best painting companies in the Greater Columbus, Georgia area.

We have over 15 years of experience in the paint and coatings industry. If there is one word to describe our talented team would be professionalism, which is continued throughout the entire project. On our first consultation visit to your home, we will spend time with you to fully understand what your vision for your space is. We can assist you in choosing a color and recommend the best paint and sheen for each room. We are happy to work with your interior designer as well.

We will conduct a thorough walk-through of your home to examine any areas of concern. We will then present you with a customized proposal detailing the specifics of your job. Our proposal will clearly explain the scope of work to be performed. It will specify products, application methods, number of coats, areas to be painted, any other details, pricing, and payment options.

We acknowledge that you have a choice when selecting a paint contractor and may choose to obtain other bids for your project. We want to provide you with as much information as possible so you can carefully evaluate the different bids you receive in order to make an educated decision that is not solely based on price. But we sincerely hope that you make the right decision and choose Eagle Eye Exteriors for your paint project!

We understand that our workspace throughout the project is your living space. Our clients have busy lives, and we do our best to work around your schedule. Our painting professionals are neat, clean, and on time. We always strive to meet deadlines but will not rush through a project, as quality work is the most important aspect of our job.

Whether you are looking to renovate a laundry room, carry out bathroom alterations or revamp your kitchen, Park & Clarke can help with everything from the initial design to the installation process. Whichever room you are planning to renovate, we follow the same simple process.
Our team will visit you at home to see the space you want to renovate and to discuss your plans. Whatever you have in mind our talented designers can create a look that not only upgrades your room but also fits perfectly with the style of your home in general.
An appointment will be made at our Wellington showroom where you will be offered different potential layouts including a 3D plan of your proposed design. 
While at our showroom, you can see the products Park & Clarke use, giving you a great opportunity to see and touch the products before choosing your final design
Once you have decided on your plans and products, a quote is prepared.
Park & Clarke manage the entire installation process for you from building consents to sourcing and installing products and any tiling and painting required.
If you already have designs, Park & Clarke can also help you with the installation process if you need  professional bathroom, laundry or kitchen installations

Name: ^DachGeno RheinMain eG
Description:
Das ^DachGeno RheinMain eG iG ist eine Dachgenossenschaft für Wohnungsbau und Wohnungsverwaltung Eine solche Dachgenossenschaft erleichtert und ermöglicht es Menschen, in die guten Wohnverhältnisse einer Genossenschaftswohnung zu kommen. Das genossenschaftliche Prinzip bestärkt sie, ihr Zusammenleben und ihre Nachbarschaft aktiv mitzugestalten.

Das Hauptgeschäftsfeld der DachGeno RheinMain ist somit die Vermietung und Verwaltung von Wohnraum für ihre Mitglieder und die Übernahme aller Aufgaben, die sich daraus ergeben.

Es werden bei der Dachgenossenschaft zwei Ziele unterschieden:

Zum einen werden bewohnte Häuser gekauft werden, um den Bewohner:innen ein Wohnen zu ermöglichen, dass ihnen Mitbestimmung und ein sicheres kostengünstiges Wohnverhältnis zu ermöglicht. So kann Verdrängung verhindert und der Bestand an günstigem Wohnraum geschützt werden.
Zum anderen sollen Wohnprojekte realisiert werden, in denen eine Gemeinschaft unter dem Dach der Genossenschaft Häuser bauen kann. Dies gibt den Wohnprojektmitgliedern Sicherheit und einen verlässlichen Rahmen zur Realisierung des gemeinschaftlichen Lebens.

Außerdem werden die abgesicherten Wohnverhältnisse, die mit den genannten Zielen erreicht werden, die Beteiligung sowie das Engagement von Bürger:innen am sozialen Miteinander und der aktiven Gestaltung ihrer Nachbarschaft gefördert. In der Praxis bedeutet dies: Wohnprojekte und Hausgemeinschaften bedienen sich als Mitglieder der Dachgenossenschaft vorhandener professioneller Strukturen und müssen keine eigenständigen Wohnungsgenossenschaften gründen. Gleichzeitig kann die Dachgenossenschaft eigene Bauvorhaben initiieren sowie Bestandsgebäude erwerben und diese als gemeinwohlorientiertes Wohnungsunternehmen verwalten. Dabei kann die DachGeno RheinMain von der kompletten Verwaltung einer Immobilie bis zu weitestgehend selbstverwalteten Wohnprojekten, verschiedenste Projektformen unter ihrem Dach vereinen.

Realizar e entregar projetos que se destacam pela concepção moderna, na qualidade dos materiais e mão de obra utilizados, na valorização dos espaços, na otimização das plantas e no gerenciamento eficaz dos recursos em nossos empreendimentos, resultando em moradias de alto valor agregado e excelente custo-benefício.

Visão

Ser reconhecida por nossos clientes como a empresa de construção que entrega moradias construídas com alto padrão de excelência em inovação e sustentabilidade e que visam a qualidade de vida e otimização de ambientes.

Valores

A UNIT conduz seus negócios de forma ética, clara e transparente, honrando compromissos e prazos estabelecidos com nossos clientes e com toda a cadeia de fornecedores, parceiros e colaboradores.

Name: Osborne Construction
Description:
Osborne Construction is an owner-led build collective executing each project with our in-house construction team and project managers on high performance historic renovations and ground-up construction as a general contractor in PHILADELPHIA and SOUTHERN CALIFORNIA.  Over the last 15+ years, we have built a reputation for delivering hand-crafted, high performance homes and commercial spaces in and around Philadelphia, and now in Southern California and the Ojai Valley. 

Our focus as a firm has always been aimed toward the adaptive reuse of existing buildings. This has helped us garner a reputation among architects and clients for having the experience and appreciation needed for performing extensive renovations on historic buildings and homes.  In 2017, we attended a rigorous training and exam to become a Certified Passive House Builder. In the past four years, we have employed multiple facets of the passive house building methodologies, building healthier and more efficient homes for the next 100-200 years.

Our In-house team is comprised of highly skilled framing and finish carpenters and artisans, rigorously trained architects, building science experts, tile setters, furniture and cabinet makers - all with a deep appreciation for the meticulous execution of custom elements in a home that become a reflection of the unique people who inhabit them.  Our knowledge base in building science and sustainable building practices allow us to apply a ‘whole house organism’ approach to mechanical systems in new construction and retrofits in old homes that all contribute to highly refined, healthy and extremely durable buildings. 

We see each project as a unique opportunity to refine our collective expertise to leverage the BEST VALUE and facilitate the BEST VERSION of every project. Our aim is always toward the creation of long-lasting, beautiful and high-performance collaborations that will outlive and outperform today’s traditional construction methodologies.
